# **Background** 

The intersection of perinatal HIV exposure and child neurodevelopment is an area of growing importance, particularly in understanding how maternal HIV status influences maternal and child immune profiles and their downstream effects on brain and cognitive development. Pregnant women living with HIV may experience episodes of immune dysregulation despite antiretroviral treatment, and immune alterations are also evident in children who are HIV-exposed and uninfected (HEU). These immune disruptions during pregnancy and early life may interfere with critical brain developmental processes, potentially leading to changes in brain structure, function, and later neurodevelopmental outcomes.

# **Aim of the PhD**

The purpose of my PhD is to investigate whether maternal HIV status is associated with **altered immune profiles during pregnancy** and **longitudinal immune alterations** in children who are HEU compared to HIV-unexposed (HU) peers. It further explores how these immune alterations relate to **neurometabolite** and **white matter microstructural differences** observed through **neuroimaging** (**MRS** and **DTI**) from birth to 6–7 years of age. As secondary aims, the study also examines whether immune and neuroimaging markers show any predictive or mediation power on neurodevelopmental outcomes in HEU children, measured using standardized neurodevelopmental tools from ages 2 to 8 years.

By leveraging data from the South African [**Drakenstein Child Health Study**](http://www.paediatrics.uct.ac.za/scah/dclhs), this project aims to delineate group differences in peripheral inflammatory and neuroimmune serum markers and identify their potential impacts on brain development. The unique context of South Africa, a region with a high burden of HIV, provides a great opportunity to generate insights that could inform targeted interventions to improve outcomes for children who are HEU, locally and globally.

# **Research article #2** 

Building on the findings from our first chapter, this study aimed to evaluate the long-term impact of maternal HIV status on maternal and child immune profiles and their association with child neurometabolite levels at age 6–7 years. We examined maternal and child immune markers from pregnancy to five years of age, and their associations with neurometabolite levels at 6–7 years. We further investigated whether serum markers and neurometabolite levels were associated to learning outcomes at school entry, measured using the culturally validated [Early Learning Outcomes Measure tool](https://datadrive2030.co.za/elom-origins/). Our aim was to explore neurobiological pathways through which maternal HIV and immune dysregulation may shape child neurodevelopment and school readiness.

# **Open Science Framework**

This PhD is registered in Open Science Framework under DOI [**10.17605/OSF.IO/SN6Y9**](https://osf.io/sn6y9/). Subsequently, research article #2 is registered as DOI [**10.17605/OSF.IO/7N94C**](https://osf.io/7n94c/), and the Statistical Analysis Plan (SAP) for this second research article was published under DOI [**10.17605/OSF.IO/M5476**](https://osf.io/m5476).

## **Load data**

```{r loaddata, results="hide", warning=FALSE}
# For children invited to neuroimaging at 6-7 years

  # A total of N=268 children were invited for an MRI scan at age 6-7 years
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_all_children_invited <- read_excel("Z:/UserFolders/Cesc/Databases/DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr/pid_all_children_invited_neuroimaging_6yo.xlsx")
    if (!("1888/1/1/ANIF" %in% DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_all_children_invited$pid_child)) {
      new_row <- tibble(pid_child = "1888/1/1/ANIF")
      # Add the new row to the dataframe
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_all_children_invited <- bind_rows(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_all_children_invited, new_row)
    }

    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch1 <- read_excel("Z:/UserFolders/Cesc/Databases/DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr/Batch1_LCModel_Methinf6.xlsx") 
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch1$region <- as.factor(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch1$region)
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch1$FWHM <- as.numeric(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch1$FWHM)
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch1$SNR <- as.character(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch1$SNR)
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch1[, (7:111)] <- lapply(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch1[, (7:111)], as.numeric)

    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch2 <- read_excel("Z:/UserFolders/Cesc/Databases/DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr/Batch2_LCModel_Methinf6.xlsx")  
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch2$region <- as.factor(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch2$region)
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch2$FWHM <- as.numeric(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch2$FWHM)
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch2$SNR <- as.character(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch2$SNR)
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch2[, (7:111)] <- lapply(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch2[, (7:111)], as.numeric)
    
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch3 <- read_excel("Z:/UserFolders/Cesc/Databases/DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr/Batch3_LCModel_Methinf6.xlsx") 
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch3$region <- as.factor(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch3$region)
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch3$FWHM <- as.numeric(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch3$FWHM)
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch3$SNR <- as.character(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch3$SNR)
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch3[, (7:111)] <- lapply(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch3[, (7:111)], as.numeric)
    
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch4 <- read_excel("Z:/UserFolders/Cesc/Databases/DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr/Batch4_LCModel_Methinf6.xlsx")
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch4$region <- as.factor(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch4$region)
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch4$FWHM <- as.numeric(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch4$FWHM)
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch4$SNR <- as.character(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch4$SNR)
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch4[, (7:111)] <- lapply(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch4[, (7:111)], as.numeric)
    
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr <- bind_rows(
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch1,
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch2,
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch3,
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_batch4
    )
    
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr %>%
      mutate(SNR = str_remove(SNR, "S/N =\\s*"))
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr$SNR <- as.numeric(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr$SNR)
    
  # Exclude spectra with QC criteria set up by Williams et al, 2023
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr %>%
      filter(!(FWHM > 0.09 | SNR < 15))
    
  # Apply a Cramér-Rao Lower Bound of 20
    neurometabolites <- c("Glu", "Ins", "NAA", "GPC+PCh")
    
    # Loop over each metabolite and apply the 20% threshold
    for (met in neurometabolites) {
      crlb_col <- paste0(met, " %SD")   # Identify CRLB %SD column
      ratio_col <- paste0(met, "/Cr+PCr")  # Identify metabolite ratio column
      
      # Replace metabolite values with NA if CRLB %SD > 20%
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr[DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr[[crlb_col]] > 20, c(met, ratio_col)] <- NA  
    }
    
  # Now check duplicates and split by brain region
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr %>%
      mutate(
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "METHINF6", "METHINF"), # Otherwise it won't match the pid_child translation METHIN6_
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "METHIN_", "METHINF_"),
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "METHINF___", "METHINF_"),
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "METHINF__", "METHINF_"),
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "METHIN6_", "METHINF_"),
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "-", "_"), # Same here
        split_subject = str_split_fixed(Subject, "_", 3), # Split into parts by the first two underscores
        scandate = paste(split_subject[, 1], split_subject[, 2], sep = "_"), # Combine the first two parts for scandate
        scanID = split_subject[, 3] # Everything after the second underscore becomes scanID
      ) %>%
      select(scanID, scandate, everything()) # Move scandate and scanID to the first columns
    
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr$scanID[DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr$scanID == "METHINF_ALC41_BD"] <- "METHINF_DEP06_ALC41_BD"
    
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr %>% filter(region == "pgm")
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr %>% filter(region == "pwm")
    
  # PGM - Check for duplicates between batches
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_duplicates <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm %>% 
      group_by(scanID) %>% 
      filter(n() > 1) %>% 
      ungroup()
    
    if (nrow(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_duplicates) > 0) {
      print("Duplicates in DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm:")
      print(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_duplicates$Subject)
    } else {
      print("No duplicates found in DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm.")
    }
    
  # PWM - Check for duplicates between batches
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_duplicates <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm %>% 
      group_by(scanID) %>% 
      filter(n() > 1) %>% 
      ungroup()
  
    if (nrow(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_duplicates) > 0) {
      print("Duplicates in DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm:")
      print(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_duplicates$Subject)
    } else {
      print("No duplicates found in DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm.")
    }

# For  children ever invited to any of the neuroimaging sub-study timepoints

  # DCHS pid and scan id
    DCHS_pid_scanID_all <- read_excel("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Databases/DCHS_pid_and_scan_id.xlsx")
    DCHS_pid_scanID_all <- na.omit(DCHS_pid_scanID_all)
    
    # Drop scans belonging to children whose mothers used illicit drugs (methamphetamine and such) during pregnancy
    
      DCHS_pid_scanID_all <- DCHS_pid_scanID_all %>%
        filter(!(imaging_ID %in% c(
           "METHINF_MAA04_NM", 
           "METHINF_MAA06_SS", 
           "METHINF_MAA01_AV", 
           "METHINF_MAA02_CB", 
           "METHINF_MAA03_MW", 
           "METHINF_MET01_JK", 
           "METHINF_MAA05_CW", 
           "METHINF_MET02_LK", 
           "METHINF_MET03_INa", 
           "METHINF_MAA07_BCa", 
           "METHINF_MAA08_RHa", 
           "METHINF_MET04_RDa")))
          
    # Correct wrong nomenclature based on this pid vs scan id file
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_scanID_corrections <- c(
        "METHINF_ALC20_ZH" = "METHINF_ALC20_ZL",
        "METHINF_ALC43_DEP09_MA" = "METHINF_ALC43_DEP09",

        "METHINF_CON32_RD" = "METHINF_CON32_RDa",
        "METHINF_CON33_IJ" = "METHINF_CON33_IJa",
        "METHINF_CON34_SN" = "METHINF_CON34_SNa",
        "METHINF_CON35_HN" = "METHINF_CON35_HNa",
        "METHINF_CON38_ZN" = "METHINF_CON38_ZNa",
        "METHINF_CON44_KM" = "METHINF_CON44_KMa",
        "METHINF_CON45_LS" = "METHINF_CON45_LSa",
        "METHINF_CON48_LL" = "METHINF_CON48_LLa",
        "METHINF_CON49_ND" = "METHINF_CON49_NDa",
        "METHINF_CON50_VP" = "METHINF_CON50_VPa",

        "METHINF_CON65_TD" = "METHINF_CON65_TDa",
        "METHINF_CON67_ND" = "METHINF_CON67_NDa",
        "METHINF_CON68_TBA" = "METHINF_CON68_TBa",
        "METHINF_CON70_TS" = "METHINF_CON70_TSa",
        "METHINF_CON71_NM" = "METHINF_CON71_NMa",
        "METHINF_CON72_NM" = "METHINF_CON72_NMa",
        "METHINF_CON77_BK" = "METHINF_CON77_BKA",
        "METHINF_CON78_NR" = "METHINF_CON78_NRa",
        "METHINF_CON82_TW" = "METHINF_CON82_TWa",
        "METHINF_CON88_CV" = "METHINF_CON88_CVa",
        "METHINF_CON90_AE" = "METHINF_CON90_AEa",
        "METHINF_CON93_AG" = "METHINF_CON93_AGa",
        "METHINF_CON94_NM" = "METHINF_CON94_NMa",
        "METHINF_CON97_NN" = "METHINF_CON97_NNa",
        "METHINF_DEP19_SJ" = "METHINF_DEP19_SJa",
        "METHINF_DEP20_SM" = "METHINF_DEP20_SMa",
        "METHINF_DEP23_AP" = "METHINF_DEP23_APa",
        "METHINF_DEP26_BR" = "METHINF_DEP26_BRa",
        "METHINF_DEP28_NS" = "METHINF_DEP28_NSa",
        "METHINF_DEP29_NS" = "METHINF_DEP29_NSa",
        "METHINF_DEP31_ALC51_PH" = "METHINF_DEP31_ALC51_PHa",
        "METHINF_DEP32_AL" = "METHINF_DEP32_ALa",
        "METHINF_DEP33_ALC53_NS" = "METHINF_DEP33_ALC53_NSa",
        "METHINF_DEP37_NN" = "METHINF_DEP37_NNa",
        "METHINF_DEP38_AL" = "METHINF_DEP38_ALa",
        "METHINF_DEP40_VW" = "METHINF_DEP40_VWa",
        "METHINF_DEP41_JP" = "METHINF_DEP41_JPa",
        "METHINF_DEP42_PC" = "METHINF_DEP42_PCa",
        "METHINF_DEP43_TX" = "METHINF_DEP43_TXa",
        "METHINF_DEP48_JF" = "METHINF_DEP48_JFa"
      )
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm$scanID <- ifelse(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm$scanID %in% names(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_scanID_corrections), 
                                      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_scanID_corrections[DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm$scanID], 
                                      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm$scanID)
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm$scanID <- ifelse(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm$scanID %in% names(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_scanID_corrections), 
                                      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_scanID_corrections[DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm$scanID], 
                                      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm$scanID)
          
    # Check for duplicates
      print("Duplicate pid_child in pid_child-to-scan_ID translator")
      DCHS_pid_scanID_all[duplicated(DCHS_pid_scanID_all$pid_child) | 
                                  duplicated(DCHS_pid_scanID_all$pid_child, fromLast = TRUE), ] # Check the duplicate
   
  # Serum markers
    DCHS_biomarker_all <- read_excel("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Databases/Cesc_immune_all.xlsx")  
    print("Duplicate pid_child in serum marker dataset")
    DCHS_biomarker_all[duplicated(DCHS_biomarker_all$pid_child) | 
                                duplicated(DCHS_biomarker_all$pid_child, fromLast = TRUE), ]
    DCHS_biomarker_all <- DCHS_biomarker_all %>% distinct(pid_child, .keep_all = TRUE) # Can delete one duplicate
    
  # Sociodemographic covariates
    DCHS_sociodem_all <- read_excel("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Databases/Cesc_sociodem_covars_22NOV2024.xls")  
    print("Duplicate pid_child in sociodemographics dataset")
    DCHS_sociodem_all[duplicated(DCHS_sociodem_all$pid_child) | 
                                duplicated(DCHS_sociodem_all$pid_child, fromLast = TRUE), ]
    DCHS_sociodem_all <- DCHS_sociodem_all %>% distinct(pid_child, .keep_all = TRUE) # Can delete one duplicate
    
    DCHS_sociodem_all[, (3:8)] <- lapply(DCHS_sociodem_all[, (3:8)], as.factor)
    DCHS_sociodem_all$household_income <- ordered(DCHS_sociodem_all$household_income, 
                                                  levels = c("<R1000/m", "R1000-5000/m", ">R5000/m"))
    DCHS_sociodem_all$education <- ordered(DCHS_sociodem_all$education, 
                                           levels = c("primary", "some secondary", "completed secondary", "any tertiary"))
    
    DCHS_sociodem_all$preterm <- factor(DCHS_sociodem_all$preterm, 
                                        levels = c("gest.>=37", "gest.<37"))
  
    DCHS_sociodem_all[, (13:14)] <- lapply(DCHS_sociodem_all[, (13:14)], as.factor)
    DCHS_sociodem_all$Prenatal_smoking_composite <- ordered(DCHS_sociodem_all$Prenatal_smoking_composite, 
                                                            levels = c("No", "Yes"))
    DCHS_sociodem_all$Prenatal_alcohol_composite <- ordered(DCHS_sociodem_all$Prenatal_alcohol_composite, 
                                                            levels = c("No Exposure", "Exposure"))
    
    DCHS_sociodem_all$ebf_atleast_5m <- factor(DCHS_sociodem_all$ebf_atleast_5m, 
                                           levels = c(0, 1), 
                                           labels = c("No", "Yes"))
    
    DCHS_sociodem_all$anaemia_composite <- as.factor(DCHS_sociodem_all$anaemia_composite)
    
    DCHS_sociodem_all$ARV_initiation_timepoint <- factor(DCHS_sociodem_all$ARV_initiation_timepoint, 
                                        levels = c("Pre pregnancy", "During pregnancy"))
    
    DCHS_sociodem_all[, (21:23)] <- lapply(DCHS_sociodem_all[, (21:23)], as.factor)
    
    DCHS_sociodem_all$Bactrim <- ordered(DCHS_sociodem_all$Bactrim,
                                         levels = c("Yes", "No", "Dont know"))
    
    DCHS_sociodem_all$Infant_prophylaxis <- as.factor(DCHS_sociodem_all$Infant_prophylaxis)
    
    DCHS_sociodem_all$vacc3 <- ordered(DCHS_sociodem_all$vacc3,
                                         levels = c("Yes", "No"))
    
    DCHS_sociodem_all$vacc3_ontime <- ordered(DCHS_sociodem_all$vacc3_ontime,
                                         levels = c("On-time", "Delayed"))
    
    DCHS_sociodem_all$vacc4 <- ordered(DCHS_sociodem_all$vacc4,
                                         levels = c("Yes", "No"))
    
    DCHS_sociodem_all$vacc4_ontime <- ordered(DCHS_sociodem_all$vacc4_ontime,
                                         levels = c("On-time", "Delayed"))
    
    DCHS_sociodem_all$EPDS_threshold13 <- ordered(DCHS_sociodem_all$EPDS_threshold13,
                                         levels = c("Below threshold", "Above threshold"))
    
    DCHS_sociodem_all <- DCHS_sociodem_all %>%
      mutate(
        VL_numeric = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(VL)),  
        VL = case_when(
          VL == "LDL" ~ "Low levels detectable",
          VL_numeric >= 40 & VL_numeric <= 1000 ~ "40 to 1000 copies/mL",
          VL_numeric > 1000 ~ ">1000 copies/mL",
          VL == "." ~ NA_character_,  
          TRUE ~ as.character(VL)  
        )
      ) %>%
      mutate(VL = factor(VL, levels = c("Low levels detectable", "40 to 1000 copies/mL", ">1000 copies/mL"))) %>%
      select(-VL_numeric)  
    
    DCHS_sociodem_all <- DCHS_sociodem_all %>%
      mutate(CD4_nadir = as.numeric(CD4_nadir)) %>%  # Convert to numeric
      mutate(CD4_nadir = case_when(
        is.na(CD4_nadir) ~ NA_character_,
        CD4_nadir <= 500 ~ "<=500 cells/mm³",
        CD4_nadir > 500 ~ ">500 cells/mm³"
      )) %>%
      mutate(CD4_nadir = factor(CD4_nadir, levels = c("<=500 cells/mm³", ">500 cells/mm³")))

    DCHS_childdob_maternaldob <- read_excel("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Databases/DCHS_childdob_maternaldob.xlsx")
    DCHS_childdob_maternaldob$childdob <- as.Date(DCHS_childdob_maternaldob$childdob)
    DCHS_childdob_maternaldob$maternaldob <- as.Date(DCHS_childdob_maternaldob$maternaldob)
    
  # Neurodevelopmental datasets
    DCHS_neurodevelop_all <- read_excel("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Databases/Cesc_neurodevelopment_data_13_Dec_2024.xlsx")
    print("Duplicate pid_child in neurodevelopmental dataset")
    DCHS_neurodevelop_all[duplicated(DCHS_neurodevelop_all$pid_child) | 
                                duplicated(DCHS_neurodevelop_all$pid_child, fromLast = TRUE), ]
    DCHS_neurodevelop_all <- DCHS_neurodevelop_all %>% distinct(pid_child, .keep_all = TRUE) # Can delete one duplicate
    DCHS_neurodevelop_all[, (2:58)] <- lapply(DCHS_neurodevelop_all[, (2:58)], as.numeric)
```

## **Merge datasets**

```{r mergedatasets}
# For ALL CHILDREN ever invited for neuroimaging at any timepoint
  
  # Sociodemographics
    DCHS_pid_scanID_sociodem_all <- merge(x = DCHS_pid_scanID_all, y = DCHS_sociodem_all, by = "pid_child", all.x = TRUE) 

  # Immune serum markers and sociodemographics
    DCHS_biomarker_sociodem_all <- merge(x = DCHS_pid_scanID_sociodem_all, y = DCHS_biomarker_all, by = "pid_child", all.x = TRUE) 
    DCHS_biomarker_sociodem_all <- DCHS_biomarker_sociodem_all %>% distinct(pid_child, .keep_all = TRUE) # There is one duplicate
    
  # Immune serum markers and neurodevelopment
    DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_all <- merge(x = DCHS_biomarker_sociodem_all, y = DCHS_neurodevelop_all, by = "pid_child", all.x = TRUE) 
    DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_all <- DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_all %>% distinct(pid_child, .keep_all = TRUE) # There is one duplicate

# For children invited for neuroimaging at 6-7 years

  # Sociodemographics
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr <- merge(x = DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_all_children_invited, 
                               y = DCHS_pid_scanID_sociodem_all, by = "pid_child", all.x = TRUE) 
    
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Stunting_10w <- ifelse(DCHS_sociodem_6yr$hazW10 < -2, "Yes", "No")
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Stunting_10w <- as.factor(DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Stunting_10w)
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Stunting_2y <- ifelse(DCHS_sociodem_6yr$hazM24 < -2, "Yes", "No")
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Stunting_2y <- as.factor(DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Stunting_2y)                                        
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Stunting_6y <- ifelse(DCHS_sociodem_6yr$hazY6 < -2, "Yes", "No")
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Stunting_6y <- as.factor(DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Stunting_6y)
            
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Underweight_10w <- ifelse(DCHS_sociodem_6yr$wazW10 < -2, "Yes", "No")
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Underweight_10w <- as.factor(DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Underweight_10w)
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Underweight_2y <- ifelse(DCHS_sociodem_6yr$wazM24 < -2, "Yes", "No")
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Underweight_2y <- as.factor(DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Underweight_2y)                                
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Underweight_6y <- ifelse(DCHS_sociodem_6yr$wazY6 < -2, "Yes", "No")
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Underweight_6y <- as.factor(DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Underweight_6y)
    
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Wasting_10w <- ifelse((DCHS_sociodem_6yr$wazW10 - DCHS_sociodem_6yr$hazW10) < -2, "Yes", "No")
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Wasting_10w <- as.factor(DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Wasting_10w)
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Wasting_2y <- ifelse((DCHS_sociodem_6yr$wazM24 - DCHS_sociodem_6yr$hazM24) < -2, "Yes", "No")
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Wasting_2y <- as.factor(DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Wasting_2y)
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Wasting_6y <- ifelse((DCHS_sociodem_6yr$wazY6 - DCHS_sociodem_6yr$hazY6) < -2, "Yes", "No")
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Wasting_6y <- as.factor(DCHS_sociodem_6yr$Wasting_6y)
    
    DCHS_sociodem_scandate_bypass <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr[, c("scanID", "scandate")]
    DCHS_sociodem_scandate_bypass <- DCHS_sociodem_scandate_bypass %>%
      mutate(scandate = ymd_hm(scandate)) %>%
      mutate(scandate = as.Date(scandate))
    
    DCHS_sociodem_scandate_bypass <- DCHS_sociodem_scandate_bypass %>%
        filter(!(scanID %in% c(
           "METHINF_MAA04_NM", 
           "METHINF_MAA06_SS", 
           "METHINF_MAA01_AV", 
           "METHINF_MAA02_CB", 
           "METHINF_MAA03_MW", 
           "METHINF_MET01_JK", 
           "METHINF_MAA05_CW", 
           "METHINF_MET02_LK", 
           "METHINF_MET03_INa", 
           "METHINF_MAA07_BCa", 
           "METHINF_MAA08_RHa", 
           "METHINF_MET04_RDa")))
    
    DCHS_sociodem_scandate_bypass <- DCHS_sociodem_scandate_bypass %>%
      mutate(
        scanID = str_replace_all(scanID, "METHINF6", "METHINF"), # Otherwise it won't match the pid_child translation METHIN6_
        scanID = str_replace_all(scanID, "METHIN_", "METHINF_"),
        scanID = str_replace_all(scanID, "METHINF___", "METHINF_"),
        scanID = str_replace_all(scanID, "METHINF__", "METHINF_"),
        scanID = str_replace_all(scanID, "METHIN6_", "METHINF_"),
        scanID = str_replace_all(scanID, "-", "_"))
      
    DCHS_sociodem_scandate_bypass$scanID <- ifelse(DCHS_sociodem_scandate_bypass$scanID %in% names(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_scanID_corrections), 
                                      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_scanID_corrections[DCHS_sociodem_scandate_bypass$scanID], 
                                      DCHS_sociodem_scandate_bypass$scanID)
    
    DCHS_sociodem_scandate_bypass <- DCHS_sociodem_scandate_bypass %>%
      group_by(scanID) %>%
      arrange(scandate) %>%
      filter(row_number() == 1) %>%  # Keep the oldest scandate
      ungroup()

    DCHS_sociodem_scandate_bypass <- DCHS_sociodem_scandate_bypass %>%
      distinct(scanID, scandate, .keep_all = TRUE)
    
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr <- merge(x = DCHS_sociodem_6yr, 
                               y = DCHS_sociodem_scandate_bypass,
                               by.x = "imaging_ID", 
                               by.y = "scanID",
                               all = TRUE) 
    
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr <- merge(x = DCHS_sociodem_6yr, 
                               y = DCHS_childdob_maternaldob, 
                               by = "pid_child", 
                               all.x = TRUE) 
    
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr <- DCHS_sociodem_6yr %>%
      mutate(child_age_scan = ifelse(!is.na(scandate), 
                                     as.numeric(difftime(scandate, 
                                                         childdob, 
                                                         units = "days")) / 365.25, NA))
    
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr <- DCHS_sociodem_6yr %>%
      mutate(mat_age_del = as.numeric(difftime(childdob, maternaldob, units = "days")) / 365.25)
    
  # Depression: last observation carried forward
    ids_below <- c(
      "1963/1/1/BNIF", "1841/1/1/PMIF", "1865/1/1/NGIF", "1881/1/1/BKIF",
      "1892/1/1/OLIF", "1894/1/1/LJIF", "1905/1/1/TMIF", "1912/1/1/NMIF",
      "1942/1/1/NTIF", "1951/1/1/GTIF", "1968/1/1/ZSIF", "1969/1/1/NMIF",
      "3762/1/1/ATIF", "1773/1/1/NZIF", "1799/1/1/NMIF", "1821/1/1/NFIF",
      "1842/1/1/SMIF", "1842/2/1/SMIF", "1885/1/1/PMIF", "1910/1/1/NMIF",
      "1935/1/1/MMIF", "1964/1/1/RAIF", "1967/1/1/NBIF", "1896/1/1/NQIF",
      "1862/1/1/YHIF", "1987/1/1/NMIF"
    )
    
    ids_above <- c("1955/1/1/FMIF", "3756/1/1/GLIF")
    
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$EPDS_threshold13[
      DCHS_sociodem_6yr$pid_child %in% ids_below
    ] <- "Below threshold"
    
    DCHS_sociodem_6yr$EPDS_threshold13[
      DCHS_sociodem_6yr$pid_child %in% ids_above
    ] <- "Above threshold"
    
  # Immune serum markers and sociodemographics
    DCHS_biomarker_6yr <- merge(x = DCHS_sociodem_6yr, y = DCHS_biomarker_all, by = "pid_child", all.x = TRUE) 
    
    # Subset serum markers by collection timepoint
      marker_subset <- function(data, prefix) {
        subset <- data %>%
          select(1:47, starts_with(prefix)) %>%
          filter(rowSums(!is.na(select(., starts_with(prefix)))) > 0)  # Keep rows with at least one non-NA in prefix columns
        return(subset)
      }

      DCHS_biomarker_maternal <- marker_subset(DCHS_biomarker_6yr, "M_")
      DCHS_biomarker_infant   <- marker_subset(DCHS_biomarker_6yr, "I6_")
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr      <- marker_subset(DCHS_biomarker_6yr, "I24_")
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr      <- marker_subset(DCHS_biomarker_6yr, "I36_")
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr      <- marker_subset(DCHS_biomarker_6yr, "I60_")
    
  # Good quality MRS pgm data and pid_child-to-scan_ID translator
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid <- merge(x = DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm, 
                                      y = DCHS_pid_scanID_all, 
                                      by.x = "scanID", 
                                      by.y = "imaging_ID", 
                                      all.x = TRUE) 
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid[, c("pid_child", setdiff(names(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid), "pid_child"))]
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid_missing <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid %>% filter(is.na(pid_child))
    
    # Remove duplicates based on Simone Williams' Excel spreadsheet
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20180807_1520_METHINF_CON03_MA") # The other scan has both pgm and pwm voxel data available 
                                                            # and has pgm has lower FWHM, although pwm may not be the best
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20180904_1603_METHINF_CON06_IN") # The FWHM values look reasonable for both, however upon visually inspecting 
                                                             # the spectrum it looks better for the other scan session especially pwm 
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20180926_1641_METHINF_CON18_SX") # The other scan has the lower FWHM for pgm 
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20190314_1619_METHINF_ALC22_NW") # Has lower pwm FWHM
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20190704_1607_METHINF_ALC40_JW") # The other scan has both pgm and pwm voxel data available
                                                              # although pwm spectrum does not look the best
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20190715_1602_METHINF_ALC42_PT") # The other scan has both pgm and pwm voxel data available
                                                            # and a reasonable SNR
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20190902_1609_METHINF_DEP16_NL") # lower FWHM average between pgm and pwm
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20200304_1531_METHINF_DEP36_ALC56_EW") # lower FWHM for pgm and pwm
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20200311_1535_METHINF_DEP35_ALC55_MB") # lower FWHM for pgm and pwm
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20191009_1601_METHINF_ALC45_DEP12_LS") # lower FWHM for pgm and pwm
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20180816_1526_METHINF_CON04_AN") # lower FWHM for pgm and pwm
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20200116_1530_METHINF_DEP31_ALC51_PH") # lower FWHM for pgm and pwm
      
    # Now only one duplicate remains, which I will average
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid_avgcol <- names(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid)[6:114]
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid %>%
        group_by(pid_child) %>%
        summarise(across(1:5, first),
                  across(all_of(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid_avgcol), ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)))  

    # Check duplicates
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid_duplicates <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid %>% 
        group_by(scanID) %>% 
        filter(n() > 1) %>% 
        ungroup()
      
      if (nrow(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid_duplicates) > 0) {
        print("Duplicates in DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid:")
        print(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid_duplicates$Subject)
      } else {
        print("No duplicates found in DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid")
      }
    
  # Good quality MRS pwm data and pid_child-to-scan_ID translator
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- merge(x = DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm, y = DCHS_pid_scanID_all, by.x = "scanID", by.y = "imaging_ID", all.x = TRUE) 
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid[, c("pid_child", setdiff(names(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid), "pid_child"))]
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid_missing <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>% filter(is.na(pid_child))
    
    # Remove duplicates based on Simone Williams' Excel spreadsheet
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20180904_1603_METHINF_CON06_IN") # The FWHM values look reasonable for both, however upon visually inspecting 
                                                             # the spectrum it looks better for the other scan session especially pwm 
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20180926_1641_METHINF_CON18_SX") # pwm for this session does not look great
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20190314_1619_METHINF_ALC22_NW") # Has lower pwm fwhm
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20190902_1609_METHINF_DEP16_NL") # lower FWHM average between pgm and pwm
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20200304_1531_METHINF_DEP36_ALC56_EW") # lower FWHM for pgm and pwm
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20200311_1535_METHINF_DEP35_ALC55_MB") # lower FWHM for pgm and pwm
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20191009_1601_METHINF_ALC45_DEP12_LS") # lower FWHM for pgm and pwm 
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20180816_1526_METHINF_CON04_AN") # lower FWHM for pgm and pwm
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20201214_1559_METHINF_ALC58_BD") # lower FWHM for pgm and pwm
      
    # Remove participants whose pwm voxel was wrongly placed in the RIGHT pwm
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20190312_1549_METHINF6_ALC21_LJ") 
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20190411_1615_METHINF6_ALC25_ND") 
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20190417_1610_METHINF6_CON32_RD") 
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>%
        filter(Subject != "20190808_1535_METHINF6_ALC40_JW") 
      
    # Remove duplicate participants where one of the outputs makes no sense
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>%
        filter(!(pid_child == "3322/1/1/MFIF" & Glu > 2000))
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>%
        filter(!(pid_child == "1852/1/1/NMIF" & Glu > 2000))
      
    # Now only one duplicate remains, which I will average
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid_avgcol <- names(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid)[6:114]
      
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>%
        group_by(pid_child) %>%
        summarise(across(1:5, first),
                  across(all_of(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid_avgcol), ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)))  
      
    # Check duplicates
      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid_duplicates <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>% 
        group_by(scanID) %>% 
        filter(n() > 1) %>% 
        ungroup()
      
      if (nrow(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid_duplicates) > 0) {
        print("Duplicates in DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid:")
        print(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid_duplicates$Subject)
      } else {
        print("No duplicates found in DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid")
      }
    
  # Immune serum markers and good quality MRS data
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid %>% select(-scandate)
    DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid <- DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid %>% select(-scandate)
      
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm <- merge(x = DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pgm_pid, y = DCHS_sociodem_6yr, by = "pid_child", all.x = TRUE) 
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm <- merge(x = DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_pwm_pid, y = DCHS_sociodem_6yr, by = "pid_child", all.x = TRUE) 
      
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm <- merge(x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm, y = DCHS_biomarker_all, by = "pid_child", all.x = TRUE) 
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm <- merge(x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm, y = DCHS_biomarker_all, by = "pid_child", all.x = TRUE) 
    
  # Immune serum markers and neurodevelopment
    DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr <- merge(x = DCHS_biomarker_6yr, y = DCHS_neurodevelop_all, by = "pid_child", all.x = TRUE) 
    DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr <- DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr %>% distinct(pid_child, .keep_all = TRUE)
    DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr[, (169:173)] <- lapply(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr[, (169:173)], as.factor)
    DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr[, (179:183)] <- lapply(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr[, (169:173)], as.factor)
    DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr[, (189:193)] <- lapply(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr[, (169:173)], as.factor)
```

<br>
<br>
<br>

## **Baseline characteristics of the cohort**

Wilcoxon Rank-Sum Test (Mann-Whitney U Test) were ran for all continuous variables since Shapiro-Wilk tests results reflected that all of them were not normally-distributed.

Mothers not living with HIV in our cohort of N=268 mother-child pairs were **older at delivery**, presented **higher EPDS depression scores**, and **breastfed** their babies for longer compared to mothers living with HIV. Children with perinatal HIV infection were older at the time of scan.

```{r sociodemographics continuous, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
DCHS_sociodem_6yr_continuous <- c("child_age_scan", 
                                  "mat_age_del",
                                  "gestation_delivery", 
                                  "birth_weight", 
                                  "EPDS_total", 
                                  "time_ebf_months")

DCHS_sociodem_6yr_continuous_table <- DCHS_sociodem_6yr %>%
  select(maternal_hiv, all_of(DCHS_sociodem_6yr_continuous)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(DCHS_sociodem_6yr_continuous), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Value") %>%
  group_by(Variable, maternal_hiv) %>%
  summarise(
    Median = median(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = IQR(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = maternal_hiv, values_from = c(Median, IQR), names_sep = "_") %>%
  mutate(
    `Median (IQR) CHU` = paste0(format(round(`Median_HIV negative`, 2), nsmall = 2), " (", format(round(`IQR_HIV negative`, 2), nsmall = 2), ")"),
    `Median (IQR) CHEU` = paste0(format(round(`Median_HIV positive`, 2), nsmall = 2), " (", format(round(`IQR_HIV positive`, 2), nsmall = 2), ")")
  ) %>%
  select(Variable, `Median (IQR) CHU`, `Median (IQR) CHEU`)

DCHS_sociodem_6yr_shapiro_results <- lapply(DCHS_sociodem_6yr_continuous, function(var) {
  shapiro.test(DCHS_sociodem_6yr[[var]])
})

DCHS_sociodem_6yr_Wilcoxon_vars <- DCHS_sociodem_6yr_continuous

DCHS_sociodem_6yr_Wilcoxon <- lapply(DCHS_sociodem_6yr_Wilcoxon_vars, function(var) {
  DCHS_sociodem_6yr_Wilcoxon_test <- wilcox.test(DCHS_sociodem_6yr[[var]] ~ DCHS_sociodem_6yr$maternal_hiv)
  return(data.frame(Variable = var, P_value_Wilcoxon = DCHS_sociodem_6yr_Wilcoxon_test$p.value))
})

DCHS_sociodem_6yr_Wilcoxon_df <- do.call(rbind, DCHS_sociodem_6yr_Wilcoxon)

DCHS_sociodem_6yr_continuous_table <- left_join(
  DCHS_sociodem_6yr_continuous_table,
  DCHS_sociodem_6yr_Wilcoxon_df,
  by = "Variable"
)

DCHS_sociodem_6yr_continuous_table <- DCHS_sociodem_6yr_continuous_table %>%
  rename(`P value` = P_value_Wilcoxon)

DCHS_sociodem_6yr_continuous_table <- DCHS_sociodem_6yr_continuous_table %>%
  mutate(Variable = factor(Variable, 
                           levels = c("child_age_scan",
                                      "mat_age_del",
                                      "gestation_delivery", 
                                      "birth_weight", 
                                      "EPDS_total", 
                                      "time_ebf_months"),
                           labels = c("Child age at date of scan (years)", 
                                      "Maternal age at delivery (years)", 
                                      "Gestational age at delivery (weeks)",
                                      "Child birthweight (gr)", 
                                      "Maternal EPDS scores",
                                      "Time of exclusive breastfeeding (months)")))

DCHS_sociodem_6yr_continuous_kable <- DCHS_sociodem_6yr_continuous_table %>%
  kable("html") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
  kableExtra::column_spec(column = 4, bold = DCHS_sociodem_6yr_continuous_table$`P value` < 0.05)

DCHS_sociodem_6yr_continuous_kable
```

<br>

With regards to categorical variables: 

In our cohort of N=268 mother-child pairs, rates of alcohol and smoke consumption during pregnancy, as well as depression, were more frequent among mothers not living with HIV compared to mothers living with HIV. At 10 weeks of age, HEU children presented with higher rates of stunting and lower rates of wasting than their HU peers. At 6 years of age, HEU children had slightly higher rates of stunting, and lower rates of underweight, than HU chlidren.

```{r sociodemographics categorical, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical <- c("maternal_hiv", "sex", "household_income", "education", 
                                   "work", "marital_status", "preterm", "ebf_atleast_5m", 
                                   "Prenatal_smoking_composite", "Prenatal_alcohol_composite", 
                                   "EPDS_threshold13", "anaemia_composite",
                                   "vacc3", "vacc3_ontime", "vacc4", "vacc4_ontime", 
                                   "Stunting_10w", "Underweight_10w", "Wasting_10w", 
                                   "Stunting_2y", "Underweight_2y", "Wasting_2y", 
                                   "Stunting_6y", "Underweight_6y", "Wasting_6y", 
                                   "CD4_nadir", "VL", "ARV_initiation_timepoint", "ART", 
                                   "HIV_arv_treatment_v1", "HIV_arv_treatment_v2", "Bactrim", "Infant_prophylaxis")

# Function for Chi-squared test
DCHS_sociodemographics_chi_squared <- function(data, variable) {
  tryCatch({
    contingency_table <- table(data$maternal_hiv, data[[variable]], useNA = "ifany")
    chisq.test(contingency_table)$p.value
  }, error = function(e) NA)
}

# Function for Fisher’s exact test
DCHS_sociodemographics_fisher_exact <- function(data, variable) {
  tryCatch({
    contingency_table <- table(data$maternal_hiv, data[[variable]], useNA = "ifany")
    fisher.test(contingency_table)$p.value
  }, error = function(e) NA)
}

# Filter variables with more than one unique level (excluding NAs)
valid_vars <- DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical[
  sapply(DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical, function(var) {
    length(unique(na.omit(DCHS_sociodem_6yr[[var]]))) >= 1  # Allow variables with only one level
  })
]

# Run Chi-squared and Fisher's exact tests
chi_squared_results <- sapply(valid_vars, function(var) DCHS_sociodemographics_chi_squared(DCHS_sociodem_6yr, var))
fisher_exact_results <- sapply(valid_vars, function(var) DCHS_sociodemographics_fisher_exact(DCHS_sociodem_6yr, var))

# Create a results table
DCHS_DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical_table <- data.frame(
  Variable = character(),
  n_N_CHU = character(),
  n_N_CHEU = character(),
  Chi_squared_P_value = numeric(),
  Fisher_P_value = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Loop through variables to create the final table
for (var in valid_vars) {
  contingency_table <- table(DCHS_sociodem_6yr$maternal_hiv, 
                             DCHS_sociodem_6yr[[var]], useNA = "no")
  
  # Ensure both levels exist in the table
  row_names <- rownames(contingency_table)

  # Compute total number of non-missing observations for each group
  chu_total <- if ("HIV negative" %in% row_names) {
    sum(!is.na(DCHS_sociodem_6yr[[var]]) & DCHS_sociodem_6yr$maternal_hiv == "HIV negative")
  } else { NA }

  cheu_total <- if ("HIV positive" %in% row_names) {
    sum(!is.na(DCHS_sociodem_6yr[[var]]) & DCHS_sociodem_6yr$maternal_hiv == "HIV positive")
  } else { NA }

  # Store test results
  DCHS_DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical_table <- rbind(
    DCHS_DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical_table, 
    data.frame(Variable = var,
               n_N_CHU = NA,
               n_N_CHEU = NA,
               Chi_squared_P_value = chi_squared_results[var],
               Fisher_P_value = fisher_exact_results[var])
  )

  # Loop through levels for proportions
  unique_levels <- unique(na.omit(DCHS_sociodem_6yr[[var]]))
  for (level in unique_levels) {
    chu_count <- if ("HIV negative" %in% row_names && level %in% colnames(contingency_table)) {
      contingency_table["HIV negative", level]
    } else { 0 }  # Ensure missing categories appear
    
    cheu_count <- if ("HIV positive" %in% row_names && level %in% colnames(contingency_table)) {
      contingency_table["HIV positive", level]
    } else { 0 }  # Ensure missing categories appear

    # Avoid division by zero
    chu_proportion <- ifelse(!is.na(chu_total) && chu_total > 0, chu_count / chu_total, NA)
    cheu_proportion <- ifelse(!is.na(cheu_total) && cheu_total > 0, cheu_count / cheu_total, NA)

    DCHS_DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical_table <- rbind(
      DCHS_DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical_table, 
      data.frame(Variable = as.character(level),
                 n_N_CHU = if (!is.na(chu_proportion)) sprintf("%d/%d (%.1f%%)", chu_count, chu_total, 100 * chu_proportion) else NA,
                 n_N_CHEU = if (!is.na(cheu_proportion)) sprintf("%d/%d (%.1f%%)", cheu_count, cheu_total, 100 * cheu_proportion) else NA,
                 Chi_squared_P_value = NA,
                 Fisher_P_value = NA)
    )
  }
}

# Rename columns
colnames(DCHS_DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical_table) <- c("Variable", 
                                                        "n/N (%) CHU", 
                                                        "n/N (%) CHEU", 
                                                        "Chi-squared P value", 
                                                        "Fisher P value")

# Define variable and level name replacements
levels_to_rename <- c(
  "maternal_hiv" = "Maternal HIV status",
  "HIV negative" = "HIV negative", 
  "HIV positive" = "HIV positive",
  "sex" = "Child biological sex",
  "Female" = "Female", 
  "Male" = "Male", 
  "household_income" = "Monthly household income (ZAR)",
  "<R1000/m" = "<R1000/m",
  "R1000-5000/m" = "R1000-5000/m",
  ">R5000/m" = ">R5000/m",
  "education" = "Maternal level of education",
  "primary" = "Primary",
  "some secondary" = "Some secondary",
  "completed secondary" = "Completed secondary",
  "any tertiary" = "Any tertiary",
  "work" = "Maternal employment",
  "not working" = "Not working",
  "working" = "Working",
  "marital_status" = "Maternal relationship status",
  "Married/cohabiting" = "Married or cohabiting", 
  "Single" = "Single",
  "preterm" = "Preterm birth",
  "gest.>=37" = "No", 
  "gest.<37"= "Yes",
  "ebf_atleast_5m" = "Exclusive breastfeeding ≥5 months",
  "No" = "No",
  "Yes" = "Yes",
  "Prenatal_smoking_composite" = "Maternal smoking during pregnancy",
  "No" = "No",
  "Yes" = "Yes",
  "Prenatal_alcohol_composite" = "Maternal alcohol use during pregnancy",
  "No Exposure" = "No", 
  "Exposure" = "Yes",
  "EPDS_threshold13" = "Maternal depression during pregnancy",
  "Below threshold" = "No", 
  "Above threshold" = "Yes",
  "anaemia_composite" = "Maternal anaemia during pregnancy",
  "No" = "No",
  "Yes" = "Yes",
  "vacc3" = "Child vaccination schedule 3 received?",
  "Yes" = "Yes",
  "vacc3_ontime" = "Child vaccination schedule 3 received on time?",
  "On-time" = "On time", 
  "Delayed" = "Delayed",
  "vacc4" = "Child vaccination schedule 4 received?",
  "No" = "No",
  "Yes" = "Yes",
  "vacc4_ontime" = "Child vaccination schedule 4 received on time?",
  "On-time" = "On time", 
  "Delayed" = "Delayed",
  "Stunting_10w" = "Stunting at 10 weeks (Height-for-age Z-score < -2)",
  "No" = "No",
  "Yes" = "Yes",
  "Underweight_10w" = "Underweight at 10 weeks (Weight-for-age Z-score < -2)",
  "No" = "No",
  "Yes" = "Yes",
  "Wasting_10w" = "Wasting at 10 weeks (Weight-for-length Z-score < -2)",
  "No" = "No",
  "Yes" = "Yes",
  "Stunting_2y" = "Stunting at 2 years (Height-for-age Z-score < -2)",
  "No" = "No",
  "Yes" = "Yes",
  "Underweight_2y" = "Underweight at 2 years (Weight-for-age Z-score < -2)",
  "No" = "No",
  "Yes" = "Yes",
  "Wasting_2y" = "Wasting at 2 years (Weight-for-length Z-score < -2)",
  "No" = "No",
  "Yes" = "Yes",
  "Stunting_6y" = "Stunting at 6 years (Height-for-age Z-score < -2)",
  "No" = "No",
  "Yes" = "Yes",
  "Underweight_6y" = "Underweight at 6 years (Weight-for-age Z-score < -2)",
  "No" = "No",
  "Yes" = "Yes",
  "Wasting_6y" = "Wasting at 6 years (Weight-for-length Z-score < -2)",
  "No" = "No",
  "Yes" = "Yes",
  "CD4_nadir" = "Maternal lowest CD4 cell count during pregnancy", 
  ">500 cells/mm³" = ">500 cells/mm³", 
  "<=500 cells/mm³" = "<=500 cells/mm³",
  "VL" = "Maternal highest viral load during pregnancy", 
  "Low levels detectable" = "Low levels detectable", 
  "40 to 1000 copies/mL" = "40 to 1000 copies/mL", 
  ">1000 copies/mL" = ">1000 copies/mL",
  "ARV_initiation_timepoint" = "Maternal ARV initiation timepoint",
  "Pre pregnancy" = "Before pregnancy", 
  "During pregnancy" = "During pregnancy",
  "ART" = "Maternal ART regimen",
  "3TC/AZT/EFV" = "Lamivudine + Zidovudine + Efavirenz",
  "3TC/AZT/KAL" = "Lamivudine + Zidovudine + Kaletra",
  "3TC/AZT/NVP" = "Lamivudine + Zidovudine + Nevirapine",
  "3TC/EFV/TDF" = "Lamivudine + Efavirenz + Tenofovir",
  "3TC/NVP/TDF" = "Lamivudine + Nevirapine + Tenofovir",
  "AZT" = "Zidovudine monotherapy",
  "AZT//" = "AZT//",
  "AZT/KAL/OTH" = "Zidovudine + Kaletra + Other drugs",
  "FDC" = "FDC",
  "FDC//" = "FDC//",
  "HIV_arv_treatment_v1" = "HIV ARV treatment (v1)",
  "FDC or TDF + 3TC + EF" = "Fixed-dose combination", 
  "AZT" = "Zidovudine monotherapy",
  "OTHERS" = "Others",
  "HIV_arv_treatment_v2" = "HIV ARV treatment (v2)",
  "First line(NNRTI + 2NRTIs)" = "First line (NNRTI + 2NRTIs)", 
  "Second line(PI-containing)" = "Second line (PI-containing)",
  "PMTCT/AZT monotherapy" = "PMTCT/AZT monotherapy",
  "Bactrim" = "Bactrim prophylaxis",
  "Yes" = "Yes", 
  "No" = "No",
  "Dont know" = "Don't know",
  "Infant_prophylaxis" = "Infant ARV prophylaxis",
  "NVP//" = "Nevirapine monotherapy", 
  "NVP/AZT/" = "Nevirapine + Zidovudine"
)

# Replace variable names in the table
DCHS_DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical_table$Variable <- 
  levels_to_rename[DCHS_DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical_table$Variable]

rownames(DCHS_DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical_table) <- NULL

# Create kable 
DCHS_DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical_kable <- kable(DCHS_DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical_table, "html") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
  column_spec(column = 4, bold = !is.na(DCHS_DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical_table$`Chi-squared P value`) & 
                DCHS_DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical_table$`Chi-squared P value` < 0.05) %>%
  column_spec(column = 5, bold = !is.na(DCHS_DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical_table$`Fisher P value`) & 
                DCHS_DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical_table$`Fisher P value` < 0.05)

DCHS_DCHS_sociodem_6yr_categorical_kable
```

## **Serum marker data normality** 
[Go back to index](#top)

**Histograms**

You can **hover over the data** with your cursor to see individual values.

*Maternal serum markers*

```{r}
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_plots <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal %>% gather(Markers, Levels, 48:65)
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_histogram <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_plots, aes(x=Levels)) + 
    geom_histogram(binwidth=0.25)+geom_density(aes(y=0.25*after_stat(count))) +
    theme_classic() + 
    ggtitle("Maternal serum marker levels, pg/mL") + 
    facet_wrap(~Markers, scales = "free") + ylab("Count")  
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_histogram <- ggplotly(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_histogram)
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_histogram

  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_scaled <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal # Scale data
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_scaled[,48:65] <- log(DCHS_biomarker_maternal[,48:65])
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_plots_scaled <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_scaled %>% gather(Markers, Levels, 48:65)
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_histogram <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_plots_scaled, aes(x=Levels)) + 
    geom_histogram(binwidth=0.25)+geom_density(aes(y=0.25*after_stat(count))) +
    theme_classic() + 
    ggtitle("Maternal serum marker levels, log(pg/mL)") + 
    facet_wrap(~Markers, scales = "free") + ylab("Count")  
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_histogram <- ggplotly(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_histogram)
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_histogram
```

<br>

**Shapiro-Wilk test**

```{r, message=FALSE}
  shapiro_maternal <- lapply(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_scaled[,48:65], # Shapiro tests for maternal markers
                        function(x) shapiro_test(x))
  
  shapiro_maternal <- bind_rows(shapiro_maternal, .id = "Markers") %>%
  select(Markers, statistic, p.value) %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0("Maternal ", .), -Markers)
  
  shapiro_infant <- lapply(DCHS_biomarker_infant_scaled[,48:65], # Shapiro tests for infant markers
                     function(x) shapiro_test(x))
  
  shapiro_infant <- bind_rows(shapiro_infant, .id = "Markers") %>%
  select(Markers, statistic, p.value) %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0("Infant ", .), -Markers)
  
  shapiro_2yr <- lapply(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_scaled[,48:65], # Shapiro tests for child 2yr markers
                  function(x) shapiro_test(x))
  
  shapiro_2yr <- bind_rows(shapiro_2yr, .id = "Markers") %>%
  select(Markers, statistic, p.value) %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0("2yr ", .), -Markers)
  
  shapiro_3yr <- lapply(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_scaled[,48:65], # Shapiro tests for child 3yr markers
                  function(x) shapiro_test(x))
  
  shapiro_3yr <- bind_rows(shapiro_3yr, .id = "Markers") %>%
  select(Markers, statistic, p.value) %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0("2yr ", .), -Markers)
  
  shapiro_5yr <- lapply(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_scaled[,48:65], # Shapiro tests for child 5yr markers
                  function(x) shapiro_test(x))
  
  shapiro_5yr <- bind_rows(shapiro_5yr, .id = "Markers") %>%
  select(Markers, statistic, p.value) %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0("2yr ", .), -Markers)
  
  combined_shapiro <- bind_cols(shapiro_maternal, shapiro_infant, shapiro_2yr, shapiro_3yr, shapiro_5yr) # Combine all tables into one
  names(combined_shapiro) <- c("Maternal markers", "Maternal statistic", "Maternal P-value",
                              "Infant markers", "Infant statistic", "Infant P-value",
                              "Markers 2yr", "Statistic 2yr", "P-value 2yr",
                              "Markers 3yr", "Statistic 3yr", "P-value 3yr",
                              "Markers 5yr", "Statistic 5yr", "P-value 5yr")
  
  combined_shapiro_table <- kable(combined_shapiro, "html") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
      column_spec(column = 3, bold = combined_shapiro$`Maternal P-value` < 0.05) %>%
      column_spec(column = 6, bold = combined_shapiro$`Infant P-value` < 0.05) %>%
      column_spec(column = 9, bold = combined_shapiro$`P-value 2yr` < 0.05) %>%
      column_spec(column = 12, bold = combined_shapiro$`P-value 3yr` < 0.05) %>%
      column_spec(column = 15, bold = combined_shapiro$`P-value 5yr` < 0.05)
  
  combined_shapiro_table
  
  shapiro_maternal_results <- c("M_IFNg", "M_IL1b", "M_IL2", "M_IL5", "M_IL6", "M_IL7", "M_IL8", "M_TNFa",
                                "M_IL4", "M_IL10", "M_IL12p70", "M_IL13", 
                                "M_YKL40")
  shapiro_infant_results <- c("I6_GM_CSF", "I6_IFNg", "I6_IL1b", "I6_IL2", "I6_IL5", "I6_IL6", "I6_IL7", "I6_IL8", "I6_TNFa",
                              "I6_IL4",  "I6_IL10", "I6_IL12p70", "I6_IL13", 
                              "I6_Lcn2", "I6_MMP9", "I6_YKL40")
  shapiro_2yr_results <- c("I24_IL1b", "I24_IL2", "I24_IL5", "I24_IL6", "I24_IL8", "I24_TNFa",
                           "I24_IL4", "I24_IL10", "I24_IL12p70", 
                           "I24_MMP9", "I24_YKL40")
  shapiro_3yr_results <- c("I36_IFNg", "I36_IL2", "I36_IL5", "I36_IL7", "I36_IL8", "I36_TNFa", 
                           "I36_IL10", "I36_IL13", 
                           "I36_YKL40") # Should I include IL-4 and CD14?
  shapiro_5yr_results <- c("I60_IFNg", "I60_IL1b", "I60_IL2", "I60_IL5", "I60_IL7", "I60_IL8", "I60_TNFa",
                           "I60_IL10", 
                           "I60_CD163", "I60_Lcn2", "I60_YKL40") # Should I include IL-6, IL-12 and IL-13?
```

<br>

**Results**

After log-transforming the data, **the following markers show a non-normal distribution**:

*Maternal markers*

After conducting a visual inspection of the corresponding histograms, I agree with the test results, **except for** M_IL5, M_TNFa, M_YKL40.

```{r}
print(shapiro_maternal_results)
```

<br>

*Infant markers*

After conducting a visual inspection of the corresponding histograms, I agree with the test results, **except for** I6_TNFa, I6_YKL40.

```{r}
print(shapiro_infant_results)
```

<br>

*Child markers at 2 years of age*

After conducting a visual inspection of the corresponding histograms, I agree with the test results, **except for** I24_IL6, I24_IL10, I24_TNFa.

```{r}
print(shapiro_2yr_results)
```

<br>

*Child markers at 3 years of age*

After conducting a visual inspection of the corresponding histograms, I agree with the test results, **except for** I36_TNFa. Another observation is that I36_IL4 and I36_CD14 appear as non-significant when visually they'd probably be...

```{r}
print(shapiro_3yr_results)
```

<br>

*Child markers at 5 years of age*

After conducting a visual inspection of the corresponding histograms, I agree with the test results, **except for** I60_IFNg. Another observation is that I60_IL6, I60_IL12 and I60_IL13 appear as non-significant when visually they'd probably be...

```{r}
print(shapiro_5yr_results)
```

<br>

**Final decision on data not meeting assumptions of normality**

```{r, message=FALSE}
  shapiro_maternal_results <- c("M_IFNg", "M_IL1b", "M_IL2", "M_IL6", "M_IL7", "M_IL8", 
                                "M_IL4", "M_IL10", "M_IL12p70", "M_IL13")
  shapiro_infant_results <- c("I6_GM_CSF", "I6_IFNg", "I6_IL1b", "I6_IL2", "I6_IL5", "I6_IL6", "I6_IL7", "I6_IL8", 
                              "I6_IL4",  "I6_IL10", "I6_IL12p70", "I6_IL13", 
                              "I6_Lcn2", "I6_MMP9")
  shapiro_2yr_results <- c("I24_IL1b", "I24_IL2", "I24_IL5", "I24_IL8", 
                           "I24_IL4", "I24_IL12p70", 
                           "I24_MMP9", "I24_YKL40")
  shapiro_3yr_results <- c("I36_IFNg", "I36_IL2", "I36_IL5", "I36_IL7", "I36_IL8",
                           "I36_IL4", "I36_IL10", "I36_IL13", 
                           "I36_CD14", "I36_YKL40")
  shapiro_5yr_results <- c("I60_IL1b", "I60_IL2", "I60_IL5", "I60_IL6", "I60_IL7", "I60_IL8", "I60_TNFa",
                           "I60_IL10", "I60_IL12p70", "I60_IL13",
                           "I60_CD163", "I60_Lcn2", "I60_YKL40")
```

## **Simple analysis of serum marker levels** 
[Go back to index](#top)

### **Research question #1**

In our DCHS sub-cohort of N=268 children who underwent neuroimaging at age 6-7 years… 

- Are maternal serum markers altered in pregnant women living with HIV, compared to women not with HIV? 

- At any timepoint (age 6 weeks, 2, 3, 5 years), are peripheral blood levels of any serum marker altered in CHEU, compared to CHU? 

### **Hypothesis #1**
Peripheral blood levels of pro- and anti-inflammatory cytokines are significantly altered in pregnant women living with HIV, compared to their peers. Peripheral blood levels of neuroinflammatory serum markers, and markers of monocyte activation, are significantly altered in CHEU at age 6 weeks and 2 years, compared to CHU. 

#### **Maternal markers**
[Go back to index](#top)

Summary statistics

```{r}
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_reshaped <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal %>% gather(Marker, Levels, 48:65)

# Calculate summary statistics for each marker and group
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_summary_table <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_reshaped %>%
    group_by(maternal_hiv, Marker) %>%
    summarise(Mean = mean(Levels), SD = sd(Levels), Median = median(Levels), IQR = IQR(Levels), .groups = "drop")

# Pivot the data to have separate columns for each maternal_hiv
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_summary_table_wide <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_summary_table %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = maternal_hiv, values_from = c("Mean", "SD", "Median", "IQR"))
```

<br>

*t*-test for normally-distributed data

```{r}
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Ttest_analysis <- map_df(names(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_scaled)[48:65], function(x) {
    f <- as.formula(paste(x, '~ maternal_hiv'))
    t_test(data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_scaled, formula = f, p.adjust.method = "BH", detailed = TRUE) %>%
      mutate(Marker = x)
  })
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Ttest_analysis$p.adj <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Ttest_analysis$p, 
                                                           method = "BH") # Calculate adjusted p-values
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Ttest_analysis <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Ttest_analysis %>%
    select(Marker, group1, n1, group2, n2, estimate, conf.low, conf.high, p, p.adj)
  
# Filter according to final normality results, run t-test only on normally-distributed marker levels
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_summary_table_wide_ttest <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_summary_table_wide %>%
    filter(!Marker %in% shapiro_maternal_results)
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL <- left_join(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_summary_table_wide_ttest,
                                                 DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Ttest_analysis, 
                                                 by = "Marker")
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !c(p, p.adj), ~ round(.x, 2))) # Round decimals
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL$NegMoms <- 
    paste(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL$`Median_HIV negative`,
          "(", DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL$`IQR_HIV negative`, ")", "(n=",
          DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL$n1, ")")

  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL$PosMoms <- 
    paste(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL$`Median_HIV positive`,
          "(", DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL$`IQR_HIV positive`, ")", "(n=",
          DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL$n2, ")")

  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL %>%
    select(Marker, NegMoms, PosMoms, estimate, conf.low, conf.high, p, p.adj)
  names(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL) <- c("Marker", "HIV- moms", "HIV+ moms", 
                                                        "Effect size", "95% CI (low)", "95% CI (high)", 
                                                        "P value", "BH-corrected P") # Tidy table 

# Rename markers
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL$Marker <- factor(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL$Marker, 
                           levels = c("M_GM_CSF",
                                      "M_IL5",
                                      "M_TNFa",
                                      "M_CD14",
                                      "M_CD163",
                                      "M_Lcn2",
                                      "M_MMP9",
                                      "M_YKL40"
                                    ))

  maternal_biomarker_rename <- c(
    "M_GM_CSF" = "GM-CSF",
    "M_IL5" = "IL-5",
    "M_TNFa" = "TNFα",
    "M_CD14" = "CD14",
    "M_CD163" = "CD163",
    "M_Lcn2" = "NGAL",
    "M_MMP9" = "MMP-9",
    "M_YKL40" = "YKL-40"
  )
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL <-DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL %>%
    mutate(Marker = recode(Marker, !!!maternal_biomarker_rename))
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL %>%
    arrange(Marker)
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL <- kable(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL, "html") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
      column_spec(column = 7, bold = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL$`P value` < 0.05) %>%
      column_spec(column = 8, bold = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL$`BH-corrected P` < 0.05) 
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ttest_ALL 
```

<br>

Data is presented as mean ±SD per each group.

*Results*

After Benjamini-Hochberg (BH) adjustment:

- Levels of pro-inflammatory cytokine **GM-CSF** and neuroinflammatory markers **NGAL** and **MMP-9** are **significantly lower in pregnant women living with HIV** compared with their peers

- Levels of monocyte activation marker **CD14** are **significantly higher in pregnant women living with HIV** compared to their peers

<br>

Wilcoxon Rank-Sum Test (Mann-Whitney U Test) for not normally-distributed data

```{r}
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_analysis <- map_df(names(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_scaled)[48:65], function(x) {
    f <- as.formula(paste(x, '~ maternal_hiv'))
    wilcox_test(data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_scaled, formula = f, detailed = TRUE) %>%
      mutate(Marker = x)
  })
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_analysis$p.adj <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_analysis$p, 
                                                              method = "BH") # Calculate adjusted p-values
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_analysis <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_analysis %>%
    select(Marker, group1, n1, group2, n2, estimate, conf.low, conf.high, p, p.adj)
  
# Filter according to final normality results, run t-test only on normally-distributed marker levels
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_summary_table_wide_Wilcoxon <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_summary_table_wide %>%
    filter(Marker %in% shapiro_maternal_results)
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL <- left_join(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_summary_table_wide_Wilcoxon,
                                                 DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_analysis, 
                                                 by = "Marker")
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !c(p, p.adj), ~ round(.x, 2))) # Round decimals
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL$NegMoms <- 
    paste(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL$`Median_HIV negative`,
          "(", DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL$`IQR_HIV negative`, ")", "(n=",
          DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL$n1, ")")

  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL$PosMoms <- 
    paste(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL$`Median_HIV positive`,
          "(", DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL$`IQR_HIV positive`, ")", "(n=",
          DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL$n2, ")")

  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL %>%
    select(Marker, NegMoms, PosMoms, estimate, conf.low, conf.high, p, p.adj)
  names(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL) <- c("Marker", "HIV- moms", "HIV+ moms", 
                                                        "Median difference", "95% CI (low)", "95% CI (high)", 
                                                        "P value", "BH-corrected P") # Tidy table 

# Rename markers
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL$Marker <- factor(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL$Marker, 
                           levels = c("M_IFNg",
                                      "M_IL1b",
                                      "M_IL2",
                                      "M_IL6",
                                      "M_IL7",
                                      "M_IL8",
                                      "M_IL4",
                                      "M_IL10",
                                      "M_IL12p70",
                                      "M_IL13"
                                    ))

maternal_biomarker_rename <- c(
  "M_IFNg" = "IFNγ",
  "M_IL1b" = "IL-1β",
  "M_IL2" = "IL-2",
  "M_IL6" = "IL-6",
  "M_IL7" = "IL-7",
  "M_IL8" = "IL-8",
  "M_IL4" = "IL-4",
  "M_IL10" = "IL-10",
  "M_IL12p70" = "IL-12p70",
  "M_IL13" = "IL-13"
)
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL <-DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL %>%
    mutate(Marker = recode(Marker, !!!maternal_biomarker_rename))
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL %>%
    arrange(Marker)
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL <- kable(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL, "html") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
      column_spec(column = 7, bold = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL$`P value` < 0.05) %>%
      column_spec(column = 8, bold = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL$`BH-corrected P` < 0.05) 
  
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_Wilcoxon_ALL 
```

<br>

Data is presented as median (IQR) per each group.

*Results*

Prior to BH adjustment, levels of anti-inflammatory cytokine **IL-13** are **significantly lower in pregnant women living with HIV** compared to their peers. However, these results did not hold after multiple comparison correction.

<br>

Plots

```{r}
specific_colors <- c("#ff8552", "#009a88")

DCHS_biomarker_maternal_filtered <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_plots %>%
  group_by(Markers) %>%
  mutate(
    med = median(Levels, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = IQR(Levels, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = med - 3 * iqr,
    upper = med + 3 * iqr
  ) %>%
  filter(Levels >= lower & Levels <= upper) %>%
  select(-med, -iqr, -lower, -upper) %>%
  ungroup()

DCHS_biomarker_maternal_boxplots <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_filtered

DCHS_biomarker_maternal_boxplots <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_boxplots %>% 
  mutate(Markers = recode(Markers,
    "M_GM_CSF" = "bold('GM-CSF')~'(pg/mL)'",
    "M_IFNg" = "bold('IFNγ')~'(pg/mL)'",
    "M_IL1b" = "bold('IL-1β')~'(pg/mL)'",
    "M_IL2" = "bold('IL-2')~'(pg/mL)'",
    "M_IL5" = "bold('IL-5')~'(pg/mL)'",
    "M_IL6" = "bold('IL-6')~'(pg/mL)'",
    "M_IL7" = "bold('IL-7')~'(pg/mL)'",
    "M_IL8" = "bold('IL-8')~'(pg/mL)'",
    "M_TNFa" = "bold('TNFα')~'(pg/mL)'",
    "M_IL4" = "bold('IL-4')~'(pg/mL)'",
    "M_IL10" = "bold('IL-10')~'(pg/mL)'",
    "M_IL12p70" = "bold('IL-12p70')~'(pg/mL)'",
    "M_IL13" = "bold('IL-13')~'(pg/mL)'",
    "M_CD14" = "bold('CD14')~'(ng/mL)'",
    "M_CD163" = "bold('CD163')~'(ng/mL)'",
    "M_Lcn2" = "bold('NGAL')~'(ng/mL)'",
    "M_MMP9" = "bold('MMP-9')~'(ng/mL)'",
    "M_YKL40" = "bold('YKL-40')~'(ng/mL)'"
  ))

annot_df <- data.frame(
  Markers = c("bold('GM-CSF')~'(pg/mL)'", 
              "bold('IL-13')~'(pg/mL)'", 
              "bold('CD14')~'(ng/mL)'", 
              "bold('NGAL')~'(ng/mL)'", 
              "bold('MMP-9')~'(ng/mL)'"),
  y.position = c(160, 20, 3500, 470, 3000),
  annotation = c("**", "*", "***", "**", "****")
)

x_start <- 1
x_end <- 2
x_middle <- (x_start + x_end) / 2

DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ggbopxplot <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_boxplots %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = Levels, x = maternal_hiv, color = maternal_hiv, fill = maternal_hiv)) +
  facet_wrap(~Markers, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3, labeller = label_parsed) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.25), size = 2, alpha = 0.4, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_boxplot(lwd = 0.75, outlier.shape = NA, color = "black", alpha = 0.5, width = .1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  ylab("") + xlab("Maternal HIV status") + scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Negative", "Positive")) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_blank()
  ) +
  ggtitle("Maternal serum marker levels during pregnancy") +
  scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) 

manual_brackets <- geom_segment(
  data = annot_df,
  aes(
    x = x_start,
    xend = x_end,
    y = y.position,
    yend = y.position,
    group = Markers
  ),
  inherit.aes = FALSE,
  color = "black",
  linewidth = 0.6
)

manual_asterisks <- geom_text(
  data = annot_df,
  aes(
    x = x_middle,
    y = y.position,
    label = annotation,
    group = Markers
  ),
  inherit.aes = FALSE,
  fontface = "bold",
  vjust = -0.05
)

DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ggbopxplot <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_ggbopxplot + manual_brackets + manual_asterisks

```
