## **School readiness**: Early Learning Outcome Measures (ELOM) 
[Go back to index](#top)

Summary statistics

```{r}
DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_reshaped <- DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr %>% gather(ELOM, Scores, 195:200)

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_summary_table <- DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_reshaped %>%
  group_by(maternal_hiv, ELOM) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean = mean(Scores, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sd(Scores, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median = median(Scores, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = IQR(Scores, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_summary_table_wide <- DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_summary_table %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = maternal_hiv, values_from = c("Mean", "SD", "Median", "IQR"))

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_histogram <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_reshaped, aes(x=Scores)) + 
    geom_histogram(binwidth=0.25)+geom_density(aes(y=0.25*after_stat(count))) +
    theme_classic() + 
    ggtitle("ELOM at 6-7 years | Histogram") + 
    facet_wrap(~ELOM, scales = "free") + ylab("Count")  
DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_histogram
```

<br>

*t*-test for normally-distributed data

```{r}
DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Ttest_analysis <- map_df(names(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr)[195:200], function(x) {
  f <- as.formula(paste(x, '~ maternal_hiv'))
  t_test(data = DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr, formula = f, p.adjust.method = "BH", detailed = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(ELOM = x)
})

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Ttest_analysis$p.adj <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Ttest_analysis$p, 
                                                         method = "BH") # Calculate adjusted p-values

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Ttest_analysis <- DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Ttest_analysis %>%
  select(ELOM, group1, n1, group2, n2, estimate, conf.low, conf.high, p, p.adj)

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL <- left_join(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_summary_table_wide,
                                               DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Ttest_analysis, 
                                               by = "ELOM")
DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL <- DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !c(p, p.adj), ~ round(.x, 2))) # Round decimals

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL$NegMoms <- 
  paste(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL$`Mean_HIV negative`,
        "±", DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL$`SD_HIV negative`, "(n=",
        DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL$n1, ")")

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL$PosMoms <- 
  paste(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL$`Mean_HIV positive`,
        "±", DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL$`SD_HIV positive`, "(n=",
        DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL$n2, ")")

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL <- DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL %>%
  select(ELOM, NegMoms, PosMoms, estimate, conf.low, conf.high, p, p.adj)
names(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL) <- c("ELOM", "HIV- moms", "HIV+ moms", 
                                                      "Effect size", "95% CI (low)", "95% CI (high)", 
                                                      "P value", "BH-corrected P") # Tidy table 

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL <- kable(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL, "html") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
    column_spec(column = 7, bold = DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL$`P value` < 0.05) %>%
    column_spec(column = 8, bold = DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL$`BH-corrected P` < 0.05) 

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ttest_ALL 
```

<br>

Data is presented as mean ±SD per each group.

<br>

Wilcoxon Rank-Sum Test (Mann-Whitney U Test) for not normally-distributed data

```{r}
DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_analysis <- map_df(names(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr)[195:200], function(x) {
  f <- as.formula(paste(x, '~ maternal_hiv'))
  wilcox_test(data = DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr, formula = f, detailed = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(ELOM = x)
})

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_analysis$p.adj <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_analysis$p, 
                                                            method = "BH") # Calculate adjusted p-values

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_analysis <- DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_analysis %>%
  select(ELOM, group1, n1, group2, n2, estimate, conf.low, conf.high, p, p.adj)

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL <- left_join(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_summary_table_wide,
                                               DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_analysis, 
                                               by = "ELOM")

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL <- DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !c(p, p.adj), ~ round(.x, 2))) # Round decimals

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL$NegMoms <- 
  paste(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL$`Median_HIV negative`,
        "(", DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL$`IQR_HIV negative`, ")", "(n=",
        DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL$n1, ")")

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL$PosMoms <- 
  paste(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL$`Median_HIV positive`,
        "(", DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL$`IQR_HIV positive`, ")", "(n=",
        DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL$n2, ")")

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL <- DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL %>%
  select(ELOM, NegMoms, PosMoms, estimate, conf.low, conf.high, p, p.adj)
names(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL) <- c("ELOM", "HIV- moms", "HIV+ moms", 
                                                      "Median difference", "95% CI (low)", "95% CI (high)", 
                                                      "P value", "BH-corrected P") # Tidy table

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL <- DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL %>%
  arrange(ELOM)

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL <- kable(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL, "html") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
    column_spec(column = 7, bold = DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL$`P value` < 0.05) %>%
    column_spec(column = 8, bold = DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL$`BH-corrected P` < 0.05) 

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_ELOM_Wilcoxon_ALL 
```

<br>

Data is presented as median (IQR) per each group.

## **Associations between serum marker levels and neurometabolite ratios** 
[Go back to index](#top)

### **Research question #3**
In the subsets of children for which good quality MRS data is available in the parietal grey and white matter regions, are there any associations between serum marker levels and individual metabolite ratios in any brain region in CHEU, compared to CHU?  

### **Hypothesis #3**
Levels of maternal pro- and anti-inflammatory cytokines during pregnancy are associated with (A) myo-inositol levels in the parietal white matter and (B) glutamate levels in the parietal grey matter in CHEU, but not CHU. Child levels of neuroinflammatory serum markers and serum markers of monocyte activation (at multiple timepoints) are associated with myo-inositol levels in the parietal white matter in CHEU, but not CHU. 

<br>

#### **Maternal serum marker concentrations and neurometabolite levels** 
[Go back to index](#top)

Linear regressions with robust standard errors and BH correction for multiple comparisons. 

##### **Parietal grey matter - ratios to total creatine** 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=153 participants** (**54 CHEU**, **99 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(M_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", "Myoinositol_ratios", "NAA_ratios", "Choline_ratios")
  
  maternal_marker_list <- list("M_GM_CSF", "M_IFNg", "M_IL1b", "M_IL2", "M_IL5", 
                                  "M_IL6", "M_IL7", "M_IL8", "M_TNFa", "M_IL4", "M_IL10", 
                                  "M_IL12p70", "M_IL13", "M_CD14", "M_CD163", "M_Lcn2", "M_MMP9", "M_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in maternal_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables maternal pgm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables maternal pgm ratios/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
# Data visualization | Loop through each neurometabolite
  specific_colors <- c("#ff8552", "#009a88")

  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plots_output_directory <- "C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers/Parietal grey matter ratios/"
  
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) { 
    
  # Loop through each immune marker
    for (immune_column in maternal_marker_list) {
      
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_plots <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "* maternal_hiv"))
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plots <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_plots, 
                                                     data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios)
      
    # Create a sequence of immune marker values for plotting
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_maternal_immune_values <- seq(min(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios[[immune_column]]),
                                                                    max(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios[[immune_column]]), 
                                                                    length.out = 100)
      
    # Create a data frame for prediction
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_pred_df <- data.frame(maternal_hiv = rep(levels(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios$maternal_hiv), 
                                                                                       each = length(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_maternal_immune_values)))
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_pred_df[[immune_column]] <- rep(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_maternal_immune_values, 
                                                                         times = length(levels(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios$maternal_hiv)))
      
    # Add neurometabolite column to the data frame
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_pred_df[[neuro_column]] <- predict(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plots, 
                                                                            newdata = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_pred_df)
      
    # Construct the full path for saving the plot
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_fullpath <- paste(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plots_output_directory, 
                                                        "interaction_plot_", neuro_column, "_", immune_column, ".png", sep = "")
      
    # Plot the interaction
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plotsFINAL <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios, 
                                                              aes(x = !!as.name(immune_column), 
                                                                  y = !!as.name(neuro_column), 
                                                                  color = maternal_hiv)) +
        geom_point() +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +  
        labs(title = paste("Interaction Plot: ", neuro_column, " and ", immune_column),
             x = immune_column,
             y = neuro_column) +
        scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
        theme_classic() +  
        theme(
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),  
          text = element_text(face = "bold")  
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv) +
        guides(color=FALSE)
      
    # Save the plot 
      # ggsave(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_fullpath, plot = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plotsFINAL, height = 3, width = 5)
    }
  }
```

<br>

###### *Glutamate ratios*
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  Maternal_pgm_ratios_Glu_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables maternal pgm ratios/Glutamate_ratios_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  Maternal_pgm_ratios_Glu_parsed <- read_html(paste(Maternal_pgm_ratios_Glu_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Maternal_pgm_ratios_Glu_data <- html_table(Maternal_pgm_ratios_Glu_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Maternal_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Maternal_pgm_ratios_Glu_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Maternal_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  Maternal_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Maternal_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

No significant associations between maternal HIV status, maternal serum marker levels during pregnancy, and child glutamate ratios in the parietal grey matter at age 6-7 years.

```{r}
Maternal_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable
```

<br>

###### *Total choline ratios*
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  Maternal_pgm_ratios_tCho_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables maternal pgm ratios/Choline_ratios_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  Maternal_pgm_ratios_tCho_parsed <- read_html(paste(Maternal_pgm_ratios_tCho_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Maternal_pgm_ratios_tCho_data <- html_table(Maternal_pgm_ratios_tCho_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Maternal_pgm_ratios_tCho_data_kable <- Maternal_pgm_ratios_tCho_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Maternal_pgm_ratios_tCho_data_kable$Term)
  
  Maternal_pgm_ratios_tCho_data_kable <- Maternal_pgm_ratios_tCho_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

Results:

- **IL-6**: Serum levels of this maternal **pro-inflammatory cytokine** during pregnancy are **positively associated** with child **total choline ratios** at age 6-7 years in the **HU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0148). The association is significantly modified by maternal HIV (uncorrected p=0.0429), but it does not survive correction for multiple comparisons.

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers/Parietal grey matter ratios/interaction_plot_Choline_ratios_M_IL6.png){width="100%"}

- **IL-4**: Serum levels of this maternal **anti-inflammatory cytokine** during pregnancy are **positively associated** with child **total choline ratios** at age 6-7 years in the **HU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0208). The association is significantly modified by maternal HIV (BH-corrected p=0.0207). 

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers/Parietal grey matter ratios/interaction_plot_Choline_ratios_M_IL4.png){width="100%"}

- **MMP-9**: Serum levels of this maternal neuroinflammatory serum marker during pregnancy are **positively associated** with child **total choline ratios** in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected interaction p=0.0275).

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers/Parietal grey matter ratios/interaction_plot_Choline_ratios_M_MMP9.png){width="100%"}

```{r}
Maternal_pgm_ratios_tCho_data_kable
```

##### **Parietal grey matter - absolute concentrations** (mM) 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=148 participants** (**54 CHEU**, **94 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(M_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  filter(!is.na(`GPC+PCh`))

DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  rename(Glutamate_abs = `Glu`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_abs = `Ins`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  rename(NAA_abs = `NAA`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  rename(Choline_abs = `GPC+PCh`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  rename(Creatine_abs = `Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_abs_list <- c("Glutamate_abs", "Myoinositol_abs", "NAA_abs", "Choline_abs", "Creatine_abs")
  
  maternal_marker_list <- list("M_GM_CSF", "M_IFNg", "M_IL1b", "M_IL2", "M_IL5", 
                                  "M_IL6", "M_IL7", "M_IL8", "M_TNFa", "M_IL4", "M_IL10", 
                                  "M_IL12p70", "M_IL13", "M_CD14", "M_CD163", "M_Lcn2", "M_MMP9", "M_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in maternal_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables maternal pgm mM", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables maternal pgm mM/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
# Data visualization | Loop through each neurometabolite
  specific_colors <- c("#ff8552", "#009a88")

  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_plots_output_directory <- "C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers/Parietal grey matter mM/"
  
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    
  # Loop through each immune marker
    for (immune_column in maternal_marker_list) {
      
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_plots <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "* maternal_hiv"))
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_plots <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_plots, 
                                                     data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs)
      
    # Create a sequence of immune marker values for plotting
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_maternal_immune_values <- seq(min(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs[[immune_column]]),
                                                                    max(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs[[immune_column]]), 
                                                                    length.out = 100)
      
    # Create a data frame for prediction
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_pred_df <- data.frame(maternal_hiv = rep(levels(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs$maternal_hiv), 
                                                                                       each = length(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_maternal_immune_values)))
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_pred_df[[immune_column]] <- rep(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_maternal_immune_values, 
                                                                         times = length(levels(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs$maternal_hiv)))
      
    # Add neurometabolite column to the data frame
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_pred_df[[neuro_column]] <- predict(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_plots, 
                                                                            newdata = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_pred_df)
      
    # Construct the full path for saving the plot
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_fullpath <- paste(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_plots_output_directory, 
                                                        "interaction_plot_", neuro_column, "_", immune_column, ".png", sep = "")
      
    # Plot the interaction
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_plotsFINAL <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs, 
                                                              aes(x = !!as.name(immune_column), 
                                                                  y = !!as.name(neuro_column), 
                                                                  color = maternal_hiv)) +
        geom_point() +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +  
        labs(title = paste("Interaction Plot: ", neuro_column, " and ", immune_column),
             x = immune_column,
             y = neuro_column) +
        scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
        theme_classic() +  
        theme(
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),  
          text = element_text(face = "bold")  
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv) +
        guides(color=FALSE)
      
    # Save the plot 
      # ggsave(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_fullpath, plot = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_plotsFINAL, height = 3, width = 5)
    }
  }
```

##### **Parietal white matter - ratios to total creatine** 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=132 participants** (**44 CHEU**, **88 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(M_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", "Myoinositol_ratios", "NAA_ratios", "Choline_ratios")
  
  maternal_marker_list <- list("M_GM_CSF", "M_IFNg", "M_IL1b", "M_IL2", "M_IL5", 
                                  "M_IL6", "M_IL7", "M_IL8", "M_TNFa", "M_IL4", "M_IL10", 
                                  "M_IL12p70", "M_IL13", "M_CD14", "M_CD163", "M_Lcn2", "M_MMP9", "M_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in maternal_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables maternal pwm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables maternal pwm ratios/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
# Data visualization | Loop through each neurometabolite
  specific_colors <- c("#ff8552", "#009a88")

  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plots_output_directory <- "C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers/Parietal white matter ratios/"
  
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    
  # Loop through each immune marker
    for (immune_column in maternal_marker_list) {
      
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_plots <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "* maternal_hiv"))
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plots <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_plots, 
                                                     data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios)
      
    # Create a sequence of immune marker values for plotting
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_maternal_immune_values <- seq(min(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios[[immune_column]]),
                                                                    max(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios[[immune_column]]), 
                                                                    length.out = 100)
      
    # Create a data frame for prediction
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_pred_df <- data.frame(maternal_hiv = rep(levels(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios$maternal_hiv), 
                                                                                       each = length(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_maternal_immune_values)))
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_pred_df[[immune_column]] <- rep(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_maternal_immune_values, 
                                                                         times = length(levels(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios$maternal_hiv)))
      
    # Add neurometabolite column to the data frame
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_pred_df[[neuro_column]] <- predict(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plots, 
                                                                            newdata = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_pred_df)
      
    # Construct the full path for saving the plot
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_fullpath <- paste(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plots_output_directory, 
                                                        "interaction_plot_", neuro_column, "_", immune_column, ".png", sep = "")
      
    # Plot the interaction
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plotsFINAL <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios, 
                                                              aes(x = !!as.name(immune_column), 
                                                                  y = !!as.name(neuro_column), 
                                                                  color = maternal_hiv)) +
        geom_point() +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +  
        labs(title = paste("Interaction Plot: ", neuro_column, " and ", immune_column),
             x = immune_column,
             y = neuro_column) +
        scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
        theme_classic() +  
        theme(
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),  
          text = element_text(face = "bold")  
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv) +
        guides(color=FALSE)
      
    # Save the plot 
      # ggsave(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_fullpath, plot = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plotsFINAL, height = 3, width = 5)
    }
  }
```

###### *Glutamate ratios*
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  Maternal_pwm_ratios_Glu_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables maternal pwm ratios/Glutamate_ratios_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  Maternal_pwm_ratios_Glu_parsed <- read_html(paste(Maternal_pwm_ratios_Glu_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Maternal_pwm_ratios_Glu_data <- html_table(Maternal_pwm_ratios_Glu_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Maternal_pwm_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Maternal_pwm_ratios_Glu_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Maternal_pwm_ratios_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  Maternal_pwm_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Maternal_pwm_ratios_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

Results:

- **IL-8**: Serum levels of this maternal **pro-inflammatory cytokine** during pregnancy are **negatively associated** with child **glutamate ratios** at age 6-7 years in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected interaction p=0.0015).

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers/Parietal white matter ratios/interaction_plot_Glutamate_ratios_M_IL8.png){width="100%"}

- **IL-13**: Serum levels of this maternal **anti-inflammatory cytokine** during pregnancy are **negatively associated** with child **glutamate ratios** at age 6-7 years in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected interaction p=0.0196).

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers/Parietal white matter ratios/interaction_plot_Glutamate_ratios_M_IL13.png){width="100%"}

```{r}
Maternal_pwm_ratios_Glu_data_kable
```

##### **Parietal white matter - absolute concentrations** (mM) 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=67 participants** (**13 CHEU**, **54 CHU**). Therefore, we must acknowledge that our ability to draw conclusions from this statistically underpowered subset is very limited.

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_flexible_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(M_GM_CSF))

DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs %>%
  rename(Glutamate_abs = `Glu`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_abs = `Ins`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs %>%
  rename(NAA_abs = `NAA`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs %>%
  rename(Choline_abs = `GPC+PCh`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs %>%
  rename(Creatine_abs = `Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_abs_list <- c("Glutamate_abs", "Myoinositol_abs", "NAA_abs", "Choline_abs", "Creatine_abs")
  
  maternal_marker_list <- list("M_GM_CSF", "M_IFNg", "M_IL1b", "M_IL2", "M_IL5", 
                                  "M_IL6", "M_IL7", "M_IL8", "M_TNFa", "M_IL4", "M_IL10", 
                                  "M_IL12p70", "M_IL13", "M_CD14", "M_CD163", "M_Lcn2", "M_MMP9", "M_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in maternal_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables maternal pwm mM", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables maternal pwm mM/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
# Data visualization | Loop through each neurometabolite

  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_plots_output_directory <- "C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers/Parietal white matter mM/"

      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_pred_df <- data.frame(maternal_hiv = rep(levels(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs$maternal_hiv), 
                                                                                       each = length(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_maternal_immune_values)))
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_pred_df[[immune_column]] <- rep(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_maternal_immune_values, 
                                                                         times = length(levels(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs$maternal_hiv)))
      
    # Add neurometabolite column to the data frame
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_pred_df[[neuro_column]] <- predict(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_plots, 
                                                                            newdata = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_pred_df)
      
    # Construct the full path for saving the plot
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_fullpath <- paste(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_plots_output_directory, 
                                                        "interaction_plot_", neuro_column, "_", immune_column, ".png", sep = "")
      
    # Plot the interaction
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_plotsFINAL <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs, 
                                                              aes(x = !!as.name(immune_column), 
                                                                  y = !!as.name(neuro_column), 
                                                                  color = maternal_hiv)) +
        geom_point() +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +  
        labs(title = paste("Interaction Plot: ", neuro_column, " and ", immune_column),
             x = immune_column,
             y = neuro_column) +
        scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
        theme_classic() +  
        theme(
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),  
          text = element_text(face = "bold")  
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv) +
        guides(color=FALSE)
      
    # Save the plot 
      # ggsave(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_fullpath, plot = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_plotsFINAL, height = 3, width = 5)
    }
  }
```

###### *Glutamate mM*
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  Maternal_pwm_abs_Glu_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables maternal pwm mM/Glutamate_abs_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  Maternal_pwm_abs_Glu_parsed <- read_html(paste(Maternal_pwm_abs_Glu_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Maternal_pwm_abs_Glu_data <- html_table(Maternal_pwm_abs_Glu_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Maternal_pwm_abs_Glu_data_kable <- Maternal_pwm_abs_Glu_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Maternal_pwm_abs_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  Maternal_pwm_abs_Glu_data_kable <- Maternal_pwm_abs_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

Results:

- **IL-13**: Serum levels of this maternal **anti-inflammatory cytokine** during pregnancy are **negatively associated** with child **glutamate concentrations** at age 6-7 years in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected interaction p=0.0064).

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers/Parietal white matter mM/interaction_plot_Glutamate_abs_M_IL13.png){width="100%"}

- **CD163**: Serum levels of this maternal **monocyte activation marker** during pregnancy are **negatively associated** with child **glutamate concentrations** at age 6-7 years in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected interaction p=0.0229).

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers/Parietal white matter mM/interaction_plot_Glutamate_abs_M_CD163.png){width="100%"}

```{r}
Maternal_pwm_abs_Glu_data_kable
```

#### **Infant serum marker concentrations and neurometabolite levels** 
[Go back to index](#top)

Linear regressions with robust standard errors and BH correction for multiple comparisons. 

##### **Parietal grey matter - ratios to total creatine** 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=115 participants** (**40 CHEU**, **75 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(I6_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", "Myoinositol_ratios", "NAA_ratios", "Choline_ratios")
  
  infant_marker_list <- list("I6_GM_CSF", "I6_IFNg", "I6_IL1b", "I6_IL2", "I6_IL5", 
                                  "I6_IL6", "I6_IL7", "I6_IL8", "I6_TNFa", "I6_IL4", "I6_IL10", 
                                  "I6_IL12p70", "I6_IL13", "I6_CD14", "I6_CD163", "I6_Lcn2", "I6_MMP9", "I6_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in infant_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables infant pgm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables infant pgm ratios/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
# Data visualization | Loop through each neurometabolite
  specific_colors <- c("#ff8552", "#009a88")

  DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plots_output_directory <- "C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Infant markers/Parietal grey matter ratios/"
  
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    
  # Loop through each immune marker
    for (immune_column in infant_marker_list) {
      
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_plots <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "* maternal_hiv"))
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plots <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_plots, 
                                                     data = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios)
      
    # Create a sequence of immune marker values for plotting
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_infant_immune_values <- seq(min(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           max(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           length.out = 100)
      
    # Create a data frame for prediction
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_pred_df <- data.frame(maternal_hiv = rep(levels(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios$maternal_hiv), 
                                                                                       each = length(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_infant_immune_values)))
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_pred_df[[immune_column]] <- rep(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_infant_immune_values, 
                                                                         times = length(levels(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios$maternal_hiv)))
      
    # Add neurometabolite column to the data frame
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_pred_df[[neuro_column]] <- predict(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plots, 
                                                                            newdata = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_pred_df)
      
    # Construct the full path for saving the plot
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_fullpath <- paste(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plots_output_directory, 
                                                        "interaction_plot_", neuro_column, "_", immune_column, ".png", sep = "")
      
    # Plot the interaction
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plotsFINAL <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios, 
                                                              aes(x = !!as.name(immune_column), 
                                                                  y = !!as.name(neuro_column), 
                                                                  color = maternal_hiv)) +
        geom_point() +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +  
        labs(title = paste("Interaction Plot: ", neuro_column, " and ", immune_column),
             x = immune_column,
             y = neuro_column) +
        scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
        theme_classic() +  
        theme(
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),  
          text = element_text(face = "bold")  
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv) +
        guides(color=FALSE)
      
    # Save the plot 
      # ggsave(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_fullpath, plot = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plotsFINAL, height = 3, width = 5)
    }
  }
```

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  Infant_pgm_ratios_Glu_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables infant pgm ratios/Glutamate_ratios_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  Infant_pgm_ratios_Glu_parsed <- read_html(paste(Infant_pgm_ratios_Glu_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Infant_pgm_ratios_Glu_data <- html_table(Infant_pgm_ratios_Glu_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Infant_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Infant_pgm_ratios_Glu_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Infant_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  Infant_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Infant_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

No significant associations were found between maternal HIV status, infant serum marker levels at 6 weeks, and child glutamate ratios in the parietal grey matter at age 6-7 years.

```{r}
Infant_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable
```

<br>

###### *Myo-inositol ratios*

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  Infant_pgm_ratios_Ins_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables infant pgm ratios/Myoinositol_ratios_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Infant_pgm_ratios_Ins_data <- html_table(Infant_pgm_ratios_Ins_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Infant_pgm_ratios_Ins_data_kable <- Infant_pgm_ratios_Ins_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"

```

Results:

- **CD14**: Serum levels of this infant **monocyte activation marker** at 6 weeks are **negatively associated** with child **myo-inositol ratios** at age 6-7 years in the **HU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0004). The association is significantly modified by maternal HIV (BH-corrected p=0.0017). 

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Infant markers/Parietal grey matter ratios/interaction_plot_Myoinositol_ratios_I6_CD14.png){width="100%"}

```{r}
Infant_pgm_ratios_Ins_data_kable
```

##### **Parietal grey matter - absolute concentrations** (mM) 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=110 participants** (**40 CHEU**, **70 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(I6_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  filter(!is.na(`GPC+PCh`))

DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  rename(Glutamate_abs = `Glu`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_abs = `Ins`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  rename(NAA_abs = `NAA`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  rename(Choline_abs = `GPC+PCh`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  rename(Creatine_abs = `Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_abs_list <- c("Glutamate_abs", "Myoinositol_abs", "NAA_abs", "Choline_abs", "Creatine_abs")
  
  infant_marker_list <- list("I6_GM_CSF", "I6_IFNg", "I6_IL1b", "I6_IL2", "I6_IL5", 
                                  "I6_IL6", "I6_IL7", "I6_IL8", "I6_TNFa", "I6_IL4", "I6_IL10", 
                                  "I6_IL12p70", "I6_IL13", "I6_CD14", "I6_CD163", "I6_Lcn2", "I6_MMP9", "I6_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in infant_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables infant pgm mM", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables infant pgm mM/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
# Data visualization | Loop through each neurometabolite
  specific_colors <- c("#ff8552", "#009a88")

  DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_plots_output_directory <- "C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Infant markers/Parietal grey matter mM/"
  
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    
  # Loop through each immune marker
    for (immune_column in infant_marker_list) {
      
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_plots <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "* maternal_hiv"))
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_plots <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_plots, 
                                                     data = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs)
      
    # Create a sequence of immune marker values for plotting
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_infant_immune_values <- seq(min(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           max(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           length.out = 100)
      
    # Create a data frame for prediction
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_pred_df <- data.frame(maternal_hiv = rep(levels(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs$maternal_hiv), 
                                                                                       each = length(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_infant_immune_values)))
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_pred_df[[immune_column]] <- rep(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_infant_immune_values, 
                                                                         times = length(levels(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs$maternal_hiv)))
      
    # Add neurometabolite column to the data frame
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_pred_df[[neuro_column]] <- predict(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_plots, 
                                                                            newdata = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_pred_df)
      
    # Construct the full path for saving the plot
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_fullpath <- paste(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_plots_output_directory, 
                                                        "interaction_plot_", neuro_column, "_", immune_column, ".png", sep = "")
      
    # Plot the interaction
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_plotsFINAL <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs, 
                                                              aes(x = !!as.name(immune_column), 
                                                                  y = !!as.name(neuro_column), 
                                                                  color = maternal_hiv)) +
        geom_point() +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +  
        labs(title = paste("Interaction Plot: ", neuro_column, " and ", immune_column),
             x = immune_column,
             y = neuro_column) +
        scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
        theme_classic() +  
        theme(
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),  
          text = element_text(face = "bold")  
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv) +
        guides(color=FALSE)
      
    # Save the plot 
      # ggsave(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_fullpath, plot = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_plotsFINAL, height = 3, width = 5)
    }
  }
```

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  Infant_pgm_abs_tCho_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables infant pgm mM/Choline_abs_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  Infant_pgm_abs_tCho_parsed <- read_html(paste(Infant_pgm_abs_tCho_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Infant_pgm_abs_tCho_data <- html_table(Infant_pgm_abs_tCho_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Infant_pgm_abs_tCho_data_kable <- Infant_pgm_abs_tCho_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Infant_pgm_abs_tCho_data_kable$Term)
  
  Infant_pgm_abs_tCho_data_kable <- Infant_pgm_abs_tCho_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

Results:

- **IL-4**: Serum levels of this infant **anti-inflammatory cytokine** at 6 weeks are **negatively associated** with child **N-acetyl-aspartate ratios** at age 6-7 years in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected interaction p=0.0382).

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Infant markers/Parietal grey matter mM/interaction_plot_Choline_abs_I6_IL4.png){width="100%"}

```{r}
Infant_pgm_abs_tCho_data_kable
```
