##### **Parietal white matter - ratios to total creatine** 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=100 participants** (**33 CHEU**, **67 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(I6_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", "Myoinositol_ratios", "NAA_ratios", "Choline_ratios")
  
  infant_marker_list <- list("I6_GM_CSF", "I6_IFNg", "I6_IL1b", "I6_IL2", "I6_IL5", 
                                  "I6_IL6", "I6_IL7", "I6_IL8", "I6_TNFa", "I6_IL4", "I6_IL10", 
                                  "I6_IL12p70", "I6_IL13", "I6_CD14", "I6_CD163", "I6_Lcn2", "I6_MMP9", "I6_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in infant_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables infant pwm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables infant pwm ratios/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
# Data visualization | Loop through each neurometabolite
  specific_colors <- c("#ff8552", "#009a88")

  DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plots_output_directory <- "C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Infant markers/Parietal white matter ratios/"
  
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    
  # Loop through each immune marker
    for (immune_column in infant_marker_list) {
      
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_plots <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "* maternal_hiv"))
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plots <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_plots, 
                                                     data = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios)
      seq(min(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           max(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           length.out = 100)
    # Create a sequence of immune marker values for plotting
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_infant_immune_values <- seq(min(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           max(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           length.out = 100)
      
    # Create a data frame for prediction
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_pred_df <- data.frame(maternal_hiv = rep(levels(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios$maternal_hiv), 
                                                                                       each = length(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_infant_immune_values)))
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_pred_df[[immune_column]] <- rep(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_infant_immune_values, 
                                                                         times = length(levels(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios$maternal_hiv)))
      
    # Add neurometabolite column to the data frame
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_pred_df[[neuro_column]] <- predict(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plots, 
                                                                            newdata = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_pred_df)
      
    # Construct the full path for saving the plot
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_fullpath <- paste(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plots_output_directory, 
                                                        "interaction_plot_", neuro_column, "_", immune_column, ".png", sep = "")
      
    # Plot the interaction
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plotsFINAL <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios, 
                                                              aes(x = !!as.name(immune_column), 
                                                                  y = !!as.name(neuro_column), 
                                                                  color = maternal_hiv)) +
        geom_point() +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +  
        labs(title = paste("Interaction Plot: ", neuro_column, " and ", immune_column),
             x = immune_column,
             y = neuro_column) +
        scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
        theme_classic() +  
        theme(
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),  
          text = element_text(face = "bold")  
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv) +
        guides(color=FALSE)
      
    # Save the plot 
      # ggsave(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_fullpath, plot = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plotsFINAL, height = 3, width = 5)
    }
  }
```

##### **Parietal white matter - absolute concentrations** (mM) 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=54 participants** (**10 CHEU**, **44 CHU**). Therefore, we must acknowledge that our ability to draw conclusions from this statistically underpowered subset is very limited.

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_flexible_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(I6_GM_CSF))

DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs %>%
  rename(Glutamate_abs = `Glu`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_abs = `Ins`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs %>%
  rename(NAA_abs = `NAA`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs %>%
  rename(Choline_abs = `GPC+PCh`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs %>%
  rename(Creatine_abs = `Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_abs_list <- c("Glutamate_abs", "Myoinositol_abs", "NAA_abs", "Choline_abs", "Creatine_abs")
  
  infant_marker_list <- list("I6_GM_CSF", "I6_IFNg", "I6_IL1b", "I6_IL2", "I6_IL5", 
                                  "I6_IL6", "I6_IL7", "I6_IL8", "I6_TNFa", "I6_IL4", "I6_IL10", 
                                  "I6_IL12p70", "I6_IL13", "I6_CD14", "I6_CD163", "I6_Lcn2", "I6_MMP9", "I6_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in infant_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables infant pwm mM", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables infant pwm mM/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
# Data visualization | Loop through each neurometabolite
  specific_colors <- c("#ff8552", "#009a88")

  DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_plots_output_directory <- "C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Infant markers/Parietal white matter mM/"
  
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    
  # Loop through each immune marker
    for (immune_column in infant_marker_list) {
      
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_plots <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "* maternal_hiv"))
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_plots <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_plots, 
                                                     data = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs)
      
    # Create a sequence of immune marker values for plotting
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_infant_immune_values <- seq(min(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           max(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           length.out = 100)
      
    # Create a data frame for prediction
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_pred_df <- data.frame(maternal_hiv = rep(levels(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs$maternal_hiv), 
                                                                                       each = length(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_infant_immune_values)))
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_pred_df[[immune_column]] <- rep(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_infant_immune_values, 
                                                                         times = length(levels(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs$maternal_hiv)))
      
    # Add neurometabolite column to the data frame
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_pred_df[[neuro_column]] <- predict(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_plots, 
                                                                            newdata = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_pred_df)
      
    # Construct the full path for saving the plot
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_fullpath <- paste(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_plots_output_directory, 
                                                        "interaction_plot_", neuro_column, "_", immune_column, ".png", sep = "")
      
    # Plot the interaction
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_plotsFINAL <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs, 
                                                              aes(x = !!as.name(immune_column), 
                                                                  y = !!as.name(neuro_column), 
                                                                  color = maternal_hiv)) +
        geom_point() +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +  
        labs(title = paste("Interaction Plot: ", neuro_column, " and ", immune_column),
             x = immune_column,
             y = neuro_column) +
        scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
        theme_classic() +  
        theme(
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),  
          text = element_text(face = "bold")  
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv) +
        guides(color=FALSE)
      
    # Save the plot 
      # ggsave(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_fullpath, plot = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_plotsFINAL, height = 3, width = 5)
    }
  }
```

###### *Glutamate mM*
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  Infant_pwm_abs_Glu_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables infant pwm mM/Glutamate_abs_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  Infant_pwm_abs_Glu_parsed <- read_html(paste(Infant_pwm_abs_Glu_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Infant_pwm_abs_Glu_data <- html_table(Infant_pwm_abs_Glu_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Infant_pwm_abs_Glu_data_kable <- Infant_pwm_abs_Glu_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Infant_pwm_abs_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  Infant_pwm_abs_Glu_data_kable <- Infant_pwm_abs_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

Results:

- **NGAL**: Levels of this infant **serum neuroinflammatory marker** at 6 weeks are **negatively associated** with child **glutamate concentrations** at age 6-7 years in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected interaction p=0.0141). *But judging by the plot, I do not trust these results at all...*

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Infant markers/Parietal white matter mM/interaction_plot_Glutamate_abs_I6_Lcn2.png){width="100%"}

- **MMP-9**: Levels of this infant **serum neuroinflammatory marker** at 6 weeks are **negatively associated** with child **glutamate concentrations** at age 6-7 years in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected interaction p=0.0448). *But judging by the plot, I do not trust these results at all...*

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Infant markers/Parietal white matter mM/interaction_plot_Glutamate_abs_I6_MMP9.png){width="100%"}

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Infant markers/Parietal white matter mM/interaction_plot_NAA_abs_I6_IL4.png){width="100%"}

- **NGAL**: Levels of this infant **serum neuroinflammatory marker** at 6 weeks are **negatively associated** with child **N-acetyl-aspartate concentrations** at age 6-7 years in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0009). *But judging by the plot, I do not trust these results at all...*

#### **Child serum marker concentrations and neurometabolite levels at age 2 years** 
[Go back to index](#top)

Linear regressions with robust standard errors and BH correction for multiple comparisons. 

##### **Parietal grey matter - ratios to total creatine** 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=119 participants** (**39 CHEU**, **80 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(I24_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", "Myoinositol_ratios", "NAA_ratios", "Choline_ratios")
  
  child_2yr_marker_list <- list("I24_GM_CSF", "I24_IFNg", "I24_IL1b", "I24_IL2", "I24_IL5", 
                                  "I24_IL6", "I24_IL7", "I24_IL8", "I24_TNFa", "I24_IL4", "I24_IL10", 
                                  "I24_IL12p70", "I24_IL13", "I24_CD14", "I24_CD163", "I24_Lcn2", "I24_MMP9", "I24_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in child_2yr_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables child 2yr pgm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables child 2yr pgm ratios/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
# Data visualization | Loop through each neurometabolite
  specific_colors <- c("#ff8552", "#009a88")

  DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plots_output_directory <- "C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child markers 2yr/Parietal grey matter ratios/"
  
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    
  # Loop through each immune marker
    for (immune_column in child_2yr_marker_list) {
      
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_plots <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "* maternal_hiv"))
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plots <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_plots, 
                                                     data = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios)
      
    # Create a sequence of immune marker values for plotting
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_2yr_immune_values <- seq(min(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           max(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           length.out = 100)
      
    # Create a data frame for prediction
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_pred_df <- data.frame(maternal_hiv = rep(levels(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios$maternal_hiv), 
                                                                                       each = length(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_2yr_immune_values)))
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_pred_df[[immune_column]] <- rep(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_2yr_immune_values, 
                                                                         times = length(levels(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios$maternal_hiv)))
      
    # Add neurometabolite column to the data frame
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_pred_df[[neuro_column]] <- predict(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plots, 
                                                                            newdata = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_pred_df)
      
    # Construct the full path for saving the plot
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_fullpath <- paste(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plots_output_directory, 
                                                        "interaction_plot_", neuro_column, "_", immune_column, ".png", sep = "")
      
    # Plot the interaction
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plotsFINAL <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios, 
                                                              aes(x = !!as.name(immune_column), 
                                                                  y = !!as.name(neuro_column), 
                                                                  color = maternal_hiv)) +
        geom_point() +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +  
        labs(title = paste("Interaction Plot: ", neuro_column, " and ", immune_column),
             x = immune_column,
             y = neuro_column) +
        scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
        theme_classic() +  
        theme(
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),  
          text = element_text(face = "bold")  
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv) +
        guides(color=FALSE)
      
    # Save the plot 
      # ggsave(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_fullpath, plot = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plotsFINAL, height = 3, width = 5)
    }
  }
```

###### *Glutamate ratios*
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  Child_2yr_pgm_ratios_Glu_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables child 2yr pgm ratios/Glutamate_ratios_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  Child_2yr_pgm_ratios_Glu_parsed <- read_html(paste(Child_2yr_pgm_ratios_Glu_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Child_2yr_pgm_ratios_Glu_data <- html_table(Child_2yr_pgm_ratios_Glu_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Child_2yr_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Child_2yr_pgm_ratios_Glu_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Child_2yr_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  Child_2yr_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Child_2yr_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

No significant associations were found between maternal HIV status, child serum marker levels at 2 years, and child glutamate ratios in the parietal grey matter at age 6-7 years.

```{r}
Child_2yr_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable
```

##### **Parietal grey matter - absolute concentrations** (mM) 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=115 participants** (**39 CHEU**, **76 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(I24_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  filter(!is.na(`GPC+PCh`))

DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  rename(Glutamate_abs = `Glu`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_abs = `Ins`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  rename(NAA_abs = `NAA`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  rename(Choline_abs = `GPC+PCh`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs %>%
  rename(Creatine_abs = `Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_abs_list <- c("Glutamate_abs", "Myoinositol_abs", "NAA_abs", "Choline_abs", "Creatine_abs")
  
  child_2yr_marker_list <- list("I24_GM_CSF", "I24_IFNg", "I24_IL1b", "I24_IL2", "I24_IL5", 
                                  "I24_IL6", "I24_IL7", "I24_IL8", "I24_TNFa", "I24_IL4", "I24_IL10", 
                                  "I24_IL12p70", "I24_IL13", "I24_CD14", "I24_CD163", "I24_Lcn2", "I24_MMP9", "I24_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in child_2yr_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables child 2yr pgm mM", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables child 2yr pgm mM/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
    # Plot the interaction
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_plotsFINAL <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs, 
                                                              aes(x = !!as.name(immune_column), 
                                                                  y = !!as.name(neuro_column), 
                                                                  color = maternal_hiv)) +
        geom_point() +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +  
        labs(title = paste("Interaction Plot: ", neuro_column, " and ", immune_column),
             x = immune_column,
             y = neuro_column) +
        scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
        theme_classic() +  
        theme(
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),  
          text = element_text(face = "bold")  
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv) +
        guides(color=FALSE)
      
    # Save the plot 
      # ggsave(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_fullpath, plot = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_lm_plotsFINAL, height = 3, width = 5)
    }
  }
```

<br>

###### *Glutamate mM*
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  Child_2yr_pgm_abs_Glu_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables child 2yr pgm mM/Glutamate_abs_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  Child_2yr_pgm_abs_Glu_parsed <- read_html(paste(Child_2yr_pgm_abs_Glu_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Child_2yr_pgm_abs_Glu_data <- html_table(Child_2yr_pgm_abs_Glu_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Child_2yr_pgm_abs_Glu_data_kable <- Child_2yr_pgm_abs_Glu_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Child_2yr_pgm_abs_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  Child_2yr_pgm_abs_Glu_data_kable <- Child_2yr_pgm_abs_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

Results:

- **CD14**: Serum levels of this child **monocyte activation marker** at 2 years are **negatively associated** with child **glutamate concentrations** at age 6-7 years in the **HU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0049).

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child markers 2yr/Parietal grey matter mM/interaction_plot_Glutamate_abs_I24_CD14.png){width="100%"}

```{r}

```

Results:

- **TNFα**: Serum levels of this child **pro-inflammatory cytokine** at 2 years are **positively associated** with child **myo-inositol concentrations** at age 6-7 years in the **HU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0298). The association is significantly modified by maternal HIV (BH-corrected p=0.0142).

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child markers 2yr/Parietal grey matter mM/interaction_plot_Myoinositol_abs_I24_TNFa.png){width="100%"}

- **CD14**: Serum levels of this child **monocyte activation marker** at 2 years are **negatively associated** with child **myo-inositol concentrations** at age 6-7 years in the **HU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0132). 

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child markers 2yr/Parietal grey matter mM/interaction_plot_Myoinositol_abs_I24_CD14.png){width="100%"}

##### **Parietal white matter - ratios to total creatine** 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=104 participants** (**32 CHEU**, **72 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(I24_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", "Myoinositol_ratios", "NAA_ratios", "Choline_ratios")
  
  child_2yr_marker_list <- list("I24_GM_CSF", "I24_IFNg", "I24_IL1b", "I24_IL2", "I24_IL5", 
                                  "I24_IL6", "I24_IL7", "I24_IL8", "I24_TNFa", "I24_IL4", "I24_IL10", 
                                  "I24_IL12p70", "I24_IL13", "I24_CD14", "I24_CD163", "I24_Lcn2", "I24_MMP9", "I24_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in child_2yr_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables child 2yr pwm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables child 2yr pwm ratios/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
# Data visualization | Loop through each neurometabolite
  specific_colors <- c("#ff8552", "#009a88")

  DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plots_output_directory <- "C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child markers 2yr/Parietal white matter ratios/"
  
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    
  # Loop through each immune marker
    for (immune_column in child_2yr_marker_list) {
      
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_plots <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "* maternal_hiv"))
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plots <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_plots, 
                                                     data = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios)
      seq(min(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           max(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           length.out = 100)
    # Create a sequence of immune marker values for plotting
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_2yr_immune_values <- seq(min(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           max(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           length.out = 100)
      
    # Create a data frame for prediction
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_pred_df <- data.frame(maternal_hiv = rep(levels(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios$maternal_hiv), 
                                                                                       each = length(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_2yr_immune_values)))
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_pred_df[[immune_column]] <- rep(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_2yr_immune_values, 
                                                                         times = length(levels(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios$maternal_hiv)))
      
    # Add neurometabolite column to the data frame
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_pred_df[[neuro_column]] <- predict(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plots, 
                                                                            newdata = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_pred_df)
      
    # Construct the full path for saving the plot
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_fullpath <- paste(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plots_output_directory, 
                                                        "interaction_plot_", neuro_column, "_", immune_column, ".png", sep = "")
      
    # Plot the interaction
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plotsFINAL <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios, 
                                                              aes(x = !!as.name(immune_column), 
                                                                  y = !!as.name(neuro_column), 
                                                                  color = maternal_hiv)) +
        geom_point() +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +  
        labs(title = paste("Interaction Plot: ", neuro_column, " and ", immune_column),
             x = immune_column,
             y = neuro_column) +
        scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
        theme_classic() +  
        theme(
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),  
          text = element_text(face = "bold")  
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv) +
        guides(color=FALSE)
      
    # Save the plot 
      # ggsave(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_fullpath, plot = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_lm_plotsFINAL, height = 3, width = 5)
    }
  }
```

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  Child_2yr_pwm_ratios_Glu_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables child 2yr pwm ratios/Glutamate_ratios_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  Child_2yr_pwm_ratios_Glu_parsed <- read_html(paste(Child_2yr_pwm_ratios_Glu_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Child_2yr_pwm_ratios_Glu_data <- html_table(Child_2yr_pwm_ratios_Glu_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Child_2yr_pwm_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Child_2yr_pwm_ratios_Glu_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Child_2yr_pwm_ratios_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  Child_2yr_pwm_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Child_2yr_pwm_ratios_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

Results:

- **IL-13**: Serum levels of this child **anti-inflammatory cytokine** at 2 years are **positively associated** with child **glutamate ratios** at age 6-7 years in the **HU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0254). The association is significantly modified by maternal HIV (BH-corrected p=0.0111).

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child markers 2yr/Parietal white matter ratios/interaction_plot_Glutamate_ratios_I24_IL13.png){width="100%"}

```{r}
Child_2yr_pwm_ratios_Glu_data_kable
```

##### **Parietal white matter - absolute concentrations** (mM) 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=55 participants** (**10 CHEU**, **45 CHU**). Therefore, we must acknowledge that our ability to draw conclusions from this statistically underpowered subset is very limited.

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_flexible_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(I24_GM_CSF))

DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs %>%
  rename(Glutamate_abs = `Glu`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_abs = `Ins`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs %>%
  rename(NAA_abs = `NAA`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs %>%
  rename(Choline_abs = `GPC+PCh`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs %>%
  rename(Creatine_abs = `Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_abs_list <- c("Glutamate_abs", "Myoinositol_abs", "NAA_abs", "Choline_abs", "Creatine_abs")
  
  child_2yr_marker_list <- list("I24_GM_CSF", "I24_IFNg", "I24_IL1b", "I24_IL2", "I24_IL5", 
                                  "I24_IL6", "I24_IL7", "I24_IL8", "I24_TNFa", "I24_IL4", "I24_IL10", 
                                  "I24_IL12p70", "I24_IL13", "I24_CD14", "I24_CD163", "I24_Lcn2", "I24_MMP9", "I24_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in child_2yr_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables child 2yr pwm mM", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables child 2yr pwm mM/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
# Data visualization | Loop through each neurometabolite
  specific_colors <- c("#ff8552", "#009a88")

  DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_plots_output_directory <- "C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child markers 2yr/Parietal white matter mM/"
  
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    
  # Loop through each immune marker
    for (immune_column in child_2yr_marker_list) {
      
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_plots <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "* maternal_hiv"))
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_plots <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_plots, 
                                                     data = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs)
      
    # Create a sequence of immune marker values for plotting
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_2yr_immune_values <- seq(min(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           max(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           length.out = 100)
      
    # Create a data frame for prediction
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_pred_df <- data.frame(maternal_hiv = rep(levels(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs$maternal_hiv), 
                                                                                       each = length(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_2yr_immune_values)))
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_pred_df[[immune_column]] <- rep(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_2yr_immune_values, 
                                                                         times = length(levels(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs$maternal_hiv)))
      
    # Add neurometabolite column to the data frame
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_pred_df[[neuro_column]] <- predict(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_plots, 
                                                                            newdata = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_pred_df)
      
    # Construct the full path for saving the plot
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_fullpath <- paste(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_plots_output_directory, 
                                                        "interaction_plot_", neuro_column, "_", immune_column, ".png", sep = "")
      
    # Plot the interaction
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_plotsFINAL <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs, 
                                                              aes(x = !!as.name(immune_column), 
                                                                  y = !!as.name(neuro_column), 
                                                                  color = maternal_hiv)) +
        geom_point() +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +  
        labs(title = paste("Interaction Plot: ", neuro_column, " and ", immune_column),
             x = immune_column,
             y = neuro_column) +
        scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
        theme_classic() +  
        theme(
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),  
          text = element_text(face = "bold")  
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv) +
        guides(color=FALSE)
      
    # Save the plot 
      # ggsave(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_fullpath, plot = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_lm_plotsFINAL, height = 3, width = 5)
    }
  }
```

Results:

- **IFN-γ**: Serum levels of this child **pro-inflammatory cytokine** at 2 years are **negatively associated** with child **glutamate concentrations** at age 6-7 years in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected interaction p=0.0182). *But judging by the plot, I do not trust these results at all...*

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child markers 2yr/Parietal white matter mM/interaction_plot_Glutamate_abs_I24_IFNg.png){width="100%"}

- **IL-7**: Serum levels of this child **anti-inflammatory cytokine** at 2 years are **negatively associated** with child **glutamate concentrations** at age 6-7 years in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected interaction p=0.0168).

```{r}
# Mutate and rename columns

                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05,
```

```{r}
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Child_2yr_pwm_abs_NAA_data_kable$Term)
  
  Child_2yr_pwm_abs_NAA_data_kable <- Child_2yr_pwm_abs_NAA_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

After correcting for multiple comparisons, no significant associations were found between maternal HIV status, child serum marker levels at 2 years, and child N-acetyl-aspartate concentrations in the parietal white matter at age 6-7 years.

```{r}
Child_2yr_pwm_abs_NAA_data_kable
```

#### **Child serum marker concentrations and neurometabolite levels at age 3 years** 
[Go back to index](#top)

Linear regressions with robust standard errors and BH correction for multiple comparisons. 

##### **Parietal grey matter - ratios to total creatine** 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=110 participants** (**38 CHEU**, **72 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(I36_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", "Myoinositol_ratios", "NAA_ratios", "Choline_ratios")
  
  maternal_marker_list <- list("I36_GM_CSF", "I36_IFNg", "I36_IL1b", "I36_IL2", "I36_IL5", 
                                  "I36_IL6", "I36_IL7", "I36_IL8", "I36_TNFa", "I36_IL4", "I36_IL10", 
                                  "I36_IL12p70", "I36_IL13", "I36_CD14", "I36_CD163", "I36_Lcn2", "I36_MMP9", "I36_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in maternal_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables child 3yr pgm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables child 3yr pgm ratios/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
# Data visualization | Loop through each neurometabolite
  specific_colors <- c("#ff8552", "#009a88")

  DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plots_output_directory <- "C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child markers 3yr/Parietal grey matter ratios/"
  
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    
  # Loop through each immune marker
    for (immune_column in maternal_marker_list) {
      
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_lm_plots <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "* maternal_hiv"))
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plots <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_lm_plots, 
                                                     data = DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios)
      
    # Create a sequence of immune marker values for plotting
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_3yr_immune_values <- seq(min(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           max(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios[[immune_column]], 
                                                                               na.rm = TRUE),
                                                                           length.out = 100)
      
    # Create a data frame for prediction
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_pred_df <- data.frame(maternal_hiv = rep(levels(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios$maternal_hiv), 
                                                                                       each = length(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_3yr_immune_values)))
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_pred_df[[immune_column]] <- rep(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_3yr_immune_values, 
                                                                         times = length(levels(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios$maternal_hiv)))
      
    # Add neurometabolite column to the data frame
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_pred_df[[neuro_column]] <- predict(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plots, 
                                                                            newdata = DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_pred_df)
      
    # Construct the full path for saving the plot
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_fullpath <- paste(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plots_output_directory, 
                                                        "interaction_plot_", neuro_column, "_", immune_column, ".png", sep = "")
      
    # Plot the interaction
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plotsFINAL <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios, 
                                                              aes(x = !!as.name(immune_column), 
                                                                  y = !!as.name(neuro_column), 
                                                                  color = maternal_hiv)) +
        geom_point() +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +  
        labs(title = paste("Interaction Plot: ", neuro_column, " and ", immune_column),
             x = immune_column,
             y = neuro_column) +
        scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
        theme_classic() +  
        theme(
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),  
          text = element_text(face = "bold")  
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv) +
        guides(color=FALSE)
      
    # Save the plot 
      # ggsave(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_fullpath, plot = DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_lm_plotsFINAL, height = 3, width = 5)
    }
  }
```
