## **Associations between serum marker trajectories** from 6 weeks to 5 years **and neurometabolite levels** at 6-7 years
[Go back to index](#top)

### **Research question #1**
Are child peripheral blood serum marker trajectories from 6 weeks to 5 years of age associated with neurometabolite levels in the parietal grey and white matter at age 6–7 years in HEU compared to HU children?  

### **Hypothesis #1**
Child trajectories of neuroinflammatory & monocyte activation markers from birth to age 5 years are significantly associated with (a) myo-inositol levels in the left parietal white matter and (b) glutamate levels in the parietal grey matter at age 6–7 years in HEU compared to HU children. 

### Extraction of child-specific trajectory variables from LMMs 

To assess whether individual trajectories of child serum marker levels were associated with neurometabolite outcomes at 6-7 years, we derived child-specific trajectory features from the linear mixed-effects models. Time was modelled continuously (in years, centred at the mean follow-up age), and we allowed for linear, quadratic, and cubic time effects.  

From these models, we extracted the best linear unbiased predictions (BLUPs) for each child, which represent their deviation from the population-average curve. By combining fixed effects and BLUPs, we obtained child-specific coefficients describing the linear slope (instantaneous rate of change at the mean follow-up age), as well as quadratic and cubic terms that capture non-linear aspects of marker level changes. We also calculated the model-based average slope between 6 weeks and 5 years as a summary measure of overall change.

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
time_map_years <- c(I6 = 6/52, I24 = 2, I36 = 3, I60 = 5)
t_center <- mean(unname(time_map_years))  ## time as numeric, centered

dat_long <- DCHS_biomarker_trajectories_all_scaled_long %>%
  mutate(
    maternal_hiv = droplevels(maternal_hiv),
    time_years   = unname(time_map_years[as.character(Timepoint)]),
    t_c          = time_years - t_center
  )

fit_poly_lmm <- function(df) {

  form_full <- Levels ~ t_c + I(t_c^2) + I(t_c^3) + maternal_hiv +
    t_c:maternal_hiv + I(t_c^2):maternal_hiv + I(t_c^3):maternal_hiv +
    (1 + t_c + I(t_c^2) + I(t_c^3) | pid_child)

  ctrl <- lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 1e5))

  mod <- try(suppressWarnings(lmer(form_full, data = df, REML = TRUE, control = ctrl)), silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(mod, "try-error")) {
    message("Cubic RE failed; trying quadratic RE...")
    form_quad <- update(form_full, . ~ . - (1 + t_c + I(t_c^2) + I(t_c^3) | pid_child) +
                          (1 + t_c + I(t_c^2) | pid_child))
    mod <- try(suppressWarnings(lmer(form_quad, data = df, REML = TRUE, control = ctrl)), silent = TRUE)
  }
  if (inherits(mod, "try-error")) {
    message("Quadratic RE failed; trying linear RE...")
    form_lin <- update(form_full, . ~ . - (1 + t_c + I(t_c^2) + I(t_c^3) | pid_child) +
                         (1 + t_c | pid_child))
    mod <- lmer(form_lin, data = df, REML = TRUE, control = ctrl)
  }
  mod
}

extract_child_polys <- function(mod, df_marker) { # extract child-specific coefficients

  grp <- df_marker %>% distinct(pid_child, maternal_hiv)

  re <- ranef(mod)$pid_child
  re_df <- re %>% as.data.frame()
  re_df$pid_child <- rownames(re)

  pull_or_zero <- function(mat, nm) if (nm %in% colnames(mat)) mat[, nm] else rep(0, nrow(mat))

  b0 <- pull_or_zero(re, "(Intercept)")
  b1 <- pull_or_zero(re, "t_c")
  b2 <- pull_or_zero(re, "I(t_c^2)")
  b3 <- pull_or_zero(re, "I(t_c^3)")

  fe <- fixef(mod)
  f0 <- unname(ifelse("(Intercept)" %in% names(fe), fe["(Intercept)"], 0))
  f1 <- unname(ifelse("t_c" %in% names(fe), fe["t_c"], 0))
  f2 <- unname(ifelse("I(t_c^2)" %in% names(fe), fe["I(t_c^2)"], 0))
  f3 <- unname(ifelse("I(t_c^3)" %in% names(fe), fe["I(t_c^3)"], 0))

  f0_cheu <- unname(ifelse("maternal_hivHIV positive" %in% names(fe), fe["maternal_hivHIV positive"], 0))
  f1_cheu <- unname(ifelse("t_c:maternal_hivHIV positive" %in% names(fe), fe["t_c:maternal_hivHIV positive"], 0))
  f2_cheu <- unname(ifelse("I(t_c^2):maternal_hivHIV positive" %in% names(fe), fe["I(t_c^2):maternal_hivHIV positive"], 0))
  f3_cheu <- unname(ifelse("I(t_c^3):maternal_hivHIV positive" %in% names(fe), fe["I(t_c^3):maternal_hivHIV positive"], 0))

  re_df %>%
    select(pid_child) %>%
    left_join(grp, by = "pid_child") %>%
    mutate(
      alpha0 = f0 + if_else(maternal_hiv == "HIV positive", f0_cheu, 0) + b0,
      alpha1 = f1 + if_else(maternal_hiv == "HIV positive", f1_cheu, 0) + b1,  # slope at mean time
      alpha2 = f2 + if_else(maternal_hiv == "HIV positive", f2_cheu, 0) + b2,  # quadratic feature
      alpha3 = f3 + if_else(maternal_hiv == "HIV positive", f3_cheu, 0) + b3   # cubic feature
    ) %>%
    select(pid_child, alpha0, alpha1, alpha2, alpha3)
}

models_by_marker <- dat_long %>%
  split(.$Marker) %>%
  lapply(fit_poly_lmm)

trajectory_features_long <- imap(models_by_marker, ~{
  marker_name <- .y
  df_marker <- dat_long %>% filter(Marker == marker_name)
  extract_child_polys(.x, df_marker) %>%
    mutate(Marker = marker_name)
}) %>% bind_rows()

trajectory_features_long <- trajectory_features_long %>%
  rename(
    slope_lin   = alpha1,  # instantaneous slope at mean follow-up age 
    curve_quad  = alpha2,  # quadratic component
    curve_cubic = alpha3   # cubic component
  )

make_avg_slope <- function(mod, df_marker) { # simple "overall change per year"

  model_ids <- rownames(ranef(mod)$pid_child)

  base_new <- df_marker %>%
    distinct(pid_child, maternal_hiv) %>%
    filter(pid_child %in% model_ids) %>% # only fitted children
    tidyr::expand_grid(time_years = c(6/52, 5)) %>%
    mutate(t_c = time_years - t_center)

  preds <- base_new %>%
    mutate(pred = predict(mod, newdata = ., re.form = NULL)) %>%
    arrange(pid_child, time_years) %>%
    group_by(pid_child) %>%
    summarise(avg_slope_6w_to_5y = (last(pred) - first(pred)) / (5 - 6/52), .groups = "drop")

  preds
}

avg_slopes <- imap(models_by_marker, ~{
  df_marker <- dat_long %>% filter(Marker == .y)
  make_avg_slope(.x, df_marker) %>% mutate(Marker = .y)
}) %>% bind_rows()

trajectory_features_long <- trajectory_features_long %>%
  left_join(avg_slopes, by = c("pid_child","Marker"))

trajectory_features_wide <- trajectory_features_long %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = pid_child,
    names_from = Marker,
    values_from = c(slope_lin, curve_quad, curve_cubic, avg_slope_6w_to_5y),
    names_glue = "{.value}_{Marker}"
  )

trajectory_features_wide[2:55] <- scale(trajectory_features_wide[2:55])
```

<br>

We successfully derived child-specific trajectory features for each marker from the LMMs. In total, trajectories were estimated for 218 children who had at least one valid marker measurement between 6 weeks and 5 years of age. For every marker, each child was assigned a linear slope reflecting the direction and steepness of change over time (`Model 1`), as well as quadratic and cubic terms that described non-linear aspects of the trajectory (`Model 2`). 

<br>
<br>
<br>

### Associations with neurometabolite levels at 6-7 years

Scaled linear slopes (`Model 1`) were used as explanatory variables in linear regression models with cross-sectional neurometabolite measures at age 6-7 years as outcomes. This approach allowed us to test whether the direction of each child marker trajectory, rather than single timepoint levels, were associated with later brain metabolite profiles. Although scaled quadratic and cubic slopes were generated for all markers (`Model 2`), most showed little or no variation across children, effectively behaving as constants. As a result, models including quadratic and cubic slopes were not distinguishable from linear-only models, and likelihood ratio tests (LRTs) could not be performed. This indicates that in practice only linear slopes contributed meaningfully to the models, while higher-order terms did not provide additional explanatory power.

Overall, most models explained only a modest proportion of variance in neurometabolite levels, with adjusted `R²` values close to zero. Although certain immune trajectories may be linked to mid-childhood neurometabolite ratios, the observed associations are weak. Results should therefore be viewed as exploratory, pending replication in larger cohorts with greater power.

<br>

#### **Parietal grey matter ratios**
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs <- merge(
  x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled, 
  y = trajectory_features_wide, 
  by = "pid_child", 
  all.x = TRUE
)

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs %>% 
  dplyr::rename(
    Glutamate_ratios   = `Glu/Cr+PCr`,
    Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`,
    NAA_ratios         = `NAA/Cr+PCr`,
    Choline_ratios     = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`
  )

hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"

neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c(
  "Glutamate_ratios", 
  "Myoinositol_ratios", 
  "NAA_ratios", 
  "Choline_ratios"
)

marker_list <- c(
  "slope_lin_GMCSF", 
  "slope_lin_IFNg", 
  "slope_lin_IL1b", 
  "slope_lin_IL2", 
  "slope_lin_IL5", 
  "slope_lin_IL6", 
  "slope_lin_IL7", 
  "slope_lin_IL8", 
  "slope_lin_TNFa", 
  "slope_lin_IL4", 
  "slope_lin_IL10",
  "slope_lin_IL12p70", 
  "slope_lin_IL13", 
  "slope_lin_CD14", 
  "slope_lin_CD163", 
  "slope_lin_Lcn2", 
  "slope_lin_MMP9", 
  "slope_lin_YKL40"
)

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_results_list <- list()

for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
  cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_result_df <- data.frame()
  
  for (immune_column in marker_list) {
    cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
    
    form_str <- sprintf("`%s` ~ `%s` * `%s`", neuro_column, immune_column, hiv_status)
    lm_formula <- as.formula(form_str)
    
    lm_fit <- lm(lm_formula, data = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs)
    lm_tidy <- broom::tidy(lm_fit)

    bh_df <- lm_tidy %>% dplyr::select(term, p.value) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(adj_p_value = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")) %>%
      dplyr::select(term, adj_p_value)
    
    lm_robust <- lmtest::coeftest(lm_fit, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(lm_fit))
    lm_robust_tidy <- broom::tidy(lm_robust, conf.int = TRUE)
    
    lm_robust_tidy <- lm_robust_tidy %>%
      dplyr::left_join(bh_df, by = "term") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        neurometabolite = neuro_column,
        immune_marker   = immune_column
      )
    
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_result_df <-
      dplyr::bind_rows(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_result_df, lm_robust_tidy)
  }
  
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_results_list[[neuro_column]] <-
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_result_df
}

dir.create("Output kables LMM immune slopes pgm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
  cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
  file_name <- paste0(
    "Output kables LMM immune slopes pgm ratios/",
    gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column),
    "_results.html"
  )
  
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_kables <-
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_results_list[[neuro_column]] %>%
    dplyr::select(-neurometabolite, -immune_marker)
  
  knitr::kable(
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_kables, 
    format = "html", escape = FALSE
  ) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
    as.character() %>%
    cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_Glu_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables LMM immune slopes pgm ratios/Glutamate_ratios_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_Glu_parsed <- read_html(paste(LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_Glu_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_Glu_data <- html_table(LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_Glu_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_Glu_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray")
```

```{r}
specific_colors <- c("#ff8552", "#009a88")  # CHU, CHEU
grp_labels <- c("CHU", "CHEU")

ins_raw <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm %>%
  transmute(
    pid_child,
    maternal_hiv,
    Ins = `Ins/Cr+PCr`
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Ins))

# ------- IL-8

IL8_long <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm %>%
  select(pid_child, maternal_hiv, I6_IL8, I24_IL8, I36_IL8, I60_IL8) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("I"), names_to = "tp", values_to = "IL8") %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint = case_when(
      tp == "I6_IL8"  ~ 6,
      tp == "I24_IL8" ~ 24,
      tp == "I36_IL8" ~ 36,
      tp == "I60_IL8" ~ 60,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-tp)

IL8_filt <- IL8_long %>%
  group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  mutate(
    med = median(IL8, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = IQR(IL8, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = med - 3*iqr,
    upper = med + 3*iqr
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(IL8)) %>%
  filter(IL8 >= lower & IL8 <= upper) %>%
  select(-med, -iqr, -lower, -upper)

IL8_summary <- IL8_filt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    Median = median(IL8, na.rm = TRUE),
    Lower  = quantile(IL8, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Upper  = quantile(IL8, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ins_filt <- ins_raw %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    med = median(Ins, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = IQR(Ins, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = med - 3*iqr,
    upper = med + 3*iqr
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(-med, -iqr, -lower, -upper) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Timepoint = 72)  # place at 6 years on x-axis

IL8_range <- range(IL8_filt$IL8, na.rm = TRUE)
ins_range <- range(ins_filt$Ins, na.rm = TRUE)

if (diff(ins_range) == 0 || any(!is.finite(ins_range))) {
  scale_k <- 1
} else {
  scale_k <- diff(IL8_range) / diff(ins_range)
}
scale_b <- IL8_range[1] - scale_k*ins_range[1]

ins_filt <- ins_filt %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Ins_scaled_for_y = scale_k*Ins + scale_b)

ins_summary <- ins_filt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(Ins_med_scaled = median(Ins_scaled_for_y, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_IL8_ins <- ggplot(IL8_filt, aes(x = Timepoint, y = IL8)) +
  # IL-8 subject trajectories
  geom_line(aes(group = pid_child, color = maternal_hiv), alpha = 0.1, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # IL-8 points 
  geom_point(aes(group = pid_child, color = maternal_hiv, shape = "Serum marker"),
             position = position_jitter(width = 2), size = 3, alpha = 0.3) +

  # IL-8 boxplots 
  geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(Timepoint, maternal_hiv), fill = maternal_hiv),
               color = "black", alpha = 0.9, width = 3, outlier.shape = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # IL-8 group medians
  geom_line(data = IL8_summary,
            aes(x = Timepoint, y = Median, group = maternal_hiv, color = maternal_hiv),
            linewidth = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # Ins points (triangle) 
  geom_point(data = ins_filt,
             aes(x = Timepoint, y = Ins_scaled_for_y, color = maternal_hiv,
                 group = pid_child, shape = "Neurometabolite"),
             position = position_jitter(width = 4), size = 3, alpha = 0.3,
             inherit.aes = FALSE) +

  # Ins boxplots 
  geom_boxplot(data = ins_filt,
               aes(x = Timepoint, y = Ins_scaled_for_y,
                   group = interaction(Timepoint, maternal_hiv), fill = maternal_hiv),
               color = "black", alpha = 0.9, width = 3, outlier.shape = NA,
               inherit.aes = FALSE, show.legend = FALSE) +

  scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors, name = "Group", labels = grp_labels) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = specific_colors, name = "Group", labels = grp_labels, guide = "none") +
  scale_shape_manual(
    name = "Type",
    values = c("Serum marker" = 16, "Neurometabolite" = 17),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    expand = c(0.1, 0.1),
    breaks = c(6, 24, 36, 60, 72),
    labels = c("6 weeks", "2 years", "3 years", "5 years", "6-7 years")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = expression(bold("Child IL-8 trajectories")~"(pg/mL)"),
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ (. - scale_b)/scale_k,
                        name = expression(bold("PGM myo-inositol ratios to creatine")))
  ) +
  labs(x = "Timepoint", title = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.box.just = "center"
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(order = 1),
    shape = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(alpha = 0.9))
  )

ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Longitudinal associations/IL8_pgm_myoinositol.png",
       p_IL8_ins, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 1200)

# ------- TNFα

TNFa_long <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm %>%
  select(pid_child, maternal_hiv, I6_TNFa, I24_TNFa, I36_TNFa, I60_TNFa) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("I"), names_to = "tp", values_to = "TNFa") %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint = case_when(
      tp == "I6_TNFa"  ~ 6,
      tp == "I24_TNFa" ~ 24,
      tp == "I36_TNFa" ~ 36,
      tp == "I60_TNFa" ~ 60,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-tp)

TNFa_filt <- TNFa_long %>%
  group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  mutate(
    med = median(TNFa, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = IQR(TNFa, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = med - 3*iqr,
    upper = med + 3*iqr
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(TNFa)) %>%
  filter(TNFa >= lower & TNFa <= upper) %>%
  select(-med, -iqr, -lower, -upper)

TNFa_summary <- TNFa_filt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    Median = median(TNFa, na.rm = TRUE),
    Lower  = quantile(TNFa, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Upper  = quantile(TNFa, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ins_filt <- ins_raw %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    med = median(Ins, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = IQR(Ins, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = med - 3*iqr,
    upper = med + 3*iqr
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(-med, -iqr, -lower, -upper) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Timepoint = 72)  # place at 6 years on x-axis

TNFa_range <- range(TNFa_filt$TNFa, na.rm = TRUE)
ins_range <- range(ins_filt$Ins, na.rm = TRUE)

if (diff(ins_range) == 0 || any(!is.finite(ins_range))) {
  scale_k <- 1
} else {
  scale_k <- diff(TNFa_range) / diff(ins_range)
}
scale_b <- TNFa_range[1] - scale_k*ins_range[1]

ins_filt <- ins_filt %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Ins_scaled_for_y = scale_k*Ins + scale_b)

ins_summary <- ins_filt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(Ins_med_scaled = median(Ins_scaled_for_y, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_TNFa_ins <- ggplot(TNFa_filt, aes(x = Timepoint, y = TNFa)) +
  # TNFα subject trajectories
  geom_line(aes(group = pid_child, color = maternal_hiv), alpha = 0.1, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # TNFα points
  geom_point(aes(group = pid_child, color = maternal_hiv, shape = "Serum marker"),
             position = position_jitter(width = 2), size = 3, alpha = 0.3) +

  # TNFα boxplots 
  geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(Timepoint, maternal_hiv), fill = maternal_hiv),
               color = "black", alpha = 0.9, width = 3, outlier.shape = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # TNFα group medians
  geom_line(data = TNFa_summary,
            aes(x = Timepoint, y = Median, group = maternal_hiv, color = maternal_hiv),
            linewidth = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # Ins points (triangle) 
  geom_point(data = ins_filt,
             aes(x = Timepoint, y = Ins_scaled_for_y, color = maternal_hiv,
                 group = pid_child, shape = "Neurometabolite"),
             position = position_jitter(width = 4), size = 3, alpha = 0.3,
             inherit.aes = FALSE) +

  # Ins boxplots 
  geom_boxplot(data = ins_filt,
               aes(x = Timepoint, y = Ins_scaled_for_y,
                   group = interaction(Timepoint, maternal_hiv), fill = maternal_hiv),
               color = "black", alpha = 0.9, width = 3, outlier.shape = NA,
               inherit.aes = FALSE, show.legend = FALSE) +

  scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors, name = "Group", labels = grp_labels) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = specific_colors, name = "Group", labels = grp_labels, guide = "none") +
  scale_shape_manual(
    name = "Type",
    values = c("Serum marker" = 16, "Neurometabolite" = 17),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    expand = c(0.1, 0.1),
    breaks = c(6, 24, 36, 60, 72),
    labels = c("6 weeks", "2 years", "3 years", "5 years", "6-7 years")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = expression(bold("Child TNFα trajectories")~"(pg/mL)"),
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ (. - scale_b)/scale_k,
                        name = expression(bold("PGM myo-inositol ratios to creatine")))
  ) +
  labs(x = "Timepoint", title = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.box.just = "center"
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(order = 1),
    shape = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(alpha = 0.9))
  )

ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Longitudinal associations/TNFa_pgm_myoinositol.png",
       p_TNFa_ins, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 1200)

# ------- IL-4

IL4_long <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm %>%
  select(pid_child, maternal_hiv, I6_IL4, I24_IL4, I36_IL4, I60_IL4) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("I"), names_to = "tp", values_to = "IL4") %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint = case_when(
      tp == "I6_IL4"  ~ 6,
      tp == "I24_IL4" ~ 24,
      tp == "I36_IL4" ~ 36,
      tp == "I60_IL4" ~ 60,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-tp)

IL4_filt <- IL4_long %>%
  group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  mutate(
    med = median(IL4, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = IQR(IL4, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = med - 3*iqr,
    upper = med + 3*iqr
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(IL4)) %>%
  filter(IL4 >= lower & IL4 <= upper) %>%
  select(-med, -iqr, -lower, -upper)

IL4_summary <- IL4_filt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    Median = median(IL4, na.rm = TRUE),
    Lower  = quantile(IL4, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Upper  = quantile(IL4, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ins_filt <- ins_raw %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    med = median(Ins, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = IQR(Ins, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = med - 3*iqr,
    upper = med + 3*iqr
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(-med, -iqr, -lower, -upper) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Timepoint = 72)  # place at 6 years on x-axis

IL4_range <- range(IL4_filt$IL4, na.rm = TRUE)
ins_range <- range(ins_filt$Ins, na.rm = TRUE)

if (diff(ins_range) == 0 || any(!is.finite(ins_range))) {
  scale_k <- 1
} else {
  scale_k <- diff(IL4_range) / diff(ins_range)
}
scale_b <- IL4_range[1] - scale_k*ins_range[1]

ins_filt <- ins_filt %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Ins_scaled_for_y = scale_k*Ins + scale_b)

ins_summary <- ins_filt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(Ins_med_scaled = median(Ins_scaled_for_y, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_IL4_ins <- ggplot(IL4_filt, aes(x = Timepoint, y = IL4)) +
  # IL-4 subject trajectories
  geom_line(aes(group = pid_child, color = maternal_hiv), alpha = 0.1, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # IL-4 points
  geom_point(aes(group = pid_child, color = maternal_hiv, shape = "Serum marker"),
             position = position_jitter(width = 2), size = 3, alpha = 0.3) +

  # IL-4 boxplots 
  geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(Timepoint, maternal_hiv), fill = maternal_hiv),
               color = "black", alpha = 0.9, width = 3, outlier.shape = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # IL-4 group medians
  geom_line(data = IL4_summary,
            aes(x = Timepoint, y = Median, group = maternal_hiv, color = maternal_hiv),
            linewidth = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # Ins points (triangle) 
  geom_point(data = ins_filt,
             aes(x = Timepoint, y = Ins_scaled_for_y, color = maternal_hiv,
                 group = pid_child, shape = "Neurometabolite"),
             position = position_jitter(width = 4), size = 3, alpha = 0.3,
             inherit.aes = FALSE) +

  # Ins boxplots 
  geom_boxplot(data = ins_filt,
               aes(x = Timepoint, y = Ins_scaled_for_y,
                   group = interaction(Timepoint, maternal_hiv), fill = maternal_hiv),
               color = "black", alpha = 0.9, width = 3, outlier.shape = NA,
               inherit.aes = FALSE, show.legend = FALSE) +

  scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors, name = "Group", labels = grp_labels) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = specific_colors, name = "Group", labels = grp_labels, guide = "none") +
  scale_shape_manual(
    name = "Type",
    values = c("Serum marker" = 16, "Neurometabolite" = 17),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    expand = c(0.1, 0.1),
    breaks = c(6, 24, 36, 60, 72),
    labels = c("6 weeks", "2 years", "3 years", "5 years", "6-7 years")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = expression(bold("Child IL-4 trajectories")~"(pg/mL)"),
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ (. - scale_b)/scale_k,
                        name = expression(bold("PGM myo-inositol ratios to creatine")))
  ) +
  labs(x = "Timepoint", title = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.box.just = "center"
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(order = 1),
    shape = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(alpha = 0.9))
  )

ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Longitudinal associations/IL4_pgm_myoinositol.png",
       p_IL4_ins, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 1200)
```

###### *N-acetyl-aspartate ratios*
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_NAA_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables LMM immune slopes pgm ratios/NAA_ratios_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_NAA_parsed <- read_html(paste(LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_NAA_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_NAA_data <- html_table(LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_NAA_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_NAA_data_kable <- LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_NAA_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_NAA_data_kable$Term)
  
  LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_NAA_data_kable <- LMM_slopes_pgm_ratios_NAA_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

```{r}
specific_colors <- c("#ff8552", "#009a88")  # CHU, CHEU
grp_labels <- c("CHU", "CHEU")

NAA_raw <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm %>%
  transmute(
    pid_child,
    maternal_hiv,
    NAA = `NAA/Cr+PCr`
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(NAA))

IL10_long <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm %>%
  select(pid_child, maternal_hiv, I6_IL10, I24_IL10, I36_IL10, I60_IL10) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("I"), names_to = "tp", values_to = "IL10") %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint = case_when(
      tp == "I6_IL10"  ~ 6,
      tp == "I24_IL10" ~ 24,
      tp == "I36_IL10" ~ 36,
      tp == "I60_IL10" ~ 60,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-tp)

IL10_filt <- IL10_long %>%
  group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  mutate(
    med = median(IL10, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = IQR(IL10, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = med - 3*iqr,
    upper = med + 3*iqr
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(IL10)) %>%
  filter(IL10 >= lower & IL10 <= upper) %>%
  select(-med, -iqr, -lower, -upper)

IL10_summary <- IL10_filt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    Median = median(IL10, na.rm = TRUE),
    Lower  = quantile(IL10, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Upper  = quantile(IL10, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

NAA_filt <- NAA_raw %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    med = median(NAA, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = IQR(NAA, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = med - 3*iqr,
    upper = med + 3*iqr
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(-med, -iqr, -lower, -upper) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Timepoint = 72)  # place at 6 years on x-axis

IL10_range <- range(IL10_filt$IL10, na.rm = TRUE)
NAA_range <- range(NAA_filt$NAA, na.rm = TRUE)

if (diff(NAA_range) == 0 || any(!is.finite(NAA_range))) {
  scale_k <- 1
} else {
  scale_k <- diff(IL10_range) / diff(NAA_range)
}
scale_b <- IL10_range[1] - scale_k*NAA_range[1]

NAA_filt <- NAA_filt %>%
  dplyr::mutate(NAA_scaled_for_y = scale_k*NAA + scale_b)

NAA_summary <- NAA_filt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(NAA_med_scaled = median(NAA_scaled_for_y, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_IL10_NAA <- ggplot(IL10_filt, aes(x = Timepoint, y = IL10)) +
  # IL-10 subject trajectories
  geom_line(aes(group = pid_child, color = maternal_hiv), alpha = 0.1, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # IL-10 points 
  geom_point(aes(group = pid_child, color = maternal_hiv, shape = "Serum marker"),
             position = position_jitter(width = 2), size = 3, alpha = 0.3) +

  # IL-10 boxplots 
  geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(Timepoint, maternal_hiv), fill = maternal_hiv),
               color = "black", alpha = 0.9, width = 3, outlier.shape = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # IL-10 group medians
  geom_line(data = IL10_summary,
            aes(x = Timepoint, y = Median, group = maternal_hiv, color = maternal_hiv),
            linewidth = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # NAA points (triangle) 
  geom_point(data = NAA_filt,
             aes(x = Timepoint, y = NAA_scaled_for_y, color = maternal_hiv,
                 group = pid_child, shape = "Neurometabolite"),
             position = position_jitter(width = 4), size = 3, alpha = 0.3,
             inherit.aes = FALSE) +

  # NAA boxplots 
  geom_boxplot(data = NAA_filt,
               aes(x = Timepoint, y = NAA_scaled_for_y,
                   group = interaction(Timepoint, maternal_hiv), fill = maternal_hiv),
               color = "black", alpha = 0.9, width = 3, outlier.shape = NA,
               inherit.aes = FALSE, show.legend = FALSE) +

  scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors, name = "Group", labels = grp_labels) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = specific_colors, name = "Group", labels = grp_labels, guide = "none") +
  scale_shape_manual(
    name = "Type",
    values = c("Serum marker" = 16, "Neurometabolite" = 17),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    expand = c(0.1, 0.1),
    breaks = c(6, 24, 36, 60, 72),
    labels = c("6 weeks", "2 years", "3 years", "5 years", "6-7 years")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = expression(bold("Child IL-10 trajectories")~"(pg/mL)"),
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ (. - scale_b)/scale_k,
                        name = expression(bold("PGM N-acetyl-aspartate ratios to creatine")))
  ) +
  labs(x = "Timepoint", title = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.box.just = "center"
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(order = 1),
    shape = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(alpha = 0.9))
  )

ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Longitudinal associations/IL10_pgm_NAA.png",
       p_IL10_NAA, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 1200)
```

```{r}
tCho_range <- range(tCho_filt$tCho, na.rm = TRUE)

if (diff(tCho_range) == 0 || any(!is.finite(tCho_range))) {

} else {

}

p_IL8_tCho <- ggplot(IL8_filt, aes(x = Timepoint, y = IL8)) +
  # IL-8 subject trajectories
  geom_line(aes(group = pid_child, color = maternal_hiv), alpha = 0.1, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # IL-8 points 
  geom_point(aes(group = pid_child, color = maternal_hiv, shape = "Serum marker"),
             position = position_jitter(width = 2), size = 3, alpha = 0.3) +

  # IL-8 boxplots

               color = "black", alpha = 0.9, width = 3, outlier.shape = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # IL-8 group medians
  geom_line(data = IL8_summary,
            aes(x = Timepoint, y = Median, group = maternal_hiv, color = maternal_hiv),
            linewidth = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # tCho points (triangle) 
  geom_point(data = tCho_filt,
             aes(x = Timepoint, y = tCho_scaled_for_y, color = maternal_hiv,
                 group = pid_child, shape = "Neurometabolite"),
             position = position_jitter(width = 4), size = 3, alpha = 0.3,
             inherit.aes = FALSE) +

  # tCho boxplots 
  geom_boxplot(data = tCho_filt,
               aes(x = Timepoint, y = tCho_scaled_for_y,
                   group = interaction(Timepoint, maternal_hiv), fill = maternal_hiv),
               color = "black", alpha = 0.9, width = 3, outlier.shape = NA,
               inherit.aes = FALSE, show.legend = FALSE) +

  scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors, name = "Group", labels = grp_labels) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = specific_colors, name = "Group", labels = grp_labels, guide = "none") +
  scale_shape_manual(
    name = "Type",
    values = c("Serum marker" = 16, "Neurometabolite" = 17),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    expand = c(0.1, 0.1),
    breaks = c(6, 24, 36, 60, 72),
    labels = c("6 weeks", "2 years", "3 years", "5 years", "6-7 years")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = expression(bold("Child IL-8 trajectories")~"(pg/mL)"),
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ (. - scale_b)/scale_k,
                        name = expression(bold("PGM choline ratios to creatine")))
  ) +
  labs(x = "Timepoint", title = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.box.just = "center"
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(order = 1),
    shape = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(alpha = 0.9))
  )

ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Longitudinal associations/IL8_pgm_choline.png",
       p_IL8_tCho, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 1200)
```

#### **Parietal grey matter absolute concentrations**
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_LMMs <- merge(
  x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled, 
  y = trajectory_features_wide, 
  by = "pid_child", 
  all.x = TRUE
)

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_LMMs <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_LMMs %>% 
  dplyr::rename(
    Glutamate_abs   = `Glu`,
    Myoinositol_abs = `Ins`,
    NAA_abs         = `NAA`,
    Choline_abs     = `GPC+PCh`,
    Creatine_abs    = `Cr+PCr`
  )

hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"

neurometabolite_abs_list <- c(
  "Glutamate_abs", 
  "Myoinositol_abs", 
  "NAA_abs", 
  "Choline_abs",
  "Creatine_abs"
)

marker_list <- c(
  "slope_lin_GMCSF", 
  "slope_lin_IFNg", 
  "slope_lin_IL1b", 
  "slope_lin_IL2", 
  "slope_lin_IL5", 
  "slope_lin_IL6", 
  "slope_lin_IL7", 
  "slope_lin_IL8", 
  "slope_lin_TNFa", 
  "slope_lin_IL4", 
  "slope_lin_IL10",
  "slope_lin_IL12p70", 
  "slope_lin_IL13", 
  "slope_lin_CD14", 
  "slope_lin_CD163", 
  "slope_lin_Lcn2", 
  "slope_lin_MMP9", 
  "slope_lin_YKL40"
)

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_LMMs_results_list <- list()

for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
  cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_LMMs_result_df <- data.frame()
  
  for (immune_column in marker_list) {
    cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
    
    form_str <- sprintf("`%s` ~ `%s` * `%s`", neuro_column, immune_column, hiv_status)
    lm_formula <- as.formula(form_str)
    
    lm_fit <- lm(lm_formula, data = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_LMMs)
    lm_tidy <- broom::tidy(lm_fit)

    bh_df <- lm_tidy %>% dplyr::select(term, p.value) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(adj_p_value = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")) %>%
      dplyr::select(term, adj_p_value)
    
    lm_robust <- lmtest::coeftest(lm_fit, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(lm_fit))
    lm_robust_tidy <- broom::tidy(lm_robust, conf.int = TRUE)
    
    lm_robust_tidy <- lm_robust_tidy %>%
      dplyr::left_join(bh_df, by = "term") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        neurometabolite = neuro_column,
        immune_marker   = immune_column
      )
    
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_LMMs_result_df <-
      dplyr::bind_rows(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_LMMs_result_df, lm_robust_tidy)
  }
  
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_LMMs_results_list[[neuro_column]] <-
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_LMMs_result_df
}

dir.create("Output kables LMM immune slopes pgm mM", showWarnings = FALSE)

for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
  cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
  file_name <- paste0(
    "Output kables LMM immune slopes pgm mM/",
    gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column),
    "_results.html"
  )
  
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_LMMs_kables <-
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_LMMs_results_list[[neuro_column]] %>%
    dplyr::select(-neurometabolite, -immune_marker)
  
  knitr::kable(
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_LMMs_kables, 
    format = "html", escape = FALSE
  ) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
    as.character() %>%
    cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

###### *Glutamate mM*
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  LMM_slopes_pgm_abs_Glu_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables LMM immune slopes pgm mM/Glutamate_abs_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  LMM_slopes_pgm_abs_Glu_parsed <- read_html(paste(LMM_slopes_pgm_abs_Glu_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  LMM_slopes_pgm_abs_Glu_data <- html_table(LMM_slopes_pgm_abs_Glu_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  LMM_slopes_pgm_abs_Glu_data_kable <- LMM_slopes_pgm_abs_Glu_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", LMM_slopes_pgm_abs_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  LMM_slopes_pgm_abs_Glu_data_kable <- LMM_slopes_pgm_abs_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

```{r}
LMM_slopes_pgm_abs_Glu_data_kable
```

#### **Parietal white matter ratios**
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs <- merge(
  x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled, 
  y = trajectory_features_wide, 
  by = "pid_child", 
  all.x = TRUE
)

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs %>% 
  dplyr::rename(
    Glutamate_ratios   = `Glu/Cr+PCr`,
    Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`,
    NAA_ratios         = `NAA/Cr+PCr`,
    Choline_ratios     = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`
  )

hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"

neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c(
  "Glutamate_ratios", 
  "Myoinositol_ratios", 
  "NAA_ratios", 
  "Choline_ratios"
)

marker_list <- c(
  "slope_lin_GMCSF", 
  "slope_lin_IFNg", 
  "slope_lin_IL1b", 
  "slope_lin_IL2", 
  "slope_lin_IL5", 
  "slope_lin_IL6", 
  "slope_lin_IL7", 
  "slope_lin_IL8", 
  "slope_lin_TNFa", 
  "slope_lin_IL4", 
  "slope_lin_IL10",
  "slope_lin_IL12p70", 
  "slope_lin_IL13", 
  "slope_lin_CD14", 
  "slope_lin_CD163", 
  "slope_lin_Lcn2", 
  "slope_lin_MMP9", 
  "slope_lin_YKL40"
)

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_results_list <- list()

for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
  cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_result_df <- data.frame()
  
  for (immune_column in marker_list) {
    cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
    
    form_str <- sprintf("`%s` ~ `%s` * `%s`", neuro_column, immune_column, hiv_status)
    lm_formula <- as.formula(form_str)
    
    lm_fit <- lm(lm_formula, data = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs)
    lm_tidy <- broom::tidy(lm_fit)

    bh_df <- lm_tidy %>% dplyr::select(term, p.value) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(adj_p_value = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")) %>%
      dplyr::select(term, adj_p_value)
    
    lm_robust <- lmtest::coeftest(lm_fit, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(lm_fit))
    lm_robust_tidy <- broom::tidy(lm_robust, conf.int = TRUE)
    
    lm_robust_tidy <- lm_robust_tidy %>%
      dplyr::left_join(bh_df, by = "term") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        neurometabolite = neuro_column,
        immune_marker   = immune_column
      )
    
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_result_df <-
      dplyr::bind_rows(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_result_df, lm_robust_tidy)
  }
  
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_results_list[[neuro_column]] <-
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_result_df
}

dir.create("Output kables LMM immune slopes pwm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
  cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
  file_name <- paste0(
    "Output kables LMM immune slopes pwm ratios/",
    gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column),
    "_results.html"
  )
  
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_kables <-
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_results_list[[neuro_column]] %>%

  knitr::kable(
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_kables, 
    format = "html", escape = FALSE
  ) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
    as.character() %>%
    cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Longitudinal associations/YKL40_pwm_glutamate.png){width="100%"}

```{r}
LMM_slopes_pwm_ratios_Glu_data_kable
```

<br>

```{r}
specific_colors <- c("#ff8552", "#009a88")  # CHU, CHEU
grp_labels <- c("CHU", "CHEU")

Glu_raw <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm %>%
  transmute(
    pid_child,
    maternal_hiv,
    Glu = `Glu/Cr+PCr`
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Glu))

YKL40_long <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm %>%
  select(pid_child, maternal_hiv, I6_YKL40, I24_YKL40, I36_YKL40, I60_YKL40) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("I"), names_to = "tp", values_to = "YKL40") %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint = case_when(
      tp == "I6_YKL40"  ~ 6,
      tp == "I24_YKL40" ~ 24,
      tp == "I36_YKL40" ~ 36,
      tp == "I60_YKL40" ~ 60,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-tp)

YKL40_filt <- YKL40_long %>%
  group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  mutate(
    med = median(YKL40, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = IQR(YKL40, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = med - 3*iqr,
    upper = med + 3*iqr
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(YKL40)) %>%
  filter(YKL40 >= lower & YKL40 <= upper) %>%
  select(-med, -iqr, -lower, -upper)

YKL40_summary <- YKL40_filt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    Median = median(YKL40, na.rm = TRUE),
    Lower  = quantile(YKL40, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Upper  = quantile(YKL40, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

Glu_filt <- Glu_raw %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    med = median(Glu, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = IQR(Glu, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = med - 3*iqr,
    upper = med + 3*iqr
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(-med, -iqr, -lower, -upper) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Timepoint = 72)  # place at 6 years on x-axis

YKL40_range <- range(YKL40_filt$YKL40, na.rm = TRUE)
Glu_range <- range(Glu_filt$Glu, na.rm = TRUE)

if (diff(Glu_range) == 0 || any(!is.finite(Glu_range))) {
  scale_k <- 1
} else {
  scale_k <- diff(YKL40_range) / diff(Glu_range)
}
scale_b <- YKL40_range[1] - scale_k*Glu_range[1]

Glu_filt <- Glu_filt %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Glu_scaled_for_y = scale_k*Glu + scale_b)

Glu_summary <- Glu_filt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(Glu_med_scaled = median(Glu_scaled_for_y, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_YKL40_Glu <- ggplot(YKL40_filt, aes(x = Timepoint, y = YKL40)) +
  # YKL-40 subject trajectories
  geom_line(aes(group = pid_child, color = maternal_hiv), alpha = 0.1, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # YKL-40 points
  geom_point(aes(group = pid_child, color = maternal_hiv, shape = "Serum marker"),
             position = position_jitter(width = 2), size = 3, alpha = 0.3) +

  # YKL-40 boxplots 
  geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(Timepoint, maternal_hiv), fill = maternal_hiv),
               color = "black", alpha = 0.9, width = 3, outlier.shape = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # YKL-40 group medians
  geom_line(data = YKL40_summary,
            aes(x = Timepoint, y = Median, group = maternal_hiv, color = maternal_hiv),
            linewidth = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # Glu points (triangle) 
  geom_point(data = Glu_filt,
             aes(x = Timepoint, y = Glu_scaled_for_y, color = maternal_hiv,
                 group = pid_child, shape = "Neurometabolite"),
             position = position_jitter(width = 4), size = 3, alpha = 0.3,
             inherit.aes = FALSE) +

  # Glu boxplots 
  geom_boxplot(data = Glu_filt,
               aes(x = Timepoint, y = Glu_scaled_for_y,
                   group = interaction(Timepoint, maternal_hiv), fill = maternal_hiv),
               color = "black", alpha = 0.9, width = 3, outlier.shape = NA,
               inherit.aes = FALSE, show.legend = FALSE) +

  scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors, name = "Group", labels = grp_labels) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = specific_colors, name = "Group", labels = grp_labels, guide = "none") +
  scale_shape_manual(
    name = "Type",
    values = c("Serum marker" = 16, "Neurometabolite" = 17),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    expand = c(0.1, 0.1),
    breaks = c(6, 24, 36, 60, 72),
    labels = c("6 weeks", "2 years", "3 years", "5 years", "6-7 years")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = expression(bold("Child YKL-40 trajectories")~"(pg/mL)"),
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ (. - scale_b)/scale_k,
                        name = expression(bold("LPWM glutamate ratios to creatine")))
  ) +
  labs(x = "Timepoint", title = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.box.just = "center"
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(order = 1),
    shape = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(alpha = 0.9))
  )

ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Longitudinal associations/YKL40_pwm_glutamate.png",
       p_YKL40_Glu, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 1200)
```

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  LMM_slopes_pwm_ratios_Ins_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables LMM immune slopes pwm ratios/Myoinositol_ratios_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  LMM_slopes_pwm_ratios_Ins_parsed <- read_html(paste(LMM_slopes_pwm_ratios_Ins_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  LMM_slopes_pwm_ratios_Ins_data <- html_table(LMM_slopes_pwm_ratios_Ins_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  LMM_slopes_pwm_ratios_Ins_data_kable <- LMM_slopes_pwm_ratios_Ins_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", LMM_slopes_pwm_ratios_Ins_data_kable$Term)
  
  LMM_slopes_pwm_ratios_Ins_data_kable <- LMM_slopes_pwm_ratios_Ins_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

```{r}
specific_colors <- c("#ff8552", "#009a88")  # CHU, CHEU
grp_labels <- c("CHU", "CHEU")

tCho_raw <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm %>%
  transmute(
    pid_child,
    maternal_hiv,
    tCho = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(tCho))

TNFa_long <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm %>%
  select(pid_child, maternal_hiv, I6_TNFa, I24_TNFa, I36_TNFa, I60_TNFa) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("I"), names_to = "tp", values_to = "TNFa") %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint = case_when(
      tp == "I6_TNFa"  ~ 6,
      tp == "I24_TNFa" ~ 24,
      tp == "I36_TNFa" ~ 36,
      tp == "I60_TNFa" ~ 60,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-tp)

TNFa_filt <- TNFa_long %>%
  group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  mutate(
    med = median(TNFa, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = IQR(TNFa, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = med - 3*iqr,
    upper = med + 3*iqr
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(TNFa)) %>%
  filter(TNFa >= lower & TNFa <= upper) %>%
  select(-med, -iqr, -lower, -upper)

TNFa_summary <- TNFa_filt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    Median = median(TNFa, na.rm = TRUE),
    Lower  = quantile(TNFa, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Upper  = quantile(TNFa, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

tCho_filt <- tCho_raw %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    med = median(tCho, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = IQR(tCho, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = med - 3*iqr,
    upper = med + 3*iqr
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(-med, -iqr, -lower, -upper) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Timepoint = 72)  # place at 6 years on x-axis

TNFa_range <- range(TNFa_filt$TNFa, na.rm = TRUE)
tCho_range <- range(tCho_filt$tCho, na.rm = TRUE)

if (diff(tCho_range) == 0 || any(!is.finite(tCho_range))) {
  scale_k <- 1
} else {
  scale_k <- diff(TNFa_range) / diff(tCho_range)
}
scale_b <- TNFa_range[1] - scale_k*tCho_range[1]

tCho_filt <- tCho_filt %>%
  dplyr::mutate(tCho_scaled_for_y = scale_k*tCho + scale_b)

tCho_summary <- tCho_filt %>%
  dplyr::group_by(maternal_hiv, Timepoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(tCho_med_scaled = median(tCho_scaled_for_y, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_TNFa_tCho <- ggplot(TNFa_filt, aes(x = Timepoint, y = TNFa)) +
  # TNFα subject trajectories
  geom_line(aes(group = pid_child, color = maternal_hiv), alpha = 0.1, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # TNFα points
  geom_point(aes(group = pid_child, color = maternal_hiv, shape = "Serum marker"),
             position = position_jitter(width = 2), size = 3, alpha = 0.3) +

  # TNFα boxplots 
  geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(Timepoint, maternal_hiv), fill = maternal_hiv),
               color = "black", alpha = 0.9, width = 3, outlier.shape = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # TNFα group medians
  geom_line(data = TNFa_summary,
            aes(x = Timepoint, y = Median, group = maternal_hiv, color = maternal_hiv),
            linewidth = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE) +

  # tCho points (triangle) 
  geom_point(data = tCho_filt,
             aes(x = Timepoint, y = tCho_scaled_for_y, color = maternal_hiv,
                 group = pid_child, shape = "Neurometabolite"),
             position = position_jitter(width = 4), size = 3, alpha = 0.3,
             inherit.aes = FALSE) +

  # tCho boxplots 
  geom_boxplot(data = tCho_filt,
               aes(x = Timepoint, y = tCho_scaled_for_y,
                   group = interaction(Timepoint, maternal_hiv), fill = maternal_hiv),
               color = "black", alpha = 0.9, width = 3, outlier.shape = NA,
               inherit.aes = FALSE, show.legend = FALSE) +

  scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors, name = "Group", labels = grp_labels) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = specific_colors, name = "Group", labels = grp_labels, guide = "none") +
  scale_shape_manual(
    name = "Type",
    values = c("Serum marker" = 16, "Neurometabolite" = 17),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    expand = c(0.1, 0.1),
    breaks = c(6, 24, 36, 60, 72),
    labels = c("6 weeks", "2 years", "3 years", "5 years", "6-7 years")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = expression(bold("Child TNFα trajectories")~"(pg/mL)"),
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ (. - scale_b)/scale_k,
                        name = expression(bold("LPWM choline ratios to creatine")))
  ) +
  labs(x = "Timepoint", title = "") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.box.just = "center"
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(order = 1),
    shape = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(alpha = 0.9))
  )

ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Longitudinal associations/TNFa_pwm_choline.png",
       p_TNFa_tCho, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 1200)
```

## **Association between child neurometabolite levels and ELOM scores** 
[Go back to index](#top)

### **Parietal grey matter** 
[Go back to index](#top)

#### **Ratios to creatine**
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results="hide", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- merge(x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled,
                                                       y = DCHS_neurodevelop_all, 
                                                       by = "pid_child", 
                                                       all.x = TRUE) 

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  filter(!is.na(ELOM_SS_Total))
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", 
                                   "Myoinositol_ratios", 
                                   "NAA_ratios", 
                                   "Choline_ratios")
  
  ELOM_list <- list("ELOM_SS_GMD", 
                    "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Cognition", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Lang_lit", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Total")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
        cat("\nELOM score:", ELOM_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, 
                                                                                "~", 
                                                                                ELOM_column, 
                                                                                "*", 
                                                                                hiv_status 
                                                                                ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables pgm ratios ELOM", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables pgm ratios ELOM/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

##### Glutamate

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables pgm ratios ELOM/Glutamate_ratios_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_parsed <- read_html(paste(pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_data <- html_table(pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_data_kable <- pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_data_kable$Term)
  
  pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_data_kable <- pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
  pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_data_kable
```

```{r}
    mutate(

                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value"
    )

  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_Ins_Lang_plot <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM, 
                                                                        aes(x = Myoinositol_ratios, 
                                                                            y = ELOM_SS_Lang_lit, 
                                                                            color = maternal_hiv)) +
    geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.25), size = 4, alpha = 0.75, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +
    scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
    theme_classic() + 
    facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv, scales = "free") +
    ylab("ELOM language scores") + xlab("Midline parietal grey matter myo-inositol ratios") +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      strip.background = element_blank()
    )
  
  # ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/MRS and ELOM/Parietal grey matter ratios/Myo_inositol_Language.png", DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_Ins_Lang_plot, width = 12, height = 4, dpi = 1200)
```

#### **Absolute concentrations**
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results="hide", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM <- merge(x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled,
                                                       y = DCHS_neurodevelop_all, 
                                                       by = "pid_child", 
                                                       all.x = TRUE) 

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM %>%
  filter(!is.na(ELOM_SS_Total))
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Glutamate_abs = `Glu`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_abs = `Ins`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(NAA_abs = `NAA`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Choline_abs = `GPC+PCh`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Creatine_abs = `Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_abs_list <- c("Glutamate_abs",
                                "Myoinositol_abs",
                                "NAA_abs",
                                "Choline_abs",
                                "Creatine_abs")
  
  ELOM_list <- list("ELOM_SS_GMD", 
                    "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Cognition", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Lang_lit", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Total")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
        cat("\nELOM score:", ELOM_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, 
                                                                                "~", 
                                                                                ELOM_column, 
                                                                                "*", 
                                                                                hiv_status 
                                                                                ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables pgm mM ELOM", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables pgm mM ELOM/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value"
    )
```
  
```{r}
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", pgm_tCho_abs_ELOM_data_kable$Term)
  
  pgm_tCho_abs_ELOM_data_kable <- pgm_tCho_abs_ELOM_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray")
```

```{r}
# Parse the HTML content
```
