```{r}
# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  pgm_tCr_abs_ELOM_data <- html_table(pgm_tCr_abs_ELOM_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  pgm_tCr_abs_ELOM_data_kable <- pgm_tCr_abs_ELOM_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", pgm_tCr_abs_ELOM_data_kable$Term)
  
  pgm_tCr_abs_ELOM_data_kable <- pgm_tCr_abs_ELOM_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
  pgm_tCr_abs_ELOM_data_kable
  
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_tCre_Cogn_plot <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM, 
                                                                        aes(x = Creatine_abs, 
                                                                            y = ELOM_SS_Cognition, 
                                                                            color = maternal_hiv)) +
    geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.25), size = 4, alpha = 0.75, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +
    scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
    theme_classic() + 
    facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv, scales = "free") +
    ylab("ELOM cognitive scores") + xlab("Midline parietal grey matter total creatine (mM)") +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      strip.background = element_blank()
    )
  
  # ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/MRS and ELOM/Parietal grey matter mM/Creatine_mM_Cognition.png", DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_tCre_Cogn_plot, width = 12, height = 4, dpi = 1200)
  
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_tCre_total_plot <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM, 
                                                                        aes(x = Creatine_abs, 
                                                                            y = ELOM_SS_Total, 
                                                                            color = maternal_hiv)) +
    geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.25), size = 4, alpha = 0.75, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +
    scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
    theme_classic() + 
    facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv, scales = "free") +
    ylab("ELOM overall scores") + xlab("Midline parietal grey matter total creatine (mM)") +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      strip.background = element_blank()
    )
  
  # ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/MRS and ELOM/Parietal grey matter mM/Creatine_mM_total.png", DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_tCre_total_plot, width = 12, height = 4, dpi = 1200)
```

### **Parietal white matter** 
[Go back to index](#top)

#### **Ratios to creatine**
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results="hide", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- merge(x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled,
                                                       y = DCHS_neurodevelop_all, 
                                                       by = "pid_child", 
                                                       all.x = TRUE) 

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  filter(!is.na(ELOM_SS_Total))
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", 
                                   "Myoinositol_ratios", 
                                   "NAA_ratios", 
                                   "Choline_ratios")
  
  ELOM_list <- list("ELOM_SS_GMD", 
                    "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Cognition", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Lang_lit", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Total")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
        cat("\nELOM score:", ELOM_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, 
                                                                                "~", 
                                                                                ELOM_column, 
                                                                                "*", 
                                                                                hiv_status 
                                                                                ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables pwm ratios ELOM", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables pwm ratios ELOM/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
                                                                            color = maternal_hiv)) +
    geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.25), size = 4, alpha = 0.75, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +
    scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
    theme_classic() + 
    facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv, scales = "free") +
    ylab("ELOM mathematics scores") + xlab("Left parietal white matter total choline ratios") +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      strip.background = element_blank()
    )
  
  # ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/MRS and ELOM/Parietal white matter ratios/Choline_cognition.png", DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_tCho_Cognition_plot, width = 12, height = 4, dpi = 1200)
  
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_tCho_Lang_lit_plot <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM, 
                                                                        aes(x = Choline_ratios, 
                                                                            y = ELOM_SS_Lang_lit, 
                                                                            color = maternal_hiv)) +
    geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.25), size = 4, alpha = 0.75, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +
    scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
    theme_classic() + 
    facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv, scales = "free") +
    ylab("ELOM language scores") + xlab("Left parietal white matter total choline ratios") +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      strip.background = element_blank()
    )
  
  # ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/MRS and ELOM/Parietal white matter ratios/Choline_language.png", DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_tCho_Lang_lit_plot, width = 12, height = 4, dpi = 1200)
  
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_tCho_Total_plot <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM, 
                                                                        aes(x = Choline_ratios, 
                                                                            y = ELOM_SS_Total, 
                                                                            color = maternal_hiv)) +
    geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.25), size = 4, alpha = 0.75, show.legend = FALSE) +

      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),

      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
```

#### **Absolute concentrations**
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results="hide", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM <- merge(x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_flexible_scaled,
                                                       y = DCHS_neurodevelop_all, 
                                                       by = "pid_child", 
                                                       all.x = TRUE) 

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM %>%
  filter(!is.na(ELOM_SS_Total))
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Glutamate_abs = `Glu`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_abs = `Ins`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(NAA_abs = `NAA`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Choline_abs = `GPC+PCh`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Creatine_abs = `Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_abs_list <- c("Glutamate_abs",
                                "Myoinositol_abs",
                                "NAA_abs",
                                "Choline_abs",
                                "Creatine_abs")
  
  ELOM_list <- list("ELOM_SS_GMD", 
                    "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Cognition", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Lang_lit", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Total")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
        cat("\nELOM score:", ELOM_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, 
                                                                                "~", 
                                                                                ELOM_column, 
                                                                                "*", 
                                                                                hiv_status))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables pwm mM ELOM", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables pwm mM ELOM/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

<br>

##### Glutamate
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  pwm_Glu_abs_ELOM_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables pwm mM ELOM/Glutamate_abs_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  pwm_Glu_abs_ELOM_parsed <- read_html(paste(pwm_Glu_abs_ELOM_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  pwm_Glu_abs_ELOM_data <- html_table(pwm_Glu_abs_ELOM_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  pwm_Glu_abs_ELOM_data_kable <- pwm_Glu_abs_ELOM_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", pwm_Glu_abs_ELOM_data_kable$Term)
  
  pwm_Glu_abs_ELOM_data_kable <- pwm_Glu_abs_ELOM_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
  pwm_Glu_abs_ELOM_data_kable
```

```{r}
      strip.background = element_blank()
    )
  
  # ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/MRS and ELOM/Parietal white matter mM/Choline_language.png", DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_tCho_Lang_lit_plot, width = 12, height = 4, dpi = 1200)
  
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_tCho_Total_plot <- ggplot(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM, 
                                                                        aes(x = Choline_abs, 
                                                                            y = ELOM_SS_Total, 
                                                                            color = maternal_hiv)) +
    geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.25), size = 4, alpha = 0.75, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(group = 1), color = "black") +
    scale_color_manual(values = specific_colors) +
    theme_classic() + 
    facet_wrap(~maternal_hiv, scales = "free") +
    ylab("ELOM total scores") + xlab("Left parietal white matter total choline mM") +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      strip.background = element_blank()
    )
  
  # ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/MRS and ELOM/Parietal white matter mM/Choline_total.png", DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_scaled_ELOM_tCho_Total_plot, width = 12, height = 4, dpi = 1200)
```

```{r}
# Mutate and rename columns
  pwm_tCr_abs_ELOM_data_kable <- pwm_tCr_abs_ELOM_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)

    rename(
```

```{r}
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled <- DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(M_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(ELOM_SS_Total))

DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled <- DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(I6_GM_CSF))

  filter(!is.na(ELOM_SS_Total))

  filter(!is.na(I24_GM_CSF))
```

<br>

### **Maternal serum markers** 
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results="hide", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Initialize an empty list to store results for each ELOM domain
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  maternal_marker_list <- list("M_GM_CSF", "M_IFNg", "M_IL1b", "M_IL2", "M_IL5",
                               "M_IL6", "M_IL7", "M_IL8", "M_TNFa", "M_IL4", "M_IL10", 
                               "M_IL12p70", "M_IL13", "M_CD14", "M_CD163", "M_Lcn2", "M_MMP9", "M_YKL40")
  
  ELOM_list <- list("ELOM_SS_GMD", 
                    "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Cognition", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Lang_lit", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Total")

# Linear regression | Loop through each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM:", ELOM_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current ELOM domain
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in maternal_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(ELOM_column, 
                                                                 "~", 
                                                                 immune_column, 
                                                                 "*", 
                                                                 hiv_status 
                                                                 ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current ELOM domain in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables maternal ELOM scores", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the ELOM domain
      cat("Current ELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the ELOM domain
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables maternal ELOM scores/", gsub("\\W", "_", ELOM_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content

# Mutate and rename columns
  maternal_ELOM_cognition_data_kable <- maternal_ELOM_cognition_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", maternal_ELOM_cognition_data_kable$Term)
  
  maternal_ELOM_cognition_data_kable <- maternal_ELOM_cognition_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
  maternal_ELOM_cognition_data_kable
  
```

<br>

```{r}
marker_labels <- c(
  "M_GM_CSF" = "GM-CSF",
  "M_IFNg" = "IFNγ",
  "M_IL1b" = "IL-1β",
  "M_IL2" = "IL-2",
  "M_IL5" = "IL-5",
  "M_IL6" = "IL-6",
  "M_IL7" = "IL-7",
  "M_IL8" = "IL-8",
  "M_TNFa" = "TNFα",
  "M_IL4" = "IL-4",
  "M_IL10" = "IL-10",
  "M_IL12p70" = "IL-12p70",
  "M_IL13" = "IL-13",
  "M_CD14" = "CD14",
  "M_CD163" = "CD163",
  "M_Lcn2" = "NGAL",
  "M_MMP9" = "MMP-9",
  "M_YKL40" = "YKL-40"
)

elom_cognitive_domain <- "ELOM_SS_Cognition"
maternal_ELOM_cognitive_results <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[elom_cognitive_domain]]

maternal_ELOM_cognitive_forest_data <- maternal_ELOM_cognitive_results %>%
  filter(grepl(":maternal_hivHIV positive", term)) %>%
  mutate(
    Marker = gsub(":.*", "", term),                         
    Marker_Label = marker_labels[Marker],                  
    sig = ifelse(`p.value` < 0.05 & adj_p_value < 0.05, "p < 0.05", "NS")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Marker_Label)) %>%                         
  mutate(
    Marker_Label = factor(Marker_Label, levels = marker_labels),   
    Marker_Label = fct_rev(Marker_Label)                  
  )

maternal_ELOM_cognitive_forestplot <- ggplot(maternal_ELOM_cognitive_forest_data,
  aes(x = estimate, y = Marker_Label)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high, color = sig), height = 0.2) +
  geom_point(aes(color = sig, shape = sig), size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("p < 0.05" = "darkred", "NS" = "black")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("p < 0.05" = 8, "NS" = 16)) +
  labs(
    x = expression(beta ~ "(95% CI) CHEU (ref: CHU)"),
    y = NULL,
    title = "ELOM cognitive domain",
    subtitle = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers and ELOM/Maternal_ELOM_cognitive.png", maternal_ELOM_cognitive_forestplot, width = 3, height = 8, dpi = 1200)
```

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers and ELOM/Maternal_ELOM_Cognitive.png){width="100%"}

```{r}
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", maternal_ELOM_gross_motor_data_kable$Term)
  
  maternal_ELOM_gross_motor_data_kable <- maternal_ELOM_gross_motor_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
  maternal_ELOM_gross_motor_data_kable
```

```{r}
ELOM_gross_motor_domain <- "ELOM_SS_GMD"
maternal_ELOM_gross_motor_results <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_gross_motor_domain]]

maternal_ELOM_gross_motor_forest_data <- maternal_ELOM_gross_motor_results %>%
  filter(grepl(":maternal_hivHIV positive", term)) %>%
  mutate(
    Marker = gsub(":.*", "", term),                         
    Marker_Label = marker_labels[Marker],                  
    sig = ifelse(`p.value` < 0.05 & adj_p_value < 0.05, "p < 0.05", "NS")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Marker_Label)) %>%                         
  mutate(
    Marker_Label = factor(Marker_Label, levels = marker_labels),   
    Marker_Label = fct_rev(Marker_Label)                  
  )

maternal_ELOM_gross_motor_forestplot <- ggplot(maternal_ELOM_gross_motor_forest_data,
  aes(x = estimate, y = Marker_Label)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high, color = sig), height = 0.2) +
  geom_point(aes(color = sig, shape = sig), size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("p < 0.05" = "darkred", "NS" = "black")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("p < 0.05" = 8, "NS" = 16)) +
  labs(
    x = expression(beta ~ "(95% CI) CHEU (ref: CHU)"),
    y = NULL,
    title = "ELOM gross motor domain",
    subtitle = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers and ELOM/Maternal_ELOM_gross_motor.png", maternal_ELOM_gross_motor_forestplot, width = 3, height = 8, dpi = 1200)
```

```{r}
      Term = "term",

      `Robust SE` = "std.error",

    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray")
```

### **Infant serum markers** 
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results="hide", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Initialize an empty list to store results for each ELOM domain
  DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  infant_marker_list <- list("I6_GM_CSF", "I6_IFNg", "I6_IL1b", "I6_IL2", "I6_IL5",
                               "I6_IL6", "I6_IL7", "I6_IL8", "I6_TNFa", "I6_IL4", "I6_IL10", 
                               "I6_IL12p70", "I6_IL13", "I6_CD14", "I6_CD163", "I6_Lcn2", "I6_MMP9", "I6_YKL40")
  
  ELOM_list <- list("ELOM_SS_GMD", 
                    "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Cognition", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Lang_lit", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Total")

# Linear regression | Loop through each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM:", ELOM_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current ELOM domain
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in infant_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(ELOM_column, 
                                                                 "~", 
                                                                 immune_column, 
                                                                 "*", 
                                                                 hiv_status 
                                                                 ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current ELOM domain in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables infant ELOM scores", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the ELOM domain
      cat("Current ELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the ELOM domain
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables infant ELOM scores/", gsub("\\W", "_", ELOM_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
  "I6_IL4" = "IL-4",

  "I6_CD14" = "CD14",
  "I6_CD163" = "CD163",
```

```{r}
  infant_ELOM_fine_motor_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables infant ELOM scores/ELOM_SS_FMXVMI_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  infant_ELOM_fine_motor_parsed <- read_html(paste(infant_ELOM_fine_motor_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  infant_ELOM_fine_motor_data <- html_table(infant_ELOM_fine_motor_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  infant_ELOM_fine_motor_data_kable <- infant_ELOM_fine_motor_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", infant_ELOM_fine_motor_data_kable$Term)
  
  infant_ELOM_fine_motor_data_kable <- infant_ELOM_fine_motor_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
  infant_ELOM_fine_motor_data_kable
```

<br>

```{r}
ELOM_fine_motor_domain <- "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI"
infant_ELOM_fine_motor_results <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_fine_motor_domain]]

infant_ELOM_fine_motor_forest_data <- infant_ELOM_fine_motor_results %>%
  filter(grepl(":maternal_hivHIV positive", term)) %>%
  mutate(
    Marker = gsub(":.*", "", term),                         
    Marker_Label = marker_labels[Marker],                  
    sig = ifelse(`p.value` < 0.05 & adj_p_value < 0.05, "p < 0.05", "NS")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Marker_Label)) %>%                         
  mutate(
    Marker_Label = factor(Marker_Label, levels = marker_labels),   
    Marker_Label = fct_rev(Marker_Label)                  
  )

infant_ELOM_fine_motor_forestplot <- ggplot(infant_ELOM_fine_motor_forest_data,
  aes(x = estimate, y = Marker_Label)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high, color = sig), height = 0.2) +
  geom_point(aes(color = sig, shape = sig), size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("p < 0.05" = "darkred", "NS" = "black")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("p < 0.05" = 8, "NS" = 16)) +
  labs(
    x = expression(beta ~ "(95% CI) CHEU (ref: CHU)"),
    y = NULL,
    title = "ELOM fine motor domain",
    subtitle = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Infant markers and ELOM/infant_ELOM_fine_motor.png", infant_ELOM_fine_motor_forestplot, width = 3, height = 8, dpi = 1200)
```

### **Child serum markers** at age 2 years
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results="hide", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Initialize an empty list to store results for each ELOM domain
  DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  child_2yr_marker_list <- list("I24_GM_CSF", "I24_IFNg", "I24_IL1b", "I24_IL2", "I24_IL5",
                               "I24_IL6", "I24_IL7", "I24_IL8", "I24_TNFa", "I24_IL4", "I24_IL10", 
                               "I24_IL12p70", "I24_IL13", "I24_CD14", "I24_CD163", "I24_Lcn2", "I24_MMP9", "I24_YKL40")
  
  ELOM_list <- list("ELOM_SS_GMD", 
                    "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Cognition", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Lang_lit", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Total")

# Linear regression | Loop through each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM:", ELOM_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current ELOM domain
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in child_2yr_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(ELOM_column, 
                                                                 "~", 
                                                                 immune_column, 
                                                                 "*", 
                                                                 hiv_status 
                                                                 ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current ELOM domain in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables child 2 year ELOM scores", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the ELOM domain
      cat("Current ELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the ELOM domain
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables child 2 year ELOM scores/", gsub("\\W", "_", ELOM_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
marker_labels <- c(
  "I24_GM_CSF" = "GM-CSF",
  "I24_IFNg" = "IFNγ",
  "I24_IL1b" = "IL-1β",
  "I24_IL2" = "IL-2",
  "I24_IL5" = "IL-5",
  "I24_IL6" = "IL-6",
  "I24_IL7" = "IL-7",
  "I24_IL8" = "IL-8",
  "I24_TNFa" = "TNFα",
  "I24_IL4" = "IL-4",
  "I24_IL10" = "IL-10",
  "I24_IL12p70" = "IL-12p70",
  "I24_IL13" = "IL-13",
  "I24_CD14" = "CD14",
  "I24_CD163" = "CD163",
  "I24_Lcn2" = "NGAL",
  "I24_MMP9" = "MMP-9",
  "I24_YKL40" = "YKL-40"
)

ELOM_cognitive_domain <- "ELOM_SS_Cognition"
child_2yr_ELOM_cognitive_results <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_cognitive_domain]]

child_2yr_ELOM_cognitive_forest_data <- child_2yr_ELOM_cognitive_results %>%
  filter(grepl(":maternal_hivHIV positive", term)) %>%
  mutate(
    Marker = gsub(":.*", "", term),                         
    Marker_Label = marker_labels[Marker],                  
    sig = ifelse(`p.value` < 0.05 & adj_p_value < 0.05, "p < 0.05", "NS")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Marker_Label)) %>%                         
  mutate(
    Marker_Label = factor(Marker_Label, levels = marker_labels),   
    Marker_Label = fct_rev(Marker_Label)                  
  )

child_2yr_ELOM_cognitive_forestplot <- ggplot(child_2yr_ELOM_cognitive_forest_data,
  aes(x = estimate, y = Marker_Label)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high, color = sig), height = 0.2) +
  geom_point(aes(color = sig, shape = sig), size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("p < 0.05" = "darkred", "NS" = "black")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("p < 0.05" = 8, "NS" = 16)) +
  labs(
    x = expression(beta ~ "(95% CI) CHEU (ref: CHU)"),
    y = NULL,
    title = "ELOM cognitive domain",
    subtitle = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child 2 year markers and ELOM/child_2yr_ELOM_cognitive.png", child_2yr_ELOM_cognitive_forestplot, width = 3, height = 8, dpi = 1200)
```

#### ELOM emergent mathematics

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  child_2yr_ELOM_maths_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables child 2 year ELOM scores/ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  child_2yr_ELOM_maths_parsed <- read_html(paste(child_2yr_ELOM_maths_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  child_2yr_ELOM_maths_data <- html_table(child_2yr_ELOM_maths_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  child_2yr_ELOM_maths_data_kable <- child_2yr_ELOM_maths_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", child_2yr_ELOM_maths_data_kable$Term)
  
  child_2yr_ELOM_maths_data_kable <- child_2yr_ELOM_maths_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
  child_2yr_ELOM_maths_data_kable
```

### **Child serum markers** at age 3 years
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results="hide", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Initialize an empty list to store results for each ELOM domain
  DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  child_3yr_marker_list <- list("I36_GM_CSF", "I36_IFNg", "I36_IL1b", "I36_IL2", "I36_IL5",
                               "I36_IL6", "I36_IL7", "I36_IL8", "I36_TNFa", "I36_IL4", "I36_IL10", 
                               "I36_IL12p70", "I36_IL13", "I36_CD14", "I36_CD163", "I36_Lcn2", "I36_MMP9", "I36_YKL40")
  
  ELOM_list <- list("ELOM_SS_GMD", 
                    "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Cognition", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Lang_lit", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Total")

# Linear regression | Loop through each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM:", ELOM_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current ELOM domain
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in child_3yr_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(ELOM_column, 
                                                                 "~", 
                                                                 immune_column, 
                                                                 "*", 
                                                                 hiv_status 
                                                                 ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current ELOM domain in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables child 3 year ELOM scores", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the ELOM domain
      cat("Current ELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the ELOM domain
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables child 3 year ELOM scores/", gsub("\\W", "_", ELOM_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

<br>

#### ELOM cognition

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables child 3 year ELOM scores/ELOM_SS_Cognition_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_parsed <- read_html(paste(child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_data <- html_table(child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_data_kable <- child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_data_kable$Term)
  
  child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_data_kable <- child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
  child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_data_kable
  
```

<br>

```{r}
marker_labels <- c(
  "I36_GM_CSF" = "GM-CSF",
  "I36_IFNg" = "IFNγ",
  "I36_IL1b" = "IL-1β",
  "I36_IL2" = "IL-2",
  "I36_IL5" = "IL-5",
  "I36_IL6" = "IL-6",
  "I36_IL7" = "IL-7",
  "I36_IL8" = "IL-8",
  "I36_TNFa" = "TNFα",
  "I36_IL4" = "IL-4",
  "I36_IL10" = "IL-10",
  "I36_IL12p70" = "IL-12p70",
  "I36_IL13" = "IL-13",
  "I36_CD14" = "CD14",
  "I36_CD163" = "CD163",
  "I36_Lcn2" = "NGAL",
  "I36_MMP9" = "MMP-9",
  "I36_YKL40" = "YKL-40"
)

ELOM_cognitive_domain <- "ELOM_SS_Cognition"
child_3yr_ELOM_cognitive_results <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_cognitive_domain]]

child_3yr_ELOM_cognitive_forest_data <- child_3yr_ELOM_cognitive_results %>%
  filter(grepl(":maternal_hivHIV positive", term)) %>%
  mutate(
    Marker = gsub(":.*", "", term),                         
    Marker_Label = marker_labels[Marker],                  
    sig = ifelse(`p.value` < 0.05 & adj_p_value < 0.05, "p < 0.05", "NS")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Marker_Label)) %>%                         
  mutate(
    Marker_Label = factor(Marker_Label, levels = marker_labels),   
    Marker_Label = fct_rev(Marker_Label)                  
  )

child_3yr_ELOM_cognitive_forestplot <- ggplot(child_3yr_ELOM_cognitive_forest_data,
  aes(x = estimate, y = Marker_Label)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high, color = sig), height = 0.2) +
  geom_point(aes(color = sig, shape = sig), size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("p < 0.05" = "darkred", "NS" = "black")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("p < 0.05" = 8, "NS" = 16)) +
  labs(
    x = expression(beta ~ "(95% CI) CHEU (ref: CHU)"),
    y = NULL,
    title = "ELOM cognitive domain",
    subtitle = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child 3 year markers and ELOM/child_3yr_ELOM_cognitive.png", child_3yr_ELOM_cognitive_forestplot, width = 3, height = 8, dpi = 1200)
```

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child 3 year markers and ELOM/child_3yr_ELOM_cognitive.png){width="100%"}

#### ELOM overall school readiness 

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  child_3yr_ELOM_total_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables child 3 year ELOM scores/ELOM_SS_Total_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  child_3yr_ELOM_total_parsed <- read_html(paste(child_3yr_ELOM_total_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  child_3yr_ELOM_total_data <- html_table(child_3yr_ELOM_total_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  child_3yr_ELOM_total_data_kable <- child_3yr_ELOM_total_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", child_3yr_ELOM_total_data_kable$Term)
  
  child_3yr_ELOM_total_data_kable <- child_3yr_ELOM_total_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
  child_3yr_ELOM_total_data_kable
```

<br>

```{r}
ELOM_total_domain <- "ELOM_SS_Total"
child_3yr_ELOM_total_results <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_total_domain]]

child_3yr_ELOM_total_forest_data <- child_3yr_ELOM_total_results %>%
  filter(grepl(":maternal_hivHIV positive", term)) %>%
  mutate(
    Marker = gsub(":.*", "", term),                         
    Marker_Label = marker_labels[Marker],                  
    sig = ifelse(`p.value` < 0.05 & adj_p_value < 0.05, "p < 0.05", "NS")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Marker_Label)) %>%                         
  mutate(
    Marker_Label = factor(Marker_Label, levels = marker_labels),   
    Marker_Label = fct_rev(Marker_Label)                  
  )

child_3yr_ELOM_total_forestplot <- ggplot(child_3yr_ELOM_total_forest_data,
  aes(x = estimate, y = Marker_Label)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high, color = sig), height = 0.2) +
  geom_point(aes(color = sig, shape = sig), size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("p < 0.05" = "darkred", "NS" = "black")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("p < 0.05" = 8, "NS" = 16)) +
  labs(
    x = expression(beta ~ "(95% CI) CHEU (ref: CHU)"),
    y = NULL,
    title = "ELOM overall domain",
    subtitle = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child 3 year markers and ELOM/child_3yr_ELOM_total.png", child_3yr_ELOM_total_forestplot, width = 3, height = 8, dpi = 1200)
```

### **Child serum markers** at age 5 years
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results="hide", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Initialize an empty list to store results for each ELOM domain
  DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  child_5yr_marker_list <- list("I60_GM_CSF", "I60_IFNg", "I60_IL1b", "I60_IL2", "I60_IL5",
                               "I60_IL6", "I60_IL7", "I60_IL8", "I60_TNFa", "I60_IL4", "I60_IL10", 
                               "I60_IL12p70", "I60_IL13", "I60_CD14", "I60_CD163", "I60_Lcn2", "I60_MMP9", "I60_YKL40")
  
  ELOM_list <- list("ELOM_SS_GMD", 
                    "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Cognition", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Lang_lit", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Total")

# Linear regression | Loop through each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM:", ELOM_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current ELOM domain
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in child_5yr_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(ELOM_column, 
                                                                 "~", 
                                                                 immune_column, 
                                                                 "*", 
                                                                 hiv_status 
                                                                 ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled)
      
    # Apply Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_values <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result)$p.value
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_adjust <- p.adjust(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_values, method = "BH")
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust$adj_p_value <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_p_adjust
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current ELOM domain in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables child 5 year ELOM scores", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the ELOM domain
      cat("Current ELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the ELOM domain
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables child 5 year ELOM scores/", gsub("\\W", "_", ELOM_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
marker_labels <- c(
  "I60_GM_CSF" = "GM-CSF",
  "I60_IFNg" = "IFNγ",
  "I60_IL1b" = "IL-1β",
  "I60_IL2" = "IL-2",
  "I60_IL5" = "IL-5",
  "I60_IL6" = "IL-6",
  "I60_IL7" = "IL-7",
  "I60_IL8" = "IL-8",
  "I60_TNFa" = "TNFα",
  "I60_IL4" = "IL-4",
  "I60_IL10" = "IL-10",
  "I60_IL12p70" = "IL-12p70",
  "I60_IL13" = "IL-13",
  "I60_CD14" = "CD14",
  "I60_CD163" = "CD163",
  "I60_Lcn2" = "NGAL",
  "I60_MMP9" = "MMP-9",
  "I60_YKL40" = "YKL-40"
)

  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Marker_Label)) %>%                         
  mutate(
    Marker_Label = factor(Marker_Label, levels = marker_labels),   
    Marker_Label = fct_rev(Marker_Label)                  
  )

child_5yr_ELOM_cognitive_forestplot <- ggplot(child_5yr_ELOM_cognitive_forest_data,
  aes(x = estimate, y = Marker_Label)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
```

```{r}
    Marker = gsub(":.*", "", term),                         
    Marker_Label = marker_labels[Marker],                  
    sig = ifelse(`p.value` < 0.05 & adj_p_value < 0.05, "p < 0.05", "NS")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Marker_Label)) %>%                         
  mutate(
    Marker_Label = factor(Marker_Label, levels = marker_labels),   
    Marker_Label = fct_rev(Marker_Label)                  
  )

child_5yr_ELOM_gross_motor_forestplot <- ggplot(child_5yr_ELOM_gross_motor_forest_data,
  aes(x = estimate, y = Marker_Label)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high, color = sig), height = 0.2) +
  geom_point(aes(color = sig, shape = sig), size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("p < 0.05" = "darkred", "NS" = "black")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("p < 0.05" = 8, "NS" = 16)) +
  labs(
    x = expression(beta ~ "(95% CI) CHEU (ref: CHU)"),
    y = NULL,
    title = "ELOM gross motor domain",
    subtitle = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

ggsave("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child 5 year markers and ELOM/child_5yr_ELOM_gross_motor.png", child_5yr_ELOM_gross_motor_forestplot, width = 3, height = 8, dpi = 1200)
```

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child 5 year markers and ELOM/child_5yr_ELOM_gross_motor.png){width="100%"}

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  child_5yr_ELOM_language_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables child 5 year ELOM scores/ELOM_SS_Lang_lit_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  child_5yr_ELOM_language_parsed <- read_html(paste(child_5yr_ELOM_language_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  child_5yr_ELOM_language_data <- html_table(child_5yr_ELOM_language_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  child_5yr_ELOM_language_data_kable <- child_5yr_ELOM_language_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", child_5yr_ELOM_language_data_kable$Term)
  
  child_5yr_ELOM_language_data_kable <- child_5yr_ELOM_language_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
  child_5yr_ELOM_language_data_kable
```

## **Associations between serum marker trajectories** from 6 weeks to 5 years **and ELOM scores** 
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs <- merge(
  x = DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled, 
  y = trajectory_features_wide, 
  by = "pid_child", 
  all.x = TRUE
)

hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"

ELOM_list <- list("ELOM_SS_GMD", 
                  "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI", 
                  "ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths", 
                  "ELOM_SS_Cognition", 
                  "ELOM_SS_Lang_lit", 
                  "ELOM_SS_Total")

marker_list <- c(
  "slope_lin_GMCSF", 
  "slope_lin_IFNg", 
  "slope_lin_IL1b", 
  "slope_lin_IL2", 
  "slope_lin_IL5", 
  "slope_lin_IL6", 
  "slope_lin_IL7", 
  "slope_lin_IL8", 
  "slope_lin_TNFa", 
  "slope_lin_IL4", 
  "slope_lin_IL10",
  "slope_lin_IL12p70", 
  "slope_lin_IL13", 
  "slope_lin_CD14", 
  "slope_lin_CD163", 
  "slope_lin_Lcn2", 
  "slope_lin_MMP9", 
  "slope_lin_YKL40"
)

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_results_list <- list()

for (neuro_column in ELOM_list) {
  cat("\n\nELOM:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
  DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_result_df <- data.frame()
  
  for (immune_column in marker_list) {
    cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
    
    form_str <- sprintf("`%s` ~ `%s` * `%s`", neuro_column, immune_column, hiv_status)
    lm_formula <- as.formula(form_str)
    
    lm_fit <- lm(lm_formula, data = DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs)
    lm_tidy <- broom::tidy(lm_fit)

    bh_df <- lm_tidy %>% dplyr::select(term, p.value) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(adj_p_value = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")) %>%
      dplyr::select(term, adj_p_value)
    
    lm_robust <- lmtest::coeftest(lm_fit, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(lm_fit))
    lm_robust_tidy <- broom::tidy(lm_robust, conf.int = TRUE)
    
    lm_robust_tidy <- lm_robust_tidy %>%
      dplyr::left_join(bh_df, by = "term") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        neurometabolite = neuro_column,
        immune_marker   = immune_column
      )
    
    DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_result_df <-
      dplyr::bind_rows(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_result_df, lm_robust_tidy)
  }
  
  DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_results_list[[neuro_column]] <-
    DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_result_df
}

dir.create("Output kables LMM immune slopes ELOM scores", showWarnings = FALSE)

for (neuro_column in ELOM_list) {
  cat("\n\nELOM:", neuro_column, "\n")
  cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
  file_name <- paste0(
    "Output kables LMM immune slopes ELOM scores/",
    gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column),
    "_results.html"
  )
  
  DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_kables <-
    DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_results_list[[neuro_column]] %>%
    dplyr::select(-neurometabolite, -immune_marker)
  
  knitr::kable(
    DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_kables, 
    format = "html", escape = FALSE
  ) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
    as.character() %>%
    cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  LMM_slopes_ELOM_overall_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables LMM immune slopes ELOM scores/ELOM_SS_Total_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  LMM_slopes_ELOM_overall_parsed <- read_html(paste(LMM_slopes_ELOM_overall_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  LMM_slopes_ELOM_overall_data <- html_table(LMM_slopes_ELOM_overall_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  LMM_slopes_ELOM_overall_data_kable <- LMM_slopes_ELOM_overall_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", LMM_slopes_ELOM_overall_data_kable$Term)
  
  LMM_slopes_ELOM_overall_data_kable <- LMM_slopes_ELOM_overall_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

```{r}
LMM_slopes_ELOM_overall_data_kable
```

## **Adjusted analyses**
