### **Associations between serum marker levels and neurometabolite ratios** – Adjusted  

```{r}
pgm_voxel_composition <- read_excel("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Databases/METHINF6_cositas_pgm.xlsx")
pwm_voxel_composition <- read_excel("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Databases/METHINF6_cositas_pwm.xlsx")

pgm_voxel_composition <- pgm_voxel_composition %>%
      mutate(
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "METHINF6", "METHINF"), 
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "METHIN_", "METHINF_"),
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "METHINF___", "METHINF_"),
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "METHINF__", "METHINF_"),
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "METHIN6_", "METHINF_"),
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "-", "_")
)

pgm_voxel_composition$Subject <- ifelse(pgm_voxel_composition$Subject %in% names(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_scanID_corrections), 
                                      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_scanID_corrections[pgm_voxel_composition$Subject], 
                                      pgm_voxel_composition$Subject)

pwm_voxel_composition <- pwm_voxel_composition %>%
      mutate(
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "METHINF6", "METHINF"), 
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "METHIN_", "METHINF_"),
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "METHINF___", "METHINF_"),
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "METHINF__", "METHINF_"),
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "METHIN6_", "METHINF_"),
        Subject = str_replace_all(Subject, "-", "_")
)

pwm_voxel_composition$Subject <- ifelse(pwm_voxel_composition$Subject %in% names(DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_scanID_corrections), 
                                      DCHS_MRI_MRS_6yr_scanID_corrections[pwm_voxel_composition$Subject], 
                                      pwm_voxel_composition$Subject)

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_fGM <- merge(x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled, 
                                               y = pgm_voxel_composition, 
                                               by.x = "Subject", 
                                               by.y = "Subject",
                                               all.x = TRUE)

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_fGM <- merge(x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled, 
                                            y = pgm_voxel_composition, 
                                            by.x = "Subject",
                                            by.y = "Subject",
                                            all.x = TRUE)

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_fWM <- merge(x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled, 
                                               y = pwm_voxel_composition, 
                                               by.x = "Subject", 
                                               by.y = "Subject",
                                               all.x = TRUE)

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_fWM <- merge(x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_abs_flexible_scaled, 
                                            y = pwm_voxel_composition, 
                                            by.x = "Subject",
                                            by.y = "Subject",
                                            all.x = TRUE)
```

<br>

#### **Maternal serum marker concentrations and neurometabolite levels** – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

Linear regressions with robust standard errors and BH correction for multiple comparisons. 

##### **Parietal grey matter - ratios to total creatine** – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=153 participants** (**54 CHEU**, **99 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_fGM %>%
  filter(!is.na(M_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", "Myoinositol_ratios", "NAA_ratios", "Choline_ratios")
  
  maternal_marker_list <- list("M_GM_CSF", "M_IFNg", "M_IL1b", "M_IL2", "M_IL5", 
                                  "M_IL6", "M_IL7", "M_IL8", "M_TNFa", "M_IL4", "M_IL10", 
                                  "M_IL12p70", "M_IL13", "M_CD14", "M_CD163", "M_Lcn2", "M_MMP9", "M_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in maternal_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(
        neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status, "+ child_age_scan + sex + fGM"
      ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables adj maternal pgm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables adj maternal pgm ratios/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

<br>

```{r}

  Maternal_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables adj maternal pgm ratios/Choline_ratios_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  Maternal_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_parsed <- read_html(paste(Maternal_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Maternal_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_data <- html_table(Maternal_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Maternal_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_data_kable <- Maternal_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Maternal_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_data_kable$Term)
  
  Maternal_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_data_kable <- Maternal_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

Results:

- **IL-6**: Serum levels of this maternal **pro-inflammatory cytokine** during pregnancy are **positively associated** with child **total choline ratios** at age 6-7 years in the **HU group** (adjusted p=0.0017). The association is reversed in the HEU group (adjusted p=0.0044).

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers/Parietal grey matter ratios/interaction_plot_Choline_ratios_M_IL6.png){width="100%"}

- **IL-4**: Serum levels of this maternal **anti-inflammatory cytokine** during pregnancy are **positively associated** with child **total choline ratios** at age 6-7 years in the **HU group** (adjusted p=0.0077). The association is reversed (i.e., **negative**) in the **HEU group** (adjusted p=0.0025). 

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers/Parietal grey matter ratios/interaction_plot_Choline_ratios_M_IL4.png){width="100%"}

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_fGM %>%
  filter(!is.na(M_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  filter(!is.na(`GPC+PCh`))

DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Glutamate_abs = `Glu`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_abs = `Ins`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(NAA_abs = `NAA`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Choline_abs = `GPC+PCh`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Creatine_abs = `Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_abs_list <- c("Glutamate_abs", "Myoinositol_abs", "NAA_abs", "Choline_abs", "Creatine_abs")
  
  maternal_marker_list <- list("M_GM_CSF", "M_IFNg", "M_IL1b", "M_IL2", "M_IL5", 
                                  "M_IL6", "M_IL7", "M_IL8", "M_TNFa", "M_IL4", "M_IL10", 
                                  "M_IL12p70", "M_IL13", "M_CD14", "M_CD163", "M_Lcn2", "M_MMP9", "M_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in maternal_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(
        neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status, "+ child_age_scan + sex + fGM"
      ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables adj maternal pgm mM", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables adj maternal pgm mM/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

###### *Glutamate mM* – Adjusted

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  Maternal_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables adj maternal pgm mM/Glutamate_abs_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  Maternal_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_parsed <- read_html(paste(Maternal_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Maternal_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data <- html_table(Maternal_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Maternal_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data_kable <- Maternal_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Maternal_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  Maternal_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data_kable <- Maternal_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

No significant associations were found between maternal HIV status, maternal serum marker levels during pregnancy, and child glutamate concentrations in the parietal grey matter at age 6-7 years.

```{r}
Maternal_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data_kable
```

##### **Parietal white matter - ratios to total creatine** – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=132 participants** (**44 CHEU**, **88 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_fWM %>%
  filter(!is.na(M_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", "Myoinositol_ratios", "NAA_ratios", "Choline_ratios")
  
  maternal_marker_list <- list("M_GM_CSF", "M_IFNg", "M_IL1b", "M_IL2", "M_IL5", 
                                  "M_IL6", "M_IL7", "M_IL8", "M_TNFa", "M_IL4", "M_IL10", 
                                  "M_IL12p70", "M_IL13", "M_CD14", "M_CD163", "M_Lcn2", "M_MMP9", "M_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in maternal_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(
        neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status, "+ child_age_scan + sex + fWM"
      ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables adj maternal pwm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables adj maternal pwm ratios/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

<br>

###### *Glutamate ratios* – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  Maternal_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables adj maternal pwm ratios/Glutamate_ratios_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  Maternal_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_parsed <- read_html(paste(Maternal_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Maternal_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data <- html_table(Maternal_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Maternal_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Maternal_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Maternal_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  Maternal_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Maternal_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

Results:

- **IL-8**: Serum levels of this maternal **pro-inflammatory cytokine** during pregnancy are **negatively associated** with child **glutamate ratios** at age 6-7 years in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0015).

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers/Parietal white matter ratios/interaction_plot_Glutamate_ratios_M_IL8.png){width="100%"}

- **IL-13**: Serum levels of this maternal **anti-inflammatory cytokine** during pregnancy are **negatively associated** with child **glutamate ratios** at age 6-7 years in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0196).

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Maternal markers/Parietal white matter ratios/interaction_plot_Glutamate_ratios_M_IL13.png){width="100%"}

```{r}
Maternal_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable
```

#### **Infant serum marker concentrations and neurometabolite levels** – Adjusted 
[Go back to index](#top)

Linear regressions with robust standard errors and BH correction for multiple comparisons. 

##### **Parietal grey matter - ratios to total creatine** – Adjusted 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=115 participants** (**40 CHEU**, **75 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_fGM %>%
  filter(!is.na(I6_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", "Myoinositol_ratios", "NAA_ratios", "Choline_ratios")
  
  infant_marker_list <- list("I6_GM_CSF", "I6_IFNg", "I6_IL1b", "I6_IL2", "I6_IL5", 
                                  "I6_IL6", "I6_IL7", "I6_IL8", "I6_TNFa", "I6_IL4", "I6_IL10", 
                                  "I6_IL12p70", "I6_IL13", "I6_CD14", "I6_CD163", "I6_Lcn2", "I6_MMP9", "I6_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in infant_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(
        neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status, "+ child_age_scan + sex + fGM"
      ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios)
      
    
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables adj infant pgm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables adj infant pgm ratios/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

<br>

###### *Glutamate ratios* – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  Infant_pgm_adj_ratios_Glu_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables adj infant pgm ratios/Glutamate_ratios_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  Infant_pgm_adj_ratios_Glu_parsed <- read_html(paste(Infant_pgm_adj_ratios_Glu_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Infant_pgm_adj_ratios_Glu_data <- html_table(Infant_pgm_adj_ratios_Glu_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Infant_pgm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Infant_pgm_adj_ratios_Glu_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Infant_pgm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  Infant_pgm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Infant_pgm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

No significant associations were found between maternal HIV status, infant serum marker levels at 6 weeks, and child glutamate ratios in the parietal grey matter at age 6-7 years.

```{r}
Infant_pgm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable
```

Results:

- **CD14**: Serum levels of this infant **monocyte activation marker** at 6 weeks are **negatively associated** with child **myo-inositol ratios** at age 6-7 years in the **HU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0004). The association is reversed (i.e., **positive**) in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0017). 

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Infant markers/Parietal grey matter ratios/interaction_plot_Myoinositol_ratios_I6_CD14.png){width="100%"}

```{r}
Infant_pgm_adj_ratios_Ins_data_kable
```

##### **Parietal grey matter - absolute concentrations** (mM) – Adjusted

This subset includes **n=110 participants** (**40 CHEU**, **70 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_fGM %>%
  filter(!is.na(I6_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  filter(!is.na(`GPC+PCh`))

DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Glutamate_abs = `Glu`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_abs = `Ins`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(NAA_abs = `NAA`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Choline_abs = `GPC+PCh`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Creatine_abs = `Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_abs_list <- c("Glutamate_abs", "Myoinositol_abs", "NAA_abs", "Choline_abs", "Creatine_abs")
  
  infant_marker_list <- list("I6_GM_CSF", "I6_IFNg", "I6_IL1b", "I6_IL2", "I6_IL5", 
                                  "I6_IL6", "I6_IL7", "I6_IL8", "I6_TNFa", "I6_IL4", "I6_IL10", 
                                  "I6_IL12p70", "I6_IL13", "I6_CD14", "I6_CD163", "I6_Lcn2", "I6_MMP9", "I6_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in infant_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(
        neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status, "+ child_age_scan + sex + fGM"
      ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables adj infant pgm mM", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables adj infant pgm mM/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Infant_pgm_adj_abs_tCho_data_kable$Term)
  
  Infant_pgm_adj_abs_tCho_data_kable <- Infant_pgm_adj_abs_tCho_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

Results:

- **IL-4**: Serum levels of this infant **anti-inflammatory cytokine** at 6 weeks are **negatively associated** with child **N-acetyl-aspartate ratios** at age 6-7 years in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0382).

##### **Parietal white matter - ratios to total creatine** – Adjusted 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=100 participants** (**33 CHEU**, **67 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_fWM %>%
  filter(!is.na(I6_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", "Myoinositol_ratios", "NAA_ratios", "Choline_ratios")
  
  infant_marker_list <- list("I6_GM_CSF", "I6_IFNg", "I6_IL1b", "I6_IL2", "I6_IL5", 
                                  "I6_IL6", "I6_IL7", "I6_IL8", "I6_TNFa", "I6_IL4", "I6_IL10", 
                                  "I6_IL12p70", "I6_IL13", "I6_CD14", "I6_CD163", "I6_Lcn2", "I6_MMP9", "I6_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in infant_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(
        neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status, "+ child_age_scan + sex + fWM"
      ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables adj infant pwm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables adj infant pwm ratios/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_infant_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
                                  "I24_IL12p70", "I24_IL13", "I24_CD14", "I24_CD163", "I24_Lcn2", "I24_MMP9", "I24_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df <- data.frame()

        neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status, "+ child_age_scan + sex + fGM"
      ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe

                                                         DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df
  }
```

```{r}
  Child_2yr_pgm_adj_ratios_Ins_data <- html_table(Child_2yr_pgm_adj_ratios_Ins_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Child_2yr_pgm_adj_ratios_Ins_data_kable <- Child_2yr_pgm_adj_ratios_Ins_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Child_2yr_pgm_adj_ratios_Ins_data_kable$Term)
  
  Child_2yr_pgm_adj_ratios_Ins_data_kable <- Child_2yr_pgm_adj_ratios_Ins_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

After correction for multiple comparisons, no significant associations were found between maternal HIV status, child serum marker levels at 2 years, and child myo-inositol ratios in the parietal grey matter at age 6-7 years.

```{r}
Child_2yr_pgm_adj_ratios_Ins_data_kable
```

##### **Parietal grey matter - absolute concentrations** (mM) – Adjusted 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=115 participants** (**39 CHEU**, **76 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_fGM %>%
  filter(!is.na(I24_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  filter(!is.na(`GPC+PCh`))

DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Glutamate_abs = `Glu`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_abs = `Ins`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(NAA_abs = `NAA`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Choline_abs = `GPC+PCh`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Creatine_abs = `Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_abs_list <- c("Glutamate_abs", "Myoinositol_abs", "NAA_abs", "Choline_abs", "Creatine_abs")
  
  child_2yr_marker_list <- list("I24_GM_CSF", "I24_IFNg", "I24_IL1b", "I24_IL2", "I24_IL5", 
                                  "I24_IL6", "I24_IL7", "I24_IL8", "I24_TNFa", "I24_IL4", "I24_IL10", 
                                  "I24_IL12p70", "I24_IL13", "I24_CD14", "I24_CD163", "I24_Lcn2", "I24_MMP9", "I24_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in child_2yr_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(
        neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status, "+ child_age_scan + sex + fGM"
      ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables adj child 2yr pgm mM", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables adj child 2yr pgm mM/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

<br>

```{r}
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(

      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
```

- **TNFα**: Serum levels of this child **pro-inflammatory cytokine** at 2 years are **positively associated** with child **myo-inositol concentrations** at age 6-7 years in the **HU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0298). The association is reversed (i.e., **negative**) in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0142).

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child markers 2yr/Parietal grey matter mM/interaction_plot_Myoinositol_abs_I24_TNFa.png){width="100%"}

- **CD14**: Serum levels of this child **monocyte activation marker** at 2 years are **negatively associated** with child **myo-inositol concentrations** at age 6-7 years in the **HU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0132). 

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child markers 2yr/Parietal grey matter mM/interaction_plot_Myoinositol_abs_I24_CD14.png){width="100%"}

##### **Parietal white matter - ratios to total creatine** – Adjusted 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=104 participants** (**32 CHEU**, **72 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_fWM %>%
  filter(!is.na(I24_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", "Myoinositol_ratios", "NAA_ratios", "Choline_ratios")
  
  child_2yr_marker_list <- list("I24_GM_CSF", "I24_IFNg", "I24_IL1b", "I24_IL2", "I24_IL5", 
                                  "I24_IL6", "I24_IL7", "I24_IL8", "I24_TNFa", "I24_IL4", "I24_IL10", 
                                  "I24_IL12p70", "I24_IL13", "I24_CD14", "I24_CD163", "I24_Lcn2", "I24_MMP9", "I24_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in child_2yr_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(
        neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status, "+ child_age_scan + sex + fWM"
      ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables adj child 2yr pwm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables adj child 2yr pwm ratios/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

<br>

###### *Glutamate ratios* – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  Child_2yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables adj child 2yr pwm ratios/Glutamate_ratios_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  Child_2yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_parsed <- read_html(paste(Child_2yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Child_2yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data <- html_table(Child_2yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Child_2yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Child_2yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Child_2yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  Child_2yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Child_2yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

- **IL-13**: Serum levels of this child **anti-inflammatory cytokine** at 2 years are **positively associated** with child **glutamate ratios** at age 6-7 years in the **HU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0254). The association is reversed (i.e, **negative**) in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0111).

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child markers 2yr/Parietal white matter ratios/interaction_plot_Glutamate_ratios_I24_IL13.png){width="100%"}

```{r}
Child_2yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable
```

#### **Child serum marker concentrations and neurometabolite levels at age 3 years**

Linear regressions with robust standard errors and BH correction for multiple comparisons. 

##### **Parietal grey matter - ratios to total creatine** – Adjusted 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=110 participants** (**38 CHEU**, **72 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_fGM %>%
  filter(!is.na(I36_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", "Myoinositol_ratios", "NAA_ratios", "Choline_ratios")
  
  maternal_marker_list <- list("I36_GM_CSF", "I36_IFNg", "I36_IL1b", "I36_IL2", "I36_IL5", 
                                  "I36_IL6", "I36_IL7", "I36_IL8", "I36_TNFa", "I36_IL4", "I36_IL10", 
                                  "I36_IL12p70", "I36_IL13", "I36_CD14", "I36_CD163", "I36_Lcn2", "I36_MMP9", "I36_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in maternal_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(
        neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status, "+ child_age_scan + sex + fGM"
      ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables adj child 3yr pgm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables adj child 3yr pgm ratios/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Child_3yr_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_data_kable$Term)
  
  Child_3yr_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_data_kable <- Child_3yr_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

After correcting for multiple comparisons, no significant associations were found between maternal HIV status, child serum marker levels at 3 years, and child total choline ratios in the parietal grey matter at age 6-7 years.

```{r}
Child_3yr_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_data_kable
```

##### **Parietal grey matter - absolute concentrations** (mM) – Adjusted 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=107 participants** (**38 CHEU**, **69 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_fGM %>%
  filter(!is.na(I36_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  filter(!is.na(`GPC+PCh`))

DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Glutamate_abs = `Glu`)
DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_abs = `Ins`)
DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(NAA_abs = `NAA`)
DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Choline_abs = `GPC+PCh`)
DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Creatine_abs = `Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_abs_list <- c("Glutamate_abs", "Myoinositol_abs", "NAA_abs", "Choline_abs", "Creatine_abs")
  
  maternal_marker_list <- list("I36_GM_CSF", "I36_IFNg", "I36_IL1b", "I36_IL2", "I36_IL5", 
                                  "I36_IL6", "I36_IL7", "I36_IL8", "I36_TNFa", "I36_IL4", "I36_IL10", 
                                  "I36_IL12p70", "I36_IL13", "I36_CD14", "I36_CD163", "I36_Lcn2", "I36_MMP9", "I36_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in maternal_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(
        neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status, "+ child_age_scan + sex + fGM"
      ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables adj child 3yr pgm mM", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables adj child 3yr pgm mM/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

<br>

###### *Glutamate mM* – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  Child_3yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables adj child 3yr pgm mM/Glutamate_abs_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  Child_3yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_parsed <- read_html(paste(Child_3yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Child_3yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data <- html_table(Child_3yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Child_3yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data_kable <- Child_3yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Child_3yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  Child_3yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data_kable <- Child_3yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

Results:

- **IFN-γ**: Serum levels of this child **pro-inflammatory cytokine** at 3 years are **negatively associated** with child **glutamate concentrations** at age 6-7 years in the **HU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0459). The association is reversed, i.e. **positive**, in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0459).

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child markers 3yr/Parietal grey matter mM/interaction_plot_Glutamate_abs_I36_IFNg.png){width="100%"}

- **CD14**: Serum levels of this child **monocyte activation marker** at 3 years are **negatively associated** with child **glutamate concentrations** at age 6-7 years in the **HU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0483). 

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child markers 3yr/Parietal grey matter mM/interaction_plot_Glutamate_abs_I36_CD14.png){width="100%"}

- **CD163**: Serum levels of this child **monocyte activation marker** at 3 years are **positively associated** with child **glutamate concentrations** at age 6-7 years in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0164). The association was negative in the HU group, but did not survive correction for multiple comparisons.

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child markers 3yr/Parietal grey matter mM/interaction_plot_Glutamate_abs_I36_CD163.png){width="100%"}

```{r}
Child_3yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data_kable
```

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}

                                  "I36_IL6", "I36_IL7", "I36_IL8", "I36_TNFa", "I36_IL4", "I36_IL10", 
                                  "I36_IL12p70", "I36_IL13", "I36_CD14", "I36_CD163", "I36_Lcn2", "I36_MMP9", "I36_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in maternal_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(
        neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status, "+ child_age_scan + sex + fWM" 
      ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables adj child 3yr pwm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite

      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]]

            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%

        as.character() %>%

}
```

```{r}
  Child_3yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Child_3yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Child_3yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  Child_3yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable <- Child_3yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

- **IL-4**: Serum levels of this child **anti-inflammatory cytokine** at 3 years are **negatively associated** with child **glutamate ratios** at age 6-7 years in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0235).

#### **Child serum marker concentrations and neurometabolite levels at age 5 years** 
[Go back to index](#top)

Linear regressions with robust standard errors and BH correction for multiple comparisons. 

##### **Parietal grey matter - ratios to total creatine** – Adjusted 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=126 participants** (**45 CHEU**, **81 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_fGM %>%
  filter(!is.na(I60_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", "Myoinositol_ratios", "NAA_ratios", "Choline_ratios")
  
  child_5yr_marker_list <- list("I60_GM_CSF", "I60_IFNg", "I60_IL1b", "I60_IL2", "I60_IL5", 
                                  "I60_IL6", "I60_IL7", "I60_IL8", "I60_TNFa", "I60_IL4", "I60_IL10", 
                                  "I60_IL12p70", "I60_IL13", "I60_CD14", "I60_CD163", "I60_Lcn2", "I60_MMP9", "I60_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in child_5yr_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(
        neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status, "+ child_age_scan + sex + fGM"
      ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables adj child 5yr pgm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables adj child 5yr pgm ratios/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

<br>

- **IL-7**: Serum levels of this child **pro-inflammatory cytokine** at 5 years are **negatively associated** with child **myo-inositol ratios** at age 6-7 years in the **HU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0121). The association was reversed, i.e. **positive**, in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0121).

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child markers 5yr/Parietal grey matter ratios/interaction_plot_Myoinositol_ratios_I60_IL7.png){width="100%"}
