```{r}
# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Child_5yr_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_data <- html_table(Child_5yr_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Child_5yr_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_data_kable <- Child_5yr_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Child_5yr_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_data_kable$Term)
  
  Child_5yr_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_data_kable <- Child_5yr_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

- **IL-1β**: Serum levels of this child **pro-inflammatory cytokine** at 5 years are **negatively associated** with child **myo-inositol ratios** at age 6-7 years in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0145). The association was reversed, i.e. **positive**, in the **HEU group** (BH-corrected p=0.0149).

![](C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Exploratory analysis plots/Cross-sectional associations/Child markers 5yr/Parietal grey matter ratios/interaction_plot_Choline_ratios_I60_IL1b.png){width="100%"}

```{r}
Child_5yr_pgm_adj_ratios_tCho_data_kable
```

<br>

##### **Parietal grey matter - absolute concentrations** (mM) – Adjusted 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=121 participants** (**45 CHEU**, **76 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_fGM %>%
  filter(!is.na(I60_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  filter(!is.na(`GPC+PCh`))

DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Glutamate_abs = `Glu`)
DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_abs = `Ins`)
DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(NAA_abs = `NAA`)
DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Choline_abs = `GPC+PCh`)
DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs %>%
  rename(Creatine_abs = `Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_abs_list <- c("Glutamate_abs", "Myoinositol_abs", "NAA_abs", "Choline_abs", "Creatine_abs")
  
  child_5yr_marker_list <- list("I60_GM_CSF", "I60_IFNg", "I60_IL1b", "I60_IL2", "I60_IL5", 
                                  "I60_IL6", "I60_IL7", "I60_IL8", "I60_TNFa", "I60_IL4", "I60_IL10", 
                                  "I60_IL12p70", "I60_IL13", "I60_CD14", "I60_CD163", "I60_Lcn2", "I60_MMP9", "I60_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in child_5yr_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(
        neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status, "+ child_age_scan + sex + fGM"
      ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables adj child 5yr pgm mM", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_abs_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables adj child 5yr pgm mM/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_abs_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

###### *Glutamate mM* – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  Child_5yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables adj child 5yr pgm mM/Glutamate_abs_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  Child_5yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_parsed <- read_html(paste(Child_5yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Child_5yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data <- html_table(Child_5yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Child_5yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data_kable <- Child_5yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Child_5yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  Child_5yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data_kable <- Child_5yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

No significant associations were found between maternal HIV status, child serum marker levels at 5 years, and glutamate concentrations in the parietal grey matter at age 6-7 years.

```{r}
Child_5yr_pgm_adj_abs_Glu_data_kable
```

##### **Parietal white matter - ratios to total creatine** – Adjusted 
[Go back to index](#top)

This subset includes **n=108 participants** (**36 CHEU**, **72 CHU**).

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.show='hide'}
DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_fWM %>%
  filter(!is.na(I60_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", "Myoinositol_ratios", "NAA_ratios", "Choline_ratios")
  
  child_5yr_marker_list <- list("I60_GM_CSF", "I60_IFNg", "I60_IL1b", "I60_IL2", "I60_IL5", 
                                  "I60_IL6", "I60_IL7", "I60_IL8", "I60_TNFa", "I60_IL4", "I60_IL10", 
                                  "I60_IL12p70", "I60_IL13", "I60_CD14", "I60_CD163", "I60_Lcn2", "I60_MMP9", "I60_YKL40")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in child_5yr_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(
        neuro_column, "~", immune_column, "*", hiv_status, "+ child_age_scan + sex + fWM"
      ))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables adj child 5yr pwm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables adj child 5yr pwm ratios/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_MRS_6yr_pwm_adj_ratios_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  Child_5yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Ins_data <- html_table(Child_5yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Ins_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  Child_5yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Ins_data_kable <- Child_5yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Ins_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", Child_5yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Ins_data_kable$Term)
  
  Child_5yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Ins_data_kable <- Child_5yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Ins_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

No significant associations were found between maternal HIV status, child serum marker levels at 5 years, and myo-inositol ratios in the parietal white matter at age 6-7 years.

```{r}
Child_5yr_pwm_adj_ratios_Ins_data_kable
```

### **Associations between serum marker trajectories** from 6 weeks to 5 years **and neurometabolite levels** at 6-7 years – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

#### **Parietal grey matter ratios** – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj <- merge(
  x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs,
  y = pgm_voxel_composition,
  by.x = "Subject", 
  by.y = "Subject",
  all.x = TRUE
)

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_results_list <- list()

hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
covars   <- c("child_age_scan", "sex", "fGM")
covar_str <- paste(sprintf("`%s`", covars), collapse = " + ")

neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c(
  "Glutamate_ratios", 
  "Myoinositol_ratios", 
  "NAA_ratios", 
  "Choline_ratios"
)

marker_list <- c(
  "slope_lin_GMCSF", 
  "slope_lin_IFNg", 
  "slope_lin_IL1b", 
  "slope_lin_IL2", 
  "slope_lin_IL5", 
  "slope_lin_IL6", 
  "slope_lin_IL7", 
  "slope_lin_IL8", 
  "slope_lin_TNFa", 
  "slope_lin_IL4", 
  "slope_lin_IL10",
  "slope_lin_IL12p70", 
  "slope_lin_IL13", 
  "slope_lin_CD14", 
  "slope_lin_CD163", 
  "slope_lin_Lcn2", 
  "slope_lin_MMP9", 
  "slope_lin_YKL40"
)

for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
  cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")

  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_result_df <- data.frame()

  for (immune_column in marker_list) {
    cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")

    form_str <- sprintf("`%s` ~ %s * `%s` + %s",
                        neuro_column, immune_column, hiv_status, covar_str)
    lm_formula <- as.formula(form_str)

    lm_fit <- lm(lm_formula, data = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj)

    lm_tidy <- broom::tidy(lm_fit)
    bh_df <- lm_tidy %>%
      dplyr::select(term, p.value) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(adj_p_value = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")) %>%
      dplyr::select(term, adj_p_value)

    lm_robust <- lmtest::coeftest(lm_fit, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(lm_fit))
    lm_robust_tidy <- broom::tidy(lm_robust, conf.int = TRUE)

    lm_robust_tidy <- lm_robust_tidy %>%
      dplyr::left_join(bh_df, by = "term") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        neurometabolite = neuro_column,
        immune_marker   = immune_column
      )

    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_result_df <-
      dplyr::bind_rows(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_result_df, lm_robust_tidy)
  }

  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_results_list[[neuro_column]] <-
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_result_df
}

dir.create("Output kables LMM adj immune slopes pgm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
  cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")

  file_name <- paste0(
    "Output kables LMM adj immune slopes pgm ratios/",
    gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column),
    "_results.html"
  )

  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_kables <-
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_results_list[[neuro_column]] %>%
    dplyr::select(-neurometabolite, -immune_marker)

  knitr::kable(
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_kables, 
    format = "html", escape = FALSE
  ) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
    as.character() %>%
    cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

<br>

```{r}
)
```

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_LMMs_adj_result_df <- data.frame()

  for (immune_column in marker_list) {
    cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")

    form_str <- sprintf("`%s` ~ %s * `%s` + %s",
                        neuro_column, immune_column, hiv_status, covar_str)
    lm_formula <- as.formula(form_str)

    lm_fit <- lm(lm_formula, data = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_LMMs_adj)

    bh_df <- lm_tidy %>%

    lm_robust <- lmtest::coeftest(lm_fit, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(lm_fit))
    lm_robust_tidy <- broom::tidy(lm_robust, conf.int = TRUE)

    lm_robust_tidy <- lm_robust_tidy %>%
      dplyr::left_join(bh_df, by = "term") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        neurometabolite = neuro_column,

      )

    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_LMMs_adj_result_df <-
      dplyr::bind_rows(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_LMMs_adj_result_df, lm_robust_tidy)
```

```{r}
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", LMM_adj_slopes_pgm_abs_Glu_data_kable$Term)
  
  LMM_adj_slopes_pgm_abs_Glu_data_kable <- LMM_adj_slopes_pgm_abs_Glu_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
```

#### **Parietal white matter ratios** – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj <- merge(
  x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs,
  y = pwm_voxel_composition,
  by.x = "Subject", 
  by.y = "Subject",
  all.x = TRUE
)

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_results_list <- list()

hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
covars   <- c("child_age_scan", "sex", "fWM")
covar_str <- paste(sprintf("`%s`", covars), collapse = " + ")

neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c(
  "Glutamate_ratios", 
  "Myoinositol_ratios", 
  "NAA_ratios", 
  "Choline_ratios"
)

marker_list <- c(
  "slope_lin_GMCSF", 
  "slope_lin_IFNg", 
  "slope_lin_IL1b", 
  "slope_lin_IL2", 
  "slope_lin_IL5", 
  "slope_lin_IL6", 
  "slope_lin_IL7", 
  "slope_lin_IL8", 
  "slope_lin_TNFa", 
  "slope_lin_IL4", 
  "slope_lin_IL10",
  "slope_lin_IL12p70", 
  "slope_lin_IL13", 
  "slope_lin_CD14", 
  "slope_lin_CD163", 
  "slope_lin_Lcn2", 
  "slope_lin_MMP9", 
  "slope_lin_YKL40"
)

for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
  cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")

  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_result_df <- data.frame()

  for (immune_column in marker_list) {
    cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")

    form_str <- sprintf("`%s` ~ %s * `%s` + %s",
                        neuro_column, immune_column, hiv_status, covar_str)
    lm_formula <- as.formula(form_str)

    lm_fit <- lm(lm_formula, data = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj)

    lm_tidy <- broom::tidy(lm_fit)
    bh_df <- lm_tidy %>%
      dplyr::select(term, p.value) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(adj_p_value = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")) %>%
      dplyr::select(term, adj_p_value)

    lm_robust <- lmtest::coeftest(lm_fit, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(lm_fit))
    lm_robust_tidy <- broom::tidy(lm_robust, conf.int = TRUE)

    lm_robust_tidy <- lm_robust_tidy %>%
      dplyr::left_join(bh_df, by = "term") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        neurometabolite = neuro_column,
        immune_marker   = immune_column
      )

    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_result_df <-
      dplyr::bind_rows(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_result_df, lm_robust_tidy)
  }

  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_results_list[[neuro_column]] <-
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_result_df
}

dir.create("Output kables LMM adj immune slopes pwm ratios", showWarnings = FALSE)

for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
  cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")

  file_name <- paste0(
    "Output kables LMM adj immune slopes pwm ratios/",
    gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column),
    "_results.html"
  )

  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_kables <-
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_results_list[[neuro_column]] %>%
    dplyr::select(-neurometabolite, -immune_marker)

  knitr::kable(
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_LMMs_adj_kables, 
    format = "html", escape = FALSE
  ) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
    as.character() %>%
    cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

### **Sensitivity analyses** 
[Go back to index](#top)

Variables that showed significant differences between HEU and HU groups in the sociodemographics analysis include:

- **Maternal age at delivery** 

- **Maternal depression**

- **Maternal alcohol use during pregnancy** 

- **Maternal smoking during pregnancy**

- **Exclusive breastfeeding duration**

- **Nutritional scores**

<br>

#### **Maternal age at delivery**
[Go back to index](#top)

##### Associations with *maternal serum markers*

**Maternal IL-6 and child parietal grey matter choline ratios**
[Go back to index](#top)

Results held after adjusting for maternal age at delivery.

```{r}
sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL6_GM_tCho <- lm(
  formula = Choline_ratios ~ M_IL6 * maternal_hiv + child_age_scan + sex + fGM + maternal_age_enr,
  data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios
)

sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL6_GM_tCho_robust <- coeftest(
  sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL6_GM_tCho, 
  vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL6_GM_tCho, type = "HC3")
)

sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL6_GM_tCho_robust <- tidy(sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL6_GM_tCho_robust, conf.int = TRUE)

sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL6_GM_tCho_robust_kable <- kable(sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL6_GM_tCho_robust, "html") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
    column_spec(column = 5, bold = sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL6_GM_tCho_robust$p.value < 0.05) 

sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL6_GM_tCho_robust_kable
```

<br>

**Maternal IL-4 and child parietal grey matter choline ratios**
[Go back to index](#top)

Results held after adjusting for maternal age at delivery.

```{r}
sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho <- lm(
  formula = Choline_ratios ~ M_IL4 * maternal_hiv + child_age_scan + sex + fGM + maternal_age_enr,
  data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios
)

sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust <- coeftest(
  sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho, 
  vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho, type = "HC3")
)

sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust_kable <- kable(sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust, "html") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
    column_spec(column = 5, bold = sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust$p.value < 0.05) 

sensitivity_maternal_age_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust_kable
```

```{r}
  vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(sensitivity_maternal_alcohol_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho, type = "HC3")
)

sensitivity_maternal_alcohol_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust <- tidy(sensitivity_maternal_alcohol_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust, conf.int = TRUE)

sensitivity_maternal_alcohol_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust_kable <- kable(sensitivity_maternal_alcohol_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust, "html") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
    column_spec(column = 5, bold = sensitivity_maternal_alcohol_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust$p.value < 0.05) 

sensitivity_maternal_alcohol_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust_kable
```

```{r}
  data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios
)

sensitivity_maternal_depression_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust <- coeftest(
  sensitivity_maternal_depression_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho, 
  vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(sensitivity_maternal_depression_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho, type = "HC3")
)

sensitivity_maternal_depression_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust <- tidy(sensitivity_maternal_depression_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust, conf.int = TRUE)

sensitivity_maternal_depression_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust_kable <- kable(sensitivity_maternal_depression_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust, "html") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
    column_spec(column = 5, bold = sensitivity_maternal_depression_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust$p.value < 0.05) 

sensitivity_maternal_depression_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust_kable
```

```{r}
  formula = Choline_ratios ~ M_IL4 * maternal_hiv + child_age_scan + sex + fGM + Prenatal_smoking_composite,
  data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios
)

sensitivity_maternal_smoking_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust <- coeftest(
  sensitivity_maternal_smoking_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho, 
  vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(sensitivity_maternal_smoking_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho, type = "HC3")
)

sensitivity_maternal_smoking_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust <- tidy(sensitivity_maternal_smoking_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust, conf.int = TRUE)

sensitivity_maternal_smoking_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust_kable <- kable(sensitivity_maternal_smoking_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust, "html") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
    column_spec(column = 5, bold = sensitivity_maternal_smoking_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust$p.value < 0.05) 

sensitivity_maternal_smoking_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust_kable
```

Results held after adjusting for exclusive breastfeeding duration.

```{r}
sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho <- lm(
  formula = Choline_ratios ~ M_IL4 * maternal_hiv + child_age_scan + sex + fGM + time_ebf_months,
  data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios
)

sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust <- coeftest(
  sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho, 
  vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho, type = "HC3")
)

sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust <- tidy(sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust, conf.int = TRUE)

sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust_kable <- kable(sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust, "html") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
    column_spec(column = 5, bold = sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust$p.value < 0.05) 

sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust_kable
```

```{r}
sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho <- lm(
  formula = Choline_ratios ~ M_IL4 * maternal_hiv + child_age_scan + sex + fGM + Underweight_6y,
  data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_MRS_6yr_pgm_adj_ratios
)

sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust <- coeftest(
  sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho, 
  vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho, type = "HC3")
)

sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust <- tidy(sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust, conf.int = TRUE)

sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust_kable <- kable(sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust, "html") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
    column_spec(column = 5, bold = sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust$p.value < 0.05) 

sensitivity_maternal_ebf_maternal_IL4_GM_tCho_robust_kable
```

### **Association between child neurometabolite levels and ELOM scores** – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

#### **Parietal grey matter** – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

##### **Ratios to creatine** – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results="hide", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- merge(x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled,
                                                       y = DCHS_neurodevelop_all, 
                                                       by = "pid_child", 
                                                       all.x = TRUE) 

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- merge(x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM,
                                                       y = pgm_voxel_composition,
                                                       by.x = "Subject",
                                                       by.y = "Subject",
                                                       all.x = TRUE)

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  filter(!is.na(ELOM_SS_Total))
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", 
                                   "Myoinositol_ratios", 
                                   "NAA_ratios", 
                                   "Choline_ratios")
  
  ELOM_list <- list("ELOM_SS_GMD", 
                    "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Cognition", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Lang_lit", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Total")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
        cat("\nELOM score:", ELOM_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, 
                                                                                "~", 
                                                                                ELOM_column, 
                                                                                "*", 
                                                                                hiv_status, 
                                                                                "+ child_age_scan + sex + fGM + elom_childage_mon"))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables pgm ratios ELOM", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables pgm ratios ELOM/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

###### Glutamate – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables pgm ratios ELOM/Glutamate_ratios_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_parsed <- read_html(paste(pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_data <- html_table(pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_data_kable <- pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_data_kable$Term)
  
  pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_data_kable <- pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
  pgm_Glu_ratios_ELOM_data_kable
```

```{r, results="hide", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
                                                                                "*",

                                                                                "+ child_age_scan + sex + fGM + elom_childage_mon"))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model

                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model

                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pgm_abs_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust,
```

```{r}
# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  pgm_tCr_abs_ELOM_data <- html_table(pgm_tCr_abs_ELOM_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  pgm_tCr_abs_ELOM_data_kable <- pgm_tCr_abs_ELOM_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", pgm_tCr_abs_ELOM_data_kable$Term)
  
  pgm_tCr_abs_ELOM_data_kable <- pgm_tCr_abs_ELOM_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
  pgm_tCr_abs_ELOM_data_kable
```

##### **Ratios to creatine** – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results="hide", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- merge(x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled,
                                                       y = DCHS_neurodevelop_all, 
                                                       by = "pid_child", 
                                                       all.x = TRUE) 

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- merge(x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM,
                                                       y = pwm_voxel_composition,
                                                       by.x = "Subject",
                                                       by.y = "Subject",
                                                       all.x = TRUE)

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  filter(!is.na(ELOM_SS_Total))
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Glutamate_ratios = `Glu/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Myoinositol_ratios = `Ins/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(NAA_ratios = `NAA/Cr+PCr`)
DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`)

# Initialize an empty list to store results for each neurometabolite
  DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  neurometabolite_ratios_list <- c("Glutamate_ratios", 
                                   "Myoinositol_ratios", 
                                   "NAA_ratios", 
                                   "Choline_ratios")
  
  ELOM_list <- list("ELOM_SS_GMD", 
                    "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Cognition", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Lang_lit", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Total")

# Linear regression | Loop through each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current neurometabolite
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
        cat("\nELOM score:", ELOM_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_formula <- as.formula(paste(neuro_column, 
                                                                                "~", 
                                                                                ELOM_column, 
                                                                                "*", 
                                                                                hiv_status, 
                                                                                "+ child_age_scan + sex + fWM + elom_childage_mon"))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current neurometabolite in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_results_list[[neuro_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables pwm ratios ELOM", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each neurometabolite
  for (neuro_column in neurometabolite_ratios_list) {
    cat("\n\nNeurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the neurometabolite
      cat("Current neurometabolite:", neuro_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the neurometabolite
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables pwm ratios ELOM/", gsub("\\W", "_", neuro_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_results_list[[neuro_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled <- DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr
DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled[,54:143] <- log(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled[,54:143])

DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled <- DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(M_GM_CSF))
DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(ELOM_SS_Total))

DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled <- DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled %>%
  filter(!is.na(I6_GM_CSF))

  filter(!is.na(ELOM_SS_Total))
```

#### **Maternal serum markers** – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results="hide", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Initialize an empty list to store results for each ELOM domain
  DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  maternal_marker_list <- list("M_GM_CSF", "M_IFNg", "M_IL1b", "M_IL2", "M_IL5",
                               "M_IL6", "M_IL7", "M_IL8", "M_TNFa", "M_IL4", "M_IL10", 
                               "M_IL12p70", "M_IL13", "M_CD14", "M_CD163", "M_Lcn2", "M_MMP9", "M_YKL40")
  
  ELOM_list <- list("ELOM_SS_GMD", 
                    "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Cognition", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Lang_lit", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Total")

# Linear regression | Loop through each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM:", ELOM_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current ELOM domain
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in maternal_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(ELOM_column, 
                                                                 "~", 
                                                                 immune_column, 
                                                                 "*", 
                                                                 hiv_status, 
                                                                 "+ elom_childage_mon + sex"))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current ELOM domain in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables maternal ELOM scores", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the ELOM domain
      cat("Current ELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the ELOM domain
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables maternal ELOM scores/", gsub("\\W", "_", ELOM_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_maternal_neurodevelop_6yr_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

<br>

```{r, results="hide", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
                                                                 "~",

                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model

                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result))

    # Add the results to the dataframe

                                                         DCHS_biomarker_infant_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current ELOM domain in the list

  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files

# Generate separate kables for each ELOM domain
```

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  infant_ELOM_maths_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables infant ELOM scores/ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  infant_ELOM_maths_parsed <- read_html(paste(infant_ELOM_maths_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  infant_ELOM_maths_data <- html_table(infant_ELOM_maths_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  infant_ELOM_maths_data_kable <- infant_ELOM_maths_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", infant_ELOM_maths_data_kable$Term)
  
  infant_ELOM_maths_data_kable <- infant_ELOM_maths_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
  infant_ELOM_maths_data_kable
```

#### **Child serum markers** at age 2 years – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results="hide", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Initialize an empty list to store results for each ELOM domain
  DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  child_2yr_marker_list <- list("I24_GM_CSF", "I24_IFNg", "I24_IL1b", "I24_IL2", "I24_IL5",
                               "I24_IL6", "I24_IL7", "I24_IL8", "I24_TNFa", "I24_IL4", "I24_IL10", 
                               "I24_IL12p70", "I24_IL13", "I24_CD14", "I24_CD163", "I24_Lcn2", "I24_MMP9", "I24_YKL40")
  
  ELOM_list <- list("ELOM_SS_GMD", 
                    "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Cognition", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Lang_lit", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Total")

# Linear regression | Loop through each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM:", ELOM_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current ELOM domain
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in child_2yr_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(ELOM_column, 
                                                                 "~", 
                                                                 immune_column, 
                                                                 "*", 
                                                                 hiv_status, 
                                                                 "+ elom_childage_mon + sex"))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current ELOM domain in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables child 2 year ELOM scores", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the ELOM domain
      cat("Current ELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the ELOM domain
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables child 2 year ELOM scores/", gsub("\\W", "_", ELOM_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_2yr_neurodevelop_6yr_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r, results="hide", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Initialize an empty list to store results for each ELOM domain
  DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  child_3yr_marker_list <- list("I36_GM_CSF", "I36_IFNg", "I36_IL1b", "I36_IL2", "I36_IL5",
                               "I36_IL6", "I36_IL7", "I36_IL8", "I36_TNFa", "I36_IL4", "I36_IL10", 
                               "I36_IL12p70", "I36_IL13", "I36_CD14", "I36_CD163", "I36_Lcn2", "I36_MMP9", "I36_YKL40")
  
  ELOM_list <- list("ELOM_SS_GMD", 
                    "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Cognition", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Lang_lit", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Total")

# Linear regression | Loop through each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM:", ELOM_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current ELOM domain
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in child_3yr_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(ELOM_column, 
                                                                 "~", 
                                                                 immune_column, 
                                                                 "*", 
                                                                 hiv_status, 
                                                                 "+ elom_childage_mon + sex"))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current ELOM domain in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables child 3 year ELOM scores", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the ELOM domain
      cat("Current ELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the ELOM domain
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables child 3 year ELOM scores/", gsub("\\W", "_", ELOM_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_3yr_neurodevelop_6yr_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

##### ELOM cognition – Adjusted

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content
  child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_HTML <- readLines("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2/Output kables child 3 year ELOM scores/ELOM_SS_Cognition_results.html", warn = FALSE)

# Parse the HTML content
  child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_parsed <- read_html(paste(child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_data <- html_table(child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_data_kable <- child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_data_kable$Term)
  
  child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_data_kable <- child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
  child_3yr_ELOM_cognition_data_kable
```

#### **Child serum markers** at age 5 years – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results="hide", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Initialize an empty list to store results for each ELOM domain
  DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list <- list()
  
  hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"
  
  child_5yr_marker_list <- list("I60_GM_CSF", "I60_IFNg", "I60_IL1b", "I60_IL2", "I60_IL5",
                               "I60_IL6", "I60_IL7", "I60_IL8", "I60_TNFa", "I60_IL4", "I60_IL10", 
                               "I60_IL12p70", "I60_IL13", "I60_CD14", "I60_CD163", "I60_Lcn2", "I60_MMP9", "I60_YKL40")
  
  ELOM_list <- list("ELOM_SS_GMD", 
                    "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Cognition", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Lang_lit", 
                    "ELOM_SS_Total")

# Linear regression | Loop through each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM:", ELOM_column, "\n")
  
    # Initialize a dataframe to store results for the current ELOM domain
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- data.frame()
    
    # Loop through each immune marker
      for (immune_column in child_5yr_marker_list) {
        cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")
      
    # Create the formula for the linear regression
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_lm_formula <- as.formula(paste(ELOM_column, 
                                                                 "~", 
                                                                 immune_column, 
                                                                 "*", 
                                                                 hiv_status, 
                                                                 "+ elom_childage_mon + sex"))
  
    # Fit the linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result <- lm(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_lm_formula, 
                                                      data = DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled)
      
    # Fit robust linear regression model
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- coeftest(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result, 
                                                            vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_result))
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust <- tidy(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust, 
                                                        conf.int = TRUE)
      
    # Add the results to the dataframe
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df <- rbind(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df, 
                                                         DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_lm_robust)
    }
    
    # Store the results for the current ELOM domain in the list
    DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]] <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_result_df
  }
  
# Create a directory to store the HTML files
  dir.create("Output kables child 5 year ELOM scores", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Generate separate kables for each ELOM domain
  for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
    cat("\n\nELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Print the title indicating the ELOM domain
      cat("Current ELOM domain:", ELOM_column, "\n")
    
    # Create a file name based on the ELOM domain
      file_name <- paste0("Output kables child 5 year ELOM scores/", gsub("\\W", "_", ELOM_column), "_results.html")
    
      DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_kables <- DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_results_list[[ELOM_column]]
    
    # Save the modified kable as an HTML file
      kable(DCHS_biomarker_5yr_neurodevelop_6yr_kables, 
            format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
        as.character() %>%
        cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic",
      `P value` = "p.value"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", child_5yr_ELOM_total_data_kable$Term)
  
  child_5yr_ELOM_total_data_kable <- child_5yr_ELOM_total_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
    row_spec(which(intercept_rows), background = "lightgray") 
  child_5yr_ELOM_total_data_kable
```

<br>


### **Associations between serum marker trajectories** from 6 weeks to 5 years **and ELOM scores** – Adjusted
[Go back to index](#top)

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
hiv_status <- "maternal_hiv"

ELOM_list <- list("ELOM_SS_GMD", 
                  "ELOM_SS_FMXVMI", 
                  "ELOM_SS_Emerge_maths", 
                  "ELOM_SS_Cognition", 
                  "ELOM_SS_Lang_lit", 
                  "ELOM_SS_Total")

marker_list <- c(
  "slope_lin_GMCSF", 
  "slope_lin_IFNg", 
  "slope_lin_IL1b", 
  "slope_lin_IL2", 
  "slope_lin_IL5", 
  "slope_lin_IL6", 
  "slope_lin_IL7", 
  "slope_lin_IL8", 
  "slope_lin_TNFa", 
  "slope_lin_IL4", 
  "slope_lin_IL10",
  "slope_lin_IL12p70", 
  "slope_lin_IL13", 
  "slope_lin_CD14", 
  "slope_lin_CD163", 
  "slope_lin_Lcn2", 
  "slope_lin_MMP9", 
  "slope_lin_YKL40"
)

covars   <- c("elom_childage_mon", "sex")
covar_str <- paste(sprintf("`%s`", covars), collapse = " + ")

DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_adj_results_list <- list()

for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
  cat("\n\nELOM:", ELOM_column, "\n")

  DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_adj_result_df <- data.frame()

  for (immune_column in marker_list) {
    cat("\nImmune Marker:", immune_column, "\n")

    form_str <- sprintf("`%s` ~ %s * `%s` + %s",
                        ELOM_column, immune_column, hiv_status, covar_str)
    lm_formula <- as.formula(form_str)

    lm_fit <- lm(lm_formula, data = DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs)

    lm_tidy <- broom::tidy(lm_fit)
    bh_df <- lm_tidy %>%
      dplyr::select(term, p.value) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(adj_p_value = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")) %>%
      dplyr::select(term, adj_p_value)

    lm_robust <- lmtest::coeftest(lm_fit, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(lm_fit))
    lm_robust_tidy <- broom::tidy(lm_robust, conf.int = TRUE)

    lm_robust_tidy <- lm_robust_tidy %>%
      dplyr::left_join(bh_df, by = "term") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        ELOM = ELOM_column,
        immune_marker   = immune_column
      )

    DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_adj_result_df <-
      dplyr::bind_rows(DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_adj_result_df, lm_robust_tidy)
  }

  DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_adj_results_list[[ELOM_column]] <-
    DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_adj_result_df
}

dir.create("Output kables LMM adj immune slopes ELOM scores", showWarnings = FALSE)

for (ELOM_column in ELOM_list) {
  cat("\n\nELOM:", ELOM_column, "\n")
  cat("Current ELOM:", ELOM_column, "\n")

  file_name <- paste0(
    "Output kables LMM adj immune slopes ELOM scores/",
    gsub("\\W", "_", ELOM_column),
    "_results.html"
  )

  DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_adj_kables <-
    DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_adj_results_list[[ELOM_column]] %>%
    dplyr::select(-ELOM, -immune_marker)

  knitr::kable(
    DCHS_biomarker_neurodevelop_6yr_scaled_LMMs_adj_kables, 
    format = "html", escape = FALSE
  ) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
    as.character() %>%
    cat(file = file_name, append = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
# Read the original kable HTML content

# Parse the HTML content
  LMM_adj_slopes_ELOM_cognition_parsed <- read_html(paste(LMM_adj_slopes_ELOM_cognition_HTML, collapse = "\n"))

# Extract the kable data from the HTML content
  LMM_adj_slopes_ELOM_cognition_data <- html_table(LMM_adj_slopes_ELOM_cognition_parsed)[[1]]

# Mutate and rename columns
  LMM_adj_slopes_ELOM_cognition_data_kable <- LMM_adj_slopes_ELOM_cognition_data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(p.value) < 0.05, 
                         paste0("**", p.value, "**"), p.value),
      adj_p_value = ifelse(!grepl("(Intercept)", term) & as.numeric(adj_p_value) < 0.05, 
                                      paste0("**", adj_p_value, "**"), adj_p_value)
    ) %>%
    rename(
      Term = "term",
      β = "estimate",
      `95% CI (low)` = "conf.low",
      `95% CI (high)` = "conf.high",
      `P value` = "p.value",
      `BH corrected P` = "adj_p_value",
      `Robust SE` = "std.error",
      Statistic = "statistic"
    )
  
  intercept_rows <- grepl("(Intercept)", LMM_adj_slopes_ELOM_cognition_data_kable$Term)
  
  LMM_adj_slopes_ELOM_cognition_data_kable <- LMM_adj_slopes_ELOM_cognition_data_kable %>%
    kable("html", escape = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table"') %>%
    kable_styling("striped") %>%
```

## **Mediation analysis** 
[Go back to index](#top)

To investigate whether maternal/child serum immune markers and/or child neurometabolite ratios mediated the relationship between maternal HIV status and child neurodevelopmental outcomes, three sets of mediation models were conducted using structural equation modeling (SEM) within the `lavaan` package in R. All models were fitted using full information maximum likelihood (`FIML`) to account for missing data and non-parametric bootstrapping with 5,000 resamples to obtain robust standard errors and percentile-based 95% confidence intervals for indirect effects. 
Model specifications were guided by prior biological hypotheses and upstream analyses that identified significant associations between maternal HIV status, maternal/child serum markers, child neurometabolite ratios, and Early Learning Outcomes Measure (ELOM) scores at 6–7 years of age. Separate models were run for each candidate serum marker or marker slope, neurometabolite ratio, or marker–neurometabolite pair.

### **Model 1**

The first model evaluated whether left parietal white matter choline ratios to creatine at 6–7 years mediated the association between maternal HIV status and child ELOM language and literacy scores. In group comparisons, both choline ratios (Supplementary Table 1) and ELOM language and literacy scores (Supplementary Table 6) were significantly lower in children who are HEU compared to HU peers. Within the HU group, higher left parietal white matter choline ratios were positively associated with better language and literacy performance. These patterns provided the biological and statistical rationale for testing whether differences in choline levels could explain, at least in part, the relationship between maternal HIV exposure and child neurodevelopmental outcomes.

In this model, maternal HIV was significantly associated with lower choline ratios. Higher choline ratios were positively associated with ELOM language and literacy scores, although this association was not statistically significant. The indirect effect of maternal HIV on ELOM scores through choline was negative but non-significant.

```{r}
setwd("C:/Users/fbert/Dropbox/LABORAL/UCT/Research Article 2")
DCHS_ELOM_language <- DCHS_neurodevelop_all %>%
      select(pid_child, ELOM_SS_Lang_lit)

DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_mediation <- merge(
  x = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled,
  y = DCHS_ELOM_language, 
  by = "pid_child", 
  all.x = TRUE
) %>%
  rename(Choline_ratios = `GPC+PCh/Cr+PCr`) %>%
  mutate(
    maternal_hiv01 = ifelse(maternal_hiv == "HIV positive", 1, 0) # 1 = HIV+, 0 = HIV-
  )

mediation_maternalHIV_choline_language <- '
  # Direct paths
  Choline_ratios   ~ a*maternal_hiv01
  ELOM_SS_Lang_lit ~ b*Choline_ratios + c*maternal_hiv01

  # Effects
  indirect := a*b
  total    := c + (a*b)
'

set.seed(1234) 
mediation_fit <- sem(
  model     = mediation_maternalHIV_choline_language,
  data      = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_mediation,
  missing   = "fiml", # Full Information Maximum Likelihood
  se        = "bootstrap", # bootstrap SEs/CIs
  bootstrap = 5000
)

summary(mediation_fit, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE, ci = TRUE)

total_fit <- sem('ELOM_SS_Lang_lit ~ c_total*maternal_hiv',
                 data = DCHS_biomarker_MRS_6yr_pwm_ratios_scaled_ELOM_mediation,
                 missing = "fiml", se = "bootstrap", bootstrap = 5000)
summary(total_fit, standardized = TRUE, ci = TRUE)
```

<br>
<br>
<br>

### **Models 2 and 3** (examples)

The second set of analyses extended this framework to systematically evaluate whether selected serum markers, neurometabolite ratios in either midline parietal grey matter or left parietal white matter, or marker–metabolite pairs acted as mediators of the maternal HIV → child ELOM pathway. For each model, a different candidate mediator was explored based on upstream associations. The model structure remained the same as in Model 1, with maternal HIV as the predictor and child ELOM scores as the outcome. Each mediation model was run independently, and none reached our threshold for statistical significance.

The third set of analyses tested serial multiple mediation to capture a potential biological cascade where maternal or child serum markers influence child neurometabolite levels, which in turn affect neurodevelopment and school readiness. This model included two mediators in sequence:

- Predictor (X): Maternal HIV status

- Mediator 1 (M1): Serum marker (maternal or child, cross-sectional or longitudinal)

- Mediator 2 (M2): Child neurometabolite ratios to creatine (parietal grey or white matter)

- Outcome (Y): ELOM score (overall or domain-specific)

The indirect effects were decomposed into three components:

- X → M1 → Y

- X → M2 → Y

- X → M1 → M2 → Y (serial pathway)

The total indirect effect was calculated as the sum of these three pathways. Parameter estimates, standardized coefficients, and bootstrap confidence intervals were extracted to determine whether any of the indirect effects were statistically significant. Model fit indices were examined to ensure adequate model specification. 

Different combinations of candidate mediators and outcomes were explored based on upstream associations. For example, IL-1β trajectories were significantly different between HEU and HU children. At age 5 years, child IL-1β concentrations were negatively associated with left parietal white matter choline ratios in the HEU group. These choline ratios were lower in HEU compared to HU children in group comparisons, and within the HU group, higher choline ratios were positively associated with ELOM language scores. Language scores were lower in HEU versus HU children. Together, these patterns suggested a biologically plausible serial pathway in which maternal HIV status alters child early-life IL-1β trajectories, which in turn impact mid-childhood left parietal white matter choline ratios and, ultimately, language outcomes at school entry.

Each mediation model was run independently, and none reached our threshold for statistical significance.

